source: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.
reference: "Issa għandna ġrieden ta' 4 xhur li mhumiex dijabetiċi li qabel kienu dijabetiċi," huwa żied.

source: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.
reference: Dr. Ehud Ur, professur tal-mediċina fl-Università Dalhousie ġewwa Halifax, Nova Scotia u president tad-diviżjoni klinika u xjentifika tal-Assoċjazzjoni Kanadiża tad-Dijabete wissa li r-riċerka għadha fil-bidu tagħha.

source: Like some other experts, he is skeptical about whether diabetes can be cured, noting that these findings have no relevance to people who already have Type 1 diabetes.
reference: Bħal xi esperti oħra, huwa xettiku dwar jekk id-dijabete tistax titfejjaq, u jinnota li dawn is-sejbiet m’għandhom l-ebda rilevanza għal nies li diġà għandhom dijabete tat-Tip 1.

source: On Monday, Sara Danius, permanent secretary of the Nobel Committee for Literature at the Swedish Academy, publicly announced during a radio program on Sveriges Radio in Sweden the committee, unable to reach Bob Dylan directly about winning the 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature, had abandoned its efforts to reach him.
reference: Nhar it-Tnejn, Sara Danius, segretarja permanenti tal-Kumitat Nobel għal-Letteratura fl-Akkademja Żvediża, ħabbret pubblikament waqt programm tar-radju fuq Sveriges Radio fl-Iżvezja li l-kumitat, peress li ma rnexxielux jikkuntattja lil Bob Dylan direttament dwar ir-rebħ tal-Premju Nobel għal-Letteratura tal-2016, abbanduna l-isforzi tiegħu biex jikkuntattjah.

source: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."
reference: Danius qal, "Bħalissa m’aħna qed nagħmlu xejn. Ċempilt u bgħatt emails lill-eqreb kollaboratur tiegħu u rċevejt tweġibiet kordjali ħafna. Għalissa, dan żgur huwa biżżejjed."

source: Previously, Ring's CEO, Jamie Siminoff, remarked the company started when his doorbell wasn't audible from his shop in his garage.
reference: Preċedentement, il-Kap Eżekuttiv ta’ Ring, Jamie Siminoff, irrimarka li l-kumpanija bdiet meta l-qanpiena tal-bieb tiegħu ma kinitx tinstema’ mill-ħanut tiegħu fil-garaxx.

source: He built a WiFi door bell, he said.
reference: Huwa bena qanpiena tal-bieb bil-WiFi, qal.

source: Siminoff said sales boosted after his 2013 appearance in a Shark Tank episode where the show panel declined funding the startup.
reference: Siminoff qal li l-bejgħ żdied wara li fl-2013 deher f’episodju ta’ Shark Tank fejn il-bord tal-ispettaklu naqas milli jiffinanzja n-negozju ġdid.

source: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.
reference: Lejn tmiem l-2017, Siminoff deher fuq l-istazzjon tat-televiżjoni tax-xiri QVC.

source: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.
reference: Ring wasal għal soluzzjoni ta’ kawża ma’ kumpanija tas-sigurtà li tikkompeti, il-Korporazzjoni ADT.

source: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.
reference: Waqt li vaċċin sperimentali wieħed jidher li kapaċi jnaqqqas il-mortalità tal-Ebola, sa issa, l-ebda mediċina ma ntweriet b'mod ċar li hija adatta għat-trattament tal-infezzjoni eżistenti.

source: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.
reference: Cocktail wieħed ta’ antikorpi, ZMapp, inizjalment wera potenzjal fil-qasam, iżda studji formali indikaw li kellu inqas benefiċċju minn dak imfittex fil-prevenzjoni tal-mewt.

source: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.
reference: Fil-prova PALM, ZMapp serva bħala kontroll, li jfisser li x-xjentisti użawh bħala linja bażi u qabblu t-tliet trattamenti l-oħra miegħu.

source: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.
reference: Il-USA Gymnastics tappoġġja l-ittra tal-Kumitat Olimpiku tal-Istati Uniti u taċċetta l-ħtieġa assoluta tal-familja Olimpika li tippromwovi ambjent sikur għall-atleti kollha tagħna.

source: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.
reference: Aħna naqblu mal-istqarrija tal-USOC li l-interessi tal-atleti u l-klabbs tagħna, u l-isport tagħhom, jistgħu jiġu moqdijin aħjar billi nagħmlu progress b'tibdil sinifikanti fi ħdan l-organizzazzjoni tagħna, aktar milli bit-tneħħija taċ-ċertifikazzjoni.

source: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.
reference: Il-USA Gymnastics tappoġġja investigazzjoni indipendenti li tista' titfa' dawl dwar kif l-abbuż tal-proporzjon deskritt b'tant kuraġġ minn dawk li salvaw minn Larry Nassar baqa' ma nkixifx għal tant żmien u tħaddan kwalunkwe bidla meħtieġa u xierqa.

source: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.
reference: Il-USA Gymnastics u l-USOC għandhom l-istess għan — li jagħmlu l-isport tal-ġinnastika, u oħrajn, sikur kemm jista' jkun għall-atleti biex isegwu l-ħolm tagħhom f'ambjent sikur, pożittiv u awtorizzat.

source: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.
reference: Matul is-sittinijiet, Brzezinski ħadem għal John F. Kennedy bħala l-konsulent tiegħu u mbagħad għall-amministrazzjoni ta' Lyndon B. Johnson.

source: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.
reference: Matul lis-selezzjonijiet tal-1976 huwa ta parir lil Carter dwar il-politika barranija, imbagħad serva bħala Konsulent tas-Sigurtà Nazzjonali (NSA) mill-1977 sal-1981, wara Henry Kissinger.

source: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.
reference: Bħala NSA, huwa għen lil Carter fl-immaniġġjar diplomatiku tal-affarijiet dinjija, bħall-Ftehimiet ta’ Camp David, 1978; in-normalizzazzjoni tar-relazzjonijiet bejn l-Istati Uniti u ċ-Ċina matul l-aħħar tas-snin sebgħin; ir-Rivoluzzjoni Iranjana, li wasslet għall-kriżi tal-ostaġġi fl-Iran, 1979; u l-invażjoni Sovjetika fl-Afganistan, 1979.

source: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.
reference: Il-film, li jieħdu sehem fih Ryan Gosling u Emma Stone, irċieva nominazzjonijiet fil-kategoriji ewlenin kollha.

source: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.
reference: Gosling u Stone rċevew nominazzjonijiet għall-Aqwa Attur u l-Aqwa Attriċi rispettivament.

source: The other nominations include Best Picture, Director, Cinematography, Costume Design, Film-editing, Original Score, Production Design, Sound Editing, Sound Mixing and Original Screenplay.
reference: In-nominazzjonijiet l-oħra jinkludu l-Aħjar Film, Direttur, Ċinematografija, Disinn tal-Kostumi, Editjar tal-Film, Mużika Oriġinali, Disinn tal-Produzzjoni, Editjar tal-Ħoss, Taħlit tal-Ħoss u Screenplay Oriġinali.

source: Two songs from the movie, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) and City of Stars, received nominations for best original song. Lionsgate studio received 26 nominations — more than any other studio.
reference: Żewġ diski mill-film, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) u City of Stars, ġew nominati għall-aħjar kanzunetta oriġinali. L-istudio Lionsgate irċieva 26 nominazzjoni — aktar minn kull studio ieħor.

source: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.
reference: Tard nhar il-Ħadd, il-President tal-Istati Uniti Donald Trump, fi stqarrija mogħtija permezz tas-segretarju tal-istampa, ħabbar li t-truppi Amerikani se jitilqu mis-Sirja.

source: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
reference: It-tħabbira saret wara li Trump kellu konverżazzjoni bit-telefown mal-President Tork Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

source: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.
reference: It-Turkija se tieħu f'idejha wkoll l-għassa tal-ġellieda tal-ISIS maqbudin li, qalet l-istqarrija, in-nazzjonijiet Ewropej irrifjutaw li jirripatrijaw.

source: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.
reference: Dan mhux biss jikkonferma li mill-inqas xi dinosawri kellhom ir-rix, teorija diġà mifruxa ħafna, imma jipprovdi dettalji li l-fossili ġeneralment ma jistgħux jagħtu, bħall-kulur u l-arranġament tridimensjonali.

source: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.
reference: . Ix-xjenzati jistqarru li r-rix ta’ dan l-annimal kien kannella kulur il-qastan fin-naħa ta’ fuq u l-qiegħ huwa ċar jew kulur ta’ karotenojdi.

source: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.
reference: Is-sejba tipprovdi informazzjoni wkoll dwar l-evoluzzjoni tar-rix fl-għasafar.

source: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.
reference: Minħabba li r-rix tad-dinosawru m’għandhomx xaft żviluppat tajjeb, imsejjaħ rachis, iżda għandhom karatteristiċi oħra ta’ rix — “barbs” u “barbules” — ir-riċerkaturi ddeduċew li r-rachis x’aktarx kien żvilupp evoluzzjonarju li seħħ wara dawn il-karatteristiċi l-oħra.

source: The feathers' structure suggests that they were not used in flight but rather for temperature regulation or display. The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
reference: L-istruttura tar-rix tissuġġerixxi li ma kienux jintużaw għat-titjir iżda pjuttost għar-regolazzjoni tat-temperatura jew għall-wiri. Ir-riċerkaturi ssuġġerew li, minkejja li dan huwa d-denb ta’ dinosawru żgħir, il-kampjun juri rix ta’ adult u mhux rix irqiq u artab taż-żgħar.

source: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.
reference: Ir-riċerkaturi ssuġġerew li, minkejja li dan huwa d-denb ta' dinosawru żgħir fl-età, il-kampjun juri rix tal-adulti u mhux il-pil ta' fellus.

source: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.
reference: Karozza bomba splodiet fil-kwartieri ġenerali tal-pulizija f'Gaziantep, fit-Turkija, ilbieraħ filgħodu u qatlet żewġ uffiċjali tal-pulizija u korriet aktar minn għoxrin persuna oħra.

source: The governor's office said nineteen of the injured were police officers.
reference: L-uffiċċju tal-gvernatur qal li dsatax-il persuna minn dawk midruba kienu uffiċjali tal-pulizija.

source: Police said they suspect an alleged Daesh (ISIL) militant of responsibility for the attack.
reference: Il-pulizija qalu li jissuspettaw allegat militant tad-Daesh (ISIL) b’responsabbiltà għall-attakk.

source: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.
reference: Huma sabu li x-Xemx taħdem fuq l-istess prinċipji bażiċi bħall-istilel l-oħra: L-attività tal-istilel kollha fis-sistema nstabet li kienet immexxija mil-luminożità tagħhom, ir-rotazzjoni tagħhom, u xejn iżjed.

source: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.
reference: Il-luminożità u r-rotazzjoni jintużaw flimkien biex jiddeterminaw in-numru Rossby ta’ stilla, li huwa relatat mal-fluss tal-plażma.

source: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.
reference: Aktar ma jkun żgħir in-numru Rossby, inqas tkun attiva l-istilla fir-rigward tat-treġġigħ lura manjetiku.

source: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.
reference: Matul il-vjaġġ tiegħu, Iwasaki sab problemi f’ħafna okkażjonijiet.

source: He was robbed by pirates, attacked in Tibet by a rabid dog, escaped marriage in Nepal and was arrested in India.
reference: Huwa ġie misruq minn pirati, attakkat fit-Tibet minn kelb bl-idrofobija, ħarab miż-żwieġ fin-Nepal u ġie arrestat l-Indja.

source: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.
reference: L-istandard 802.11n jaħdem kemm fuq il-frekwenzi 2.4Ghz kif ukoll fuq 5.0Ghz.

source: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.
reference: Dan se jippermettilu li jkun kompatibbli b'lura mal-802.11a, 802.11b u 802.11g, sakemm l-istazzjon bażi jkollu radjijiet doppji.

source: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.
reference: Il-veloċitajiet ta' 802.11n huma sostanzjalment aktar veloċi minn dawk tal-preċedessuri tiegħu b'throughput teoretika massimu ta' 600Mbit/s.

source: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.
reference: Duvall, li hija miżżewwġa b’żewġt itfal adulti, ma għamlitx xi impressjoni kbira fuq Miller, li l-istorja kienet relatata miegħu.

source: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."
reference: Meta ġie mistoqsi għal kumment, Miller qal, "Mike jitkellem ħafna waqt is-smigħ...jien kont qed nipprepara u għalhekk fir-realtà ma kontx qed nisma' dak li kien qed jgħid."

source: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.
reference: Se nagħmlu ħilitna biex innaqsu l-emissjonijiet tad-dijossidu tal-karbonju għal kull unità tal-PGD b'marġni notevoli sal-2020 mil-livell tal-2005, qal Hu.

source: He did not set a figure for the cuts, saying they will be made based on China's economic output.
reference: Huwa ma stabbilixxiex figura għat-tnaqqis, u qal li dawn se jsiru abbażi tal-produzzjoni ekonomika taċ-Ċina.

source: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."
reference: Hu ħeġġeġ lill-pajjiżi li qed jiżviluppaw "biex jevitaw il-perkors antik li l-ewwel tniġġes u mbagħad tnaddaf wara."

source: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."
reference: Huwa żied jgħid li, "madankollu, jintalbu jassumu obbligi li jmorru lil hinn mill-istadju tal-iżvilupp, ir-responsabbiltà u l-kapaċitajiet tagħhom."

source: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.
reference: Il-Grupp ta’ Studju tal-Iraq ippreżenta r-rapport tiegħu f’12.00 GMT illum.

source: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.
reference: Huwa jwissi li Ħadd ma jista’ jiggarantixxi li kwalunkwe azzjoni li tittieħed l-Iraq f’dan il-punt se twaqqaf il-gwerra settarja, il-vjolenza li qed tikber, jew dixxendenza lejn il-kaos.

source: The Report opens with plea for open debate and the formation of a consensus in the United States about the policy towards the Middle East.
reference: Ir-Rapport jibda b'talba għal dibattitu miftuħ u l-formazzjoni ta' kunsens fl-Istati Uniti dwar il-politika rigward il-Lvant Nofsani.

source: The Report is highly critical of almost every aspect of the present policy of the Executive towards Iraq and it urges an immediate change of direction.
reference: Ir-Rapport jikkritika b'mod qawwi kważi kull aspett tal-politika preżenti tal-Eżekuttiv fir-rigward tal-Iraq u jħeġġeġ bidla immedjata fid-direzzjoni.

source: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.
reference: L-ewwel waħda fost it-78 rakkomandazzjoni tiegħu hija li għandha tittieħed inizjattiva diplomatika ġdida qabel tispiċċa din is-sena biex il-fruntieri tal-Iraq ikunu żgurati kontra interventi ostili u biex jerġgħu jiġu stabbiliti relazzjonijiet diplomatiċi mal-ġirien tagħha.

source: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.
reference: Is-senatur attwali u l-First Lady tal-Arġentina Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner ħabbret il-kandidatura presidenzjali tagħha lbieraħ filgħaxija ġewwa La Plata, belt 50 kilometru (31 mil) ’il bogħod minn Buenos Aires.

source: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.
reference: Is-Sinjura Kirchner ħabbret l-intenzjoni tagħha li tikkontesta għal president fit-Teatru Arġentin, l-istess post li kienet tuża biex tibda l-kampanja tagħha tal-2005 għas-Senat bħala membru tad-delegazzjoni tal-provinċja ta’ Buenos Aires.

source: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."
reference: Id-dibattitu tqanqal minn kontroversja dwar l-infiq fuq għajnuna u rikostruzzjoni wara l-Uragan Katrina; li xi konservattivi fiskali semmewh b’mod umoristiku "d-Deal ta’ New Orleans ta’ Bush."

source: Liberal criticism of the reconstruction effort has focused on the awarding of reconstruction contracts to perceived Washington insiders.
reference: Il-kritika liberali tal-isforz ta’ rikostruzzjoni ffokat fuq l-għoti ta’ kuntratti ta’ rikostruzzjoni lil dawk perċepiti bħala nies ta’ ġewwa ta’ Washington.

source: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.
reference: Iktar minn erba’ miljun persuna marru Ruma biex jattendu l-funeral.

source: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.
reference: In-numru ta’ nies preżenti kien tant kbir li ma kienx possibbli li kulħadd li jkollu aċċess għall-funeral fi Pjazza San Pietru.

source: Several large television screens were installed in various places in Rome to let the people watch the ceremony.
reference: Diversi skrins kbar tat-televiżjoni ġew installati f’diversi postijiet ġewwa Ruma biex in-nies ikunu jistgħu jaraw iċ-ċerimonja.

source: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.
reference: F’ħafna bliet oħra tal-Italja u fil-bqija tad-dinja, partikolarment fil-Polonja, saru arranġamenti simili, li kienu jarawhom għadd kbir ta’ nies.

source: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.
reference: L-istoriċi kkritikaw il-politiki tal-FBI tal-passat talli ffukaw ir-riżorsi fuq każijiet li faċli jissolvew, speċjalment każijiet ta’ karozzi misruqa, bil-għan li tingħata spinta lir-rata ta’ suċċess tal-aġenzija.

source: Congress began funding the obscenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and specified that the FBI must devote 10 agents to adult pornography.
reference: Il-Kungress beda jiffinanzja l-inizjattiva tal-oxxenità fis-sena fiskali tal-2005 u speċifika li l-FBI għandu jiddedika 10 aġenti għall-pornografija tal-adulti.

source: Robin Uthappa made the innings highest score, 70 runs in just 41 balls by hitting 11 fours and 2 sixes.
reference: Robin Uthappa wettaq l-ogħla punteġġ tal-innings, 70 run f’41 ballun biss billi laqat 11-il four u 2 sixes.

source: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.
reference: Il-battituri tal-ordni tan-nofs, Sachin Tendulkar u Rahul Dravid, għamlu prestazzjoni tajba u għamlu sħubija ta’ mitt run.

source: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.
reference: Iżda, wara li tilfet il-wicket tal-kaptan, l-Indja għamlet biss 36 ġirja u tilfet 7 wickets biex ittemm l-innings.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.
reference: Il-President tal-Istati Uniti George W. Bush wasal f'Singapore fl-għodwa tas-16 ta' Novembru, biex beda mawra ta' ġimgħa madwar l-Asja.

source: He was greeted by Singapore's Deputy Prime Minister Wong Kan Seng and discussed trade and terrorism issues with the Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong.
reference: Huwa ġie milqugħ mid-Deputat Prim Ministru ta’ Singapor Wong Kan Seng u ddiskuta kwistjonijiet ta’ kummerċ u terroriżmu mal-Prim Ministru ta’ Singapor Lee Hsien Loong.

source: After a week of losses in the midterm election, Bush told an audience about the expansion of trade in Asia.
reference: Wara ġimgħa ta' telf fl-elezzjoni ta' nofs it-terminu, Bush kellem lill-udjenza dwar l-espansjoni tal-kummerċ fl-Asja.

source: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.
reference: Il-Prim Ministru Stephen Harper qabel li jibgħat “l-Att dwar l-Arja Nadifa” tal-gvern lil kumitat tal-partit kollu għal reviżjoni, qabel it-tieni qari tiegħu, wara l-laqgħa ta’ 25 minuta ta’ nhar it-Tlieta mal-mexxej tal-NDP Jack Layton fil-PMO.

source: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.
reference: Layton kien talab bidliet fl-abbozz ambjentali tal-konservattivi waqt il-laqgħa mal-PM, u talab għal "kitba mill-ġdid fid-dettall u kompluta" tal-abbozz ambjentali tal-partit Konservattiv.

source: Ever since the Federal Government stepped in to take over funding of the Mersey hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the state government and some federal MPs have criticised this act as a stunt in the prelude to the federal election to be called by November.
reference: Minn meta intervjena l-Gvern Federali biex jieħu f’idejh il-finanzjament tal-isptar Mersey ġewwa Devonport, Tasmania, il-gvern statali u xi MPs federali kkritikaw dan l-att bħala gimmick ta’ qabel l-elezzjoni federali li se tissejjaħ sa Novembru.

source: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.
reference: Iżda l-Prim Ministru John Howard qal li l-att sar biss biex jipproteġi lill-faċilitajiet tal-isptar milli jiġu degradati mill-gvern ta' Tasmanja', billi ngħataw AUD$45 miljun żejda.

source: According to the latest bulletin, sea level readings indicated a tsunami was generated. There was some definite tsunami activity recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.
reference: Skont l-aħħar bulettin, il-qari tal-livell tal-baħar indika li kien iġġenerat tsunami. Kien hemm xi attività definittivament ta' tsunami li ġiet irrekordjata qrib Pago Pago u Niue.

source: No major damage or injuries have been reported in Tonga, but power was temporarily lost, which reportedly prevented Tongan authorities from receiving the tsunami warning issued by the PTWC.
reference: Ma ġewx irrappurtati ħsarat jew korrimenti serji fit-Tonga, imma mar id-dawl temporanjament u dan, allegatament, impedixxa lill-awtoritajiet Tongani milli jirċievu t-twissija tat-tsunami maħruġa mill-PTWC.

source: Fourteen schools in Hawaii located on or near coastlines were closed all of Wednesday despite the warnings being lifted.
reference: Erbatax-il skola fil-Hawaii li jinsabu fuq il-kosti jew viċin tagħhom ingħalqu l-ġurnata kollha nhar l-Erbgħa minkejja li t-twissijiet tneħħew.

source: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.
reference: Il-President tal-Istati Uniti George W. Bush laqa' l-istqarrija.

source: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."
reference: Il-kelliem għal Bush, Gordon Johndroe, sejjaħ il-wegħda tal-Korea ta’ Fuq bħala "pass importanti lejn l-għan li tinkiseb id-denuklearizzazzjoni verifikabbli tal-peniżola Koreana."

source: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.
reference: L-għaxar maltempata b'isem tal-istaġun tal-Uragani tal-Atlantiku, Maltempata Subtropikali Jerry, iffurmat fl-Oċean Atlantiku llum.

source: The National Hurricane Center (NHC) says that at this point Jerry poses no threat to land.
reference: Iċ-Ċentru Nazzjonali tal-Uragani (NHC) jgħid li f’dan il-punt Jerry ma joħloq l-ebda theddida għall-art.

source: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.
reference: Il-Korp tal-Inġiniera tal-Istati Uniti għamel stima li 6 pulzieri xita jistgħu jkissru l-ilqugħ tax-xmara li preċedentement saritilhom il-ħsara.

source: The Ninth Ward, which saw flooding as high as 20 feet during Hurricane Katrina, is currently in waist-high water as the nearby levee was overtopped.
reference: Id-Disa’ Sala, li kellha għargħar għoli sa 20 pied waqt l-Uragan Katrina, bħalissa tinsab f’ilma għoli sal-qadd peress li l-eqreb diga kienet inqabżet.

source: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.
reference: L-ilma qed jaqbeż l-ilqugħ f'taqsima li hi wiesgħa 100 pied.

source: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden expressed his frustration over the deletions when he spoke to Wikinews last month.
reference: L-Amministratur tal-Commons Adam Cuerden esprima l-frustrazzjoni tiegħu dwar it-tħassir meta tkellem ma’ Wikinews ix-xahar li għadda.

source: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."
reference: "Huwa [Wales] bażikament gidbilna mill-bidu nett. L-ewwel, billi jaġixxi bħallikieku dan sar għal raġunijiet legali. It-tieni, billi taparsi kien qed jismagħna, sat-tħassir tal-arti tiegħu."

source: The community irritation led to current efforts to draft a policy regarding sexual content for the site which hosts millions of openly-licensed media.
reference: L-irritazzjoni tal-komunità wasslet għal sforzi attwali biex titfassal politika rigward kontenut sesswali għas-sit li jospita miljuni ta’ midja liċenzjati b’mod miftuħ.

source: The work done was mostly theoretical, but the program was written to simulate observations made of the Sagittarius galaxy.
reference: Ix-xogħol li sar kien l-aktar teoretiku, imma l-programm inkiteb biex jistimula l-osservazzjonijiet magħmula tal-galassja Sagittarius.

source: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.
reference: L-effett li kien qed ifittex it-tim ikun ikkawżat mill-forzi tal-marea bejn il-materja skura tal-galassja u l-materja skura tat-Triq ta’ Sant’Anna.

source: Just like the moon exerts a pull on the earth, causing tides, so does the Milky Way exert a force on the Sagittarius galaxy.
reference: Bħalma l-qamar għandu ġibda fuq l-art, u jikkawża mareati, hekk ukoll it-Triq ta’ Sant’Anna tagħmel forza fuq il-galassja ta’ Sagittarius.

source: The scientists were able to conclude that the dark matter affect other dark matter in the same way regular matter does.
reference: Ix-xjenzati waslu għall-konklużjoni li l-materja skura taffettwa lil materja skura oħra bħalma tagħmel il-materja regolari.

source: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.
reference: Din it-teorija tgħid li l-maġġoranza tal-materja skura madwar galassja tinsab madwar il-galassja f'tip ta' dijadema u hija magħmula minn ħafna partikuli żgħar.

source: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.
reference: Rapporti televiżivi juru duħħan abjad ħiereġ mill-impjant.

source: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.
reference: L-awtoritajiet lokali qed iwissu lir-residenti fil-viċinanza tal-impjant biex jibqgħu ġewwa, jitfu l-kundizzjonaturi tal-arja u ma jixorbux ilma tal-vit.

source: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.
reference: Skont l-aġenzija nukleari tal-Ġappun, iċ-ċesju u l-jodju radjuattivi ġew identifikati fl-impjant.

source: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.
reference: L-awtoritajiet jispekulaw li dan jindika li jista’ jkun li l-kontenituri li fihom fjuwil tal-uranju fis-sit inqasmu u qiegħdin inixxu.

source: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.
reference: Dr Tony Moll skopra t-Tuberkulożi Estremament Reżistenti għall-Mediċina (XDR-TB) fir-reġjun tal-Afrika t’Isfel KwaZulu-Natal.

source: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."
reference: F’intervista, huwa qal li l-varjant il-ġdid kien "inkwetanti u allarmanti ħafna minħabba r-rata għolja ħafna ta’ fatalitajiet."

source: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.
reference: Dr Moll jaħseb li, Xi pazjenti setgħu ħadu l-bug mill-isptar, u mill-inqas tnejn kienu ħaddiema tas-saħħa tal-isptar.

source: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.
reference: Fi żmien sena, persuna infettata tista’ tinfetta 10 sa 15-il kuntatt mill-qrib.

source: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.
reference: Madankollu, il-persentaġġ ta’ XDR-TB fil-grupp kollu tan-nies bit-tuberkulosi għadu jidher li huwa baxx; 6,000 mit-total ta’ 330,000 persuna infettati fi kwalunkwe mument partikolari fl-Afrika t’Isfel.

source: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.
reference: Is-satelliti, li t-tnejn kienu jiżnu aktar minn 1,000 libbra, u li kienu qed jivvjaġġaw bi kważi 17,500 mil fis-siegħa, ħabtu 491 mil 'il fuq mid-dinja.

source: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.
reference: Ix-xjentisti jgħidu li l-isplużjoni kkawżata mill-kolliżjoni kienet kbira.

source: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.
reference: Għadhom qed jippruvaw jiddeterminaw eżattament kemm kienet kbira l-ħabta u kif se taffettwa d-Dinja.

source: The United States Strategic Command of the U.S. Department of Defense office is tracking the debris.
reference: Il-Kmand Strateġiku tal-Istati Uniti tal-uffiċċju tad-Dipartiment tad-Difiża tal-Istati Uniti qed jittraċċa t-tifrik.

source: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.
reference: Ir-riżultat tal-analiżi tal-ipplottjar se jitqiegħed f'sit web pubbliku.

source: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.
reference: Tabiba li kienet taħdem fl-Isptar tat-Tfal ta' Pittsburgh, f'Pennsylvania se tiġi akkużata bi qtil aggravat wara li nhar l-Erbgħa ommha nstabet mejta fil-but tal-karozza tagħha, jgħidu l-awtoritajiet f'Ohio.

source: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.
reference: It-tabib Malar Balasubramanian, ta’ 29 sena, instab ġewwa Blue Ash, Ohio, subborg ta’ madwar 15-il mil fit-tramuntana ta’ Cincinnati mimdud mal-art ħdejn it-triq b’T-shirt u bil-ħwejjeġ ta’ taħt fi stat apparentement taħt medikazzjoni qawwija.

source: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.
reference: Hija ħadet lill-uffiċjali ħdejn l-Oldsmobile Intrigue sewda tagħha li kienet 500 pied ’il bogħod.

source: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.
reference: Hemm, huma sabu l-ġisem ta' Saroja Balasubramanian, ta' 53 sena, mgħotti b'kutri mtebbgħin bid-demm.

source: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.
reference: Il-pulizija qalu li l-katavru deher li kien ilu hemm madwar ġurnata.

source: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.
reference: L-ewwel każijiet tal-marda f’dan l-istaġun ġew irrappurtati fl-aħħar ta’ Lulju.

source: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.
reference: Il-marda tinġarr mill-qżieqeż, li mbagħad temigra fil-bnedmin permezz tan-nemus.

source: The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.
reference: It-tifqigħa wasslet lill-gvern Indjan biex iwettaq miżuri bħall-iskjerament ta' nies li jaqbdu l-ħnieżer fiż-żoni affettwati serjament, it-tqassim ta' eluf ta' purtieri kontra n-nemus u l-bexx tal-pestiċidi.

source: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.
reference: Diversi miljuni ta' kunjetti tat-tilqima kontra l-enċefalite ġew imwiegħda wkoll mill-gvern, li se jgħin fit-tħejjija tal-aġenziji tas-saħħa għas-sena d-dieħla.

source: Plans for vaccines to be delivered to the historically most affected areas this year were delayed due to lack of funds and low prioritisation relative to other diseases.
reference: Il-pjanijiet li t-tilqim jiġu kkonsenjati fl-iktar żoni storikament milquta din is-sena ġew imdewwma minħabba nuqqas ta’ fondi u prijoritizzazzjoni baxxa mqabbla ma' mard ieħor.

source: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.
reference: Fl-1956, Słania mar l-Iżvezja, fejn tliet snin wara beda jaħdem għall-Uffiċċju tal-Posta Żvediż u sar l-inċiżur ewlieni tagħhom.

source: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.
reference: Huwa pproduċa aktar minn 1,000 bolla għall-Iżvezja u 28 pajjiż ieħor.

source: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.
reference: Xogħlu huwa ta' kwalità u dettall tant rikonoxxuti li huwa wieħed mill-veru ftit "ismijiet magħrufin sew" fost il-filatelisti. Xi wħud jispeċjalizzaw fl-ikkollezzjonar tax-xogħol tiegħu biss.

source: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.
reference: L-1,000 bolla tiegħu kienet dik eċċellenti "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" (Għemejjel Kbar magħmulin minn Rejiet Żvediżi) ta’ David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl fis-sena 2000, li hija mniżżla fil-Ktieb tar-Rekords Dinjin Guiness.

source: He was also engaged in engraving banknotes for many countries, recent examples of his work including the Prime Ministerial portraits on the front of the new Canadian $5 and $100 bills.
reference: Kien ukoll involut fit-tnaqqix tal-karti tal-flus għal ħafna pajjiżi, eżempji riċenti tax-xogħol tiegħu jinkludu r-ritratti tal-Prim Ministru fuq in-naħa ta' quddiem tal-karti tal-flus tal-$5 u l-$100 Kanadiżi.

source: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.
reference: Wara li seħħ l-inċident, Gibson kien ittrasportat lejn sptar imma miet ftit wara.

source: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.
reference: Is-sewwieq tat-trakk, li għandu 64 sena, ma weġġax fil-ħabta.

source: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.
reference: Il-vettura nnifisha ttieħdet mill-post tal-inċident bejn wieħed u ieħor f'1200 GMT fl-istess jum.

source: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."
reference: Persuna li taħdem f'garaxx qrib fejn seħħ l-inċident qalet: "Kien hemm tfal qed jistennew biex jaqsmu t-triq u kollha kienu qed iwerżqu u jibku."

source: They all ran back from where the accident had happened.
reference: Huma kollha ġrew lura minn fejn kien seħħ l-inċident.

source: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.
reference: Suġġetti oħra fuq l-aġenda ġewwa Bali jinkludu li jiġu salvati l-foresti li fadal fid-dinja, u l-qsim ta’ teknoloġiji biex jgħinu lin-nazzjonijiet li qed jiżviluppaw jikbru b’modi li jniġġsu inqas.

source: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.
reference: In-N.U. tittama wkoll li tiffinalizza fond biex tgħin lill-pajjiżi affettwati mit-tisħin globali biex ikampaw mal-impatti.

source: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.
reference: Il-flus jistgħu jingħataw għal djar protetti kontra l-għargħar, ġestjoni aħjar tal-ilma, u diversifikazzjoni tal-għelejjel.

source: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.
reference: Fluke kiteb li l-isforzi minn xi wħud biex jimpedixxu lin-nisa milli jitkellmu dwar is-saħħa tan-nisa ma rnexxewx.

source: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.
reference: Hija kkonkludiet hekk minħabba l-ammont kbir ta’ kummenti pożittivi u inkoraġġiment li rċiviet kemm minn nisa kif ukoll minn irġiel li ħeġġew biex il-medikazzjoni kontraċettiva titqies bħala bżonn mediku.

source: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.
reference: Meta il-ġlied waqaf wara li l-midruba ġew ittrasportati għall-isptar, madwar 40 mill-priġunieri l-oħra li kien baqa' baqgħu fil-bitħa u rrifjutaw li jirritornaw fiċ-ċelel tagħhom.

source: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.
reference: In-negozjaturi ppruvaw jirranġaw is-sitwazzjoni, iżda t-talbiet tal-priġunieri mhumiex ċari.

source: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.
reference: Bejn l-10:00 u l-11:00 ta’ bil-lejl MDT, il-ħabsin qabbdu nar fil-bitħa.

source: Soon, officers equipped with riot gear entered the yard and cornered the inmates with tear gas.
reference: Ftit wara, uffiċjali mgħammra b’tagħmir għall-irvellijiet daħlu fil-bitħa u dawwru lill-priġunieri bil-gass tad-dmugħ.

source: Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.
reference: L-ekwipaġġi tas-salvataġġ tan-nirien eventwalment tfew in-nar sal-11:35 ta’ bil-lejl.

source: After the dam was built in 1963, the seasonal floods that would spread sediment throughout the river were halted.
reference: Wara li nbniet id-diga fl-1963 waqaf l-għargħar staġjonali li kien jifrex s-sediment f'kull parti tax-xmara.

source: This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.
reference: Dan is-sediment kien meħtieġ għall-ħolqien ta' sikek tar-ramel u xtut tar-ramel, li servew bħala ħabitats tal-ħlejjaq selvaġġi.

source: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.
reference: Minħabba dan, żewġ speċijiet ta’ ħut saru estinti, u tnejn oħra saru speċi mhedda, inkluża l-humpback chub.

source: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.
reference: Għalkemm il-livell tal-ilma se jogħla biss ftit piedi wara l-għargħar, l-uffiċjali qed jittamaw li dan ikun biżżejjed biex jirrestawra s-sikek tar-ramel li għebu aktar 'l isfel fix-xmara.

source: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.
reference: Ma nħarġet ebda twissija ta’ tsunami, u skont l-aġenzija tal-ġeofiżika ta’ Jakarta, ma hi se toħroġ ebda twissija ta’ tsunami minħabba li t-terremot ma laħaqx ir-rekwiżit tal-kobor ta’ 6.5.

source: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.
reference: Minkejja li m’hemm l-ebda theddida ta’ tsunami, ir-residenti bdew jippanikjaw u jitilqu mill-postijiet tax-xogħol tagħhom u minn djarhom.

source: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.
reference: Għalkemm Winfrey qabżilha d-dmugħ meta tat l-addijo, hija għamlitha ċara mal-ammiraturi tagħha li se tirritorna.

source: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."
reference: "Dan mhux se jkun addijo. Dan huwa l-għeluq ta' kapitolu u l-ftuħ ta' wieħed ġdid."

source: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.
reference: Ir-riżultati finali mill-elezzjonijiet presidenzjali u parlamentari tan-Namibja indikaw li l-president preżenti, Hifikepunye Pohamba, reġa’ ġie elett b’marġni wiesgħa.

source: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.
reference: Il-partit fil-gvern, l-Organizzazzjoni tal-Poplu tal-Afrika tal-Lbiċ (SWAPO), żamm ukoll il-maġġoranza fl-elezzjonijiet parlamentari.

source: Coalition and Afghan troops moved into the area to secure the site and other coalition aircraft have been sent to assist.
reference: It-truppi ta’ koalizzjoni u Afgani marru fiż-żona biex jiżguraw is-sit u ajruplani oħra tal-koalizzjoni ntbagħtu biex jipprovdu assistenza.

source: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.
reference: It-tiġrifa saret fl-għoli fuq art muntanjuża, u huwa maħsub saret minħabba nar ostili.

source: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.
reference: L-isforzi biex jinstab is-sit tal-ħabta qed jiffaċċjaw maltemp u art mhux navigabbli.

source: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.
reference: Il-karità medika Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres u l-Organizzazzjoni Dinjija tas-Saħħa jgħidu li hija l-agħar tifqigħa rreġistrata fil-pajjiż.

source: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.
reference: Il-kelliem għal Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman qal: "L-Angola miexja lejn l-agħar tifqigħa li qatt kellha u s-sitwazzjoni tibqa’ ħażina ħafna fl-Angola," qal.

source: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.
reference: Il-logħob beda fl-10:00 ta’ filgħodu b’temp mill-aqwa u apparti minn ħalba xita f’nofs l-għodwa li għaddiet malajr, kienet ġurnata perfetta għal 7’s rugby.

source: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.
reference: L-Afrika t'Isfel, l-aħjar kompetituri tat-turnament, bdew fuq nota tajba meta kellhom rebħa komda ta' 26 - 00 konta ż-Żambja il-kompetituri fil-5es post.

source: Looking decidedly rusty in the game against their southern sisters, South Africa however steadily improved as the tournament progressed.
reference: Waqt li dehru li deċiżament kienu ilhom ma jilagħbu fil-logħba kontra sħabhom tan-Nofsinhar tagħhom, South Africa l-Afrika madankollu tjiebu b’mod kostanti iktar ma pprogressa l-kampjonat.

source: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.
reference: Id-difiża dixxiplinata tagħhom, il-ħiliet tal-immaniġġjar tal-ballun u x-xogħol eċċellenti fit-tim ġiegħluhom jispikkaw u kien ċar li dan kien it-tim li kellu jiġi megħlub.

source: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.
reference: Uffiċjali għall-belt ta’ Amsterdam u l-Mużew Anne Frank jiddikjaraw li s-siġra hija infettata b’fungus u toħloq periklu għas-saħħa pubblika billi jsostnu li kienet f’periklu imminenti li taqa’.

source: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.
reference: Kienet skedata li tinqata’ nhar it-Tlieta, iżda ġiet salvata wara deċiżjoni tal-qorti ta’ emerġenza.

source: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.
reference: Id-dħulijiet kollha tal-għerien, li ssemmew "Is-Seba' Aħwa Bniet", għandhom dijametru ta' mill-anqas 100 sa 250 metru (328 sa 820 pied).

source: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.
reference: Senjaturi bl-infraaħmar juru li l-varjazzjonijiet fit-temperatura minn matul il-lejl u matul il-jum juru li probabbilment huma għerien.

source: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.
reference: Huma aktar friski mis-superfiċje tal-madwar matul il-jum u aktar sħan bil-lejl.

source: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.
reference: L-imġiba termali tagħhom mhijiex kostanti daqs għerien kbar fid-Dinja li ħafna drabi jżommu temperatura pjuttost kostanti, iżda hija konsistenti ma’ li dawn huma toqob fondi fl-art," qal Glen Cushing tat-Tim tal-Astroġeoloġija tal-Istħarriġ Ġeoloġiku tal-Istati Uniti (USGS) u tal-Università tat-Tramuntana ta’ Arizona li tinsab ġewwa Flagstaff, Arizona.

source: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.
reference: Fi Franza, il-votazzjoni tradizzjonalment kienet esperjenza ta’ teknoloġija baxxa: il-votanti jiżolaw lilhom infushom f’kabina u jpoġġu folja ta’ karta stampata minn qabel li tindika l-kandidat tal-għażla tagħhom f’envelop.

source: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.
reference: Wara li l-uffiċjali jivverifikaw l-identità tal-votant, il-votant jixħet l-envelop fil-kaxxa tal-voti u jiffirma l-lista tal-ismijiet tal-votanti.

source: French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.
reference: Il-liġi elettorali Franċiża tikkodifika l-proċeduri b’mod pjuttost strett.

source: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.
reference: Sa mill-1988, il-kaxxi tal-vot iridu jkunu trasparenti sabiex il-votanti u l-osservaturi jkunu jistgħu jaraw li l-ebda envelops ma huma preżenti fil-bidu tal-vot u li l-ebda envelops ma jiġu miżjuda ħlief dawk tal-votanti magħduda u awtorizzati kif xieraq.

source: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.
reference: Il-kandidati jistgħu jibagħtu rappreżentanti biex jixhdu kull parti tal-proċess. Filgħaxija, il-voti jingħaddu minn voluntiera taħt sorveljanza qawwija, skont proċeduri speċifiċi.

source: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.
reference: ASUS Eee PC, imniedi qabel fid-dinja kolha għal fatturi ta’ ffrankar tal-ispejjeż u ta’ funzjonalità, sar suġġett jaħraq fix-Xahar tal-IT ta’ Taipei fl-2007.

source: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.
reference: Iżda s-suq tal-konsumaturi tal-laptops se jkun varjat u mibdul radikalment wara li fl-2007 ASUS ingħatat it-“Taiwan Sustainable Award” (il-Premju Sostenibbli tat-Taiwan) mill-Eżekuttiv Yuan tar-Repubblika taċ-Ċina.

source: The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"
reference: Is-sit web tal-istazzjon jiddeskrivi l-ispettaklu bħala "teatru tar-radju ta' stil qadim bi spin ġdida u eċċessivament ossessiva!"

source: In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.
reference: Meta beda, il-programm kien jidher biss fuq is-sit tar-radju fuq l-internet stabbilit TogiNet Radio, sit li jiffoka fuq “radju tad-diskors”.

source: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.
reference: Fi tmiem l-2015, TogiNet stabbilixxa AstroNet Radio bħala stazzjon sussidjarju.

source: The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.
reference: L-ispettaklu oriġinarjament kien fih atturi tal-vuċi dilettanti, lokali għal Texas tal-Lvant.

source: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.
reference: Kien hemm rapporti ta' sakkeġġi li komplew matul il-lejl f'ħafna postijiet, minħabba li l-uffiċjali tal-infurzar tal-liġi ma kienux preżenti fit-toroq ta' Bishkek.

source: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.
reference: Bishkek ġiet deskritta bħala li waqgħet fi stat ta’ "anarkija" minn osservatur wieħed, hekk kif gruppi ta’ nies bdew jimirħu fit-toroq u jisirqu ħwienet ta’ oġġetti tal-konsumatur.

source: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.
reference: Diversi residenti ta’ Bishkek waħħlu fid-dimostranti min-Nofsinhar għall-illegalità.

source: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.
reference: L-Afrika t’Isfel rebħu lill-All Blacks (New Zealand) f’logħba tat-Tri Nations tal-unjoni tar-rugby fir-Royal Bafokeng Stadium ġewwa Rustenburg, l-Afrika t’Isfel.

source: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.
reference: Il-punteġġ finali kien rebħa ta’ punt wieħed, 21 għal 20, li temm il-15-il sensiela ta’ rebħiet ta’ logħob tal-All Blacks.

source: For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.
reference: Għall-iSpringboks, dan temm sensiela ta’ telf ta’ ħames logħbiet.

source: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.
reference: Kienet l-aħħar partita għall-“All Blacks”, li kienu diġà rebħu t-trofew ġimagħtejn ilu.

source: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.
reference: Il-logħba finali tas-serje se ssir ġewwa Ellis Park f’Johannesburg il-ġimgħa d-dieħla, meta Springboks jilagħbu l-Awstralja.

source: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.
reference: Terremot moderat nhar it-Tnejn għeżżeż lill-Punent ta' Montana fl-10:08 ta' filgħaxija.

source: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.
reference: Ma ġie rċevut ebda rapport immedjat ta’ ħsara mill-Istħarriġ Ġeoloġiku tal-Istati Uniti (USGS - United States Geological Survey) u ċ-Ċentru Nazzjonali ta’ Informazzjoni dwar it-Terremoti (“National Earthquake Information Center”) tagħha.

source: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.
reference: It-terremot kien iċċentrat madwar 20 km (15-il mil) fit-Tramuntana-Grigal ta’ Dillon, u madwar 65 km (40 mil) fin-Nofsinhar ta’ Butte.

source: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.
reference: Ir-razza tal-influwenza tat-tjur li hija letali għall-bnedmin, l-H5N1, ġiet ikkonfermata li infettat papra selvaġġa mejta, li nstabet nhar it-Tnejn, f'art mistagħdra qrib Lyon fil-Lvant ta' Franza.

source: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.
reference: Franza hija s-seba’ pajjiż fl-Unjoni Ewropea li sofra minn dan il-virus; wara l-Awstrija, il-Ġermanja, is-Slovenja, il-Bulgarija, il-Greċja u l-Italja.

source: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.
reference: Każijiet b'suspett ta’ H5N1 fil-Kroazja u d-Danimarka għadhom mhumiex ikkonfermati.

source: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."
reference: Chambers kien ħarrek lil Alla għall-"imwiet mifruxa madwar id-dinja, il-qerda u t-terrorizzazzjoni ta’ miljuni u miljuni ta’ abitanti tad-Dinja."

source: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."
reference: Chambers, agnostiku, jargumenta li l-kawża tiegħu hija "frivola" u "kwalunkwe persuna tista’ tħarrek lil ħaddieħor."

source: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."
reference: L-istorja ppreżentata fl-opra Franċiża, minn Camille Saint-Saens, hija ta' artist "li ħajtu hija kkontrollata mill-imħabba għad-drogi u l-Ġappun."

source: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.
reference: B'riżultat ta' dan, l-artisti jpejpu joints tal-kannabis fuq il-palk, u t-teatru stess jinkoraġixxi lill-udjenza biex jagħmlu bħalhom.

source: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.
reference: L-Eks Speaker tal-Kamra Newt Gingrich, il-gvernatur ta’ Texas Rick Perry, u l-Membru tal-Kungress Michele Bachmann spiċċaw fir-raba’, il-ħames u s-sitt post, rispettivament.

source: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.
reference: Wara li daħlu r-riżultati, Gingrich faħħar li Santorum, imma kellu kliem iebes kontra Romney, li f'ismu kienu ġew mxandra riklami negattivi tal-kampanja f'Iowa kontra Gingrich.

source: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.
reference: Perry iddikjara "se nirritorna lejn Texas biex nevalwa r-riżultati tal-kawkażu ta' llejla, niddetermina jekk hemmx triq ’il quddiem għalija nnifsi f’din it-tellieqa", iżda wara qal li hu se jibqa' fit-tellieqa u jikkompeti fil-primarja tal-21 ta’ Jannar ġewwa South Carolina.

source: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.
reference: Bachmann, li rebħet il-Votazzjoni Ames Straw f’Awwissu, iddeċidiet li ttemm il-kampanja tagħha.

source: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.
reference: Il-fotografu kien ittrasportat għaċ-Ċentru Mediku Ronald Reagan tal-UCLA, fejn sussegwentement miet.

source: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."
reference: Huwa rrappurtat li kellu 20 sena magħluqa. F'dikjarazzjoni, Bieber qal "[g]ħalkemm ma kontx preżenti u lanqas kont involut direttament f'dan l-inċident traġiku, il-ħsibijiet u t-talb tiegħi huma mal-familja tal-vittma."

source: Entertainment news website TMZ understands the photographer stopped his vehicle on the other side of Sepulveda Boulevard and attempted to take pictures of the police stop before crossing the road and continuing, prompting the California Highway Patrol police officer conducting the traffic stop to order him back across, twice.
reference: Is-sit web tal-aħbarijiet tad-divertiment TMZ jifhem li l-fotografu waqqaf il-vettura tiegħu fuq in-naħa l-oħra ta’ Sepulveda Boulevard u pprova jieħu ritratti tal-waqfa tal-pulizija qabel jaqsam it-triq u jkompli, u dan wassal biex l-uffiċjal tal-pulizija tal-California Highway Patrol li jmexxi t-traffiku jieqaf u jordnalu jmur lura, darbtejn.

source: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.
reference: Skont il-pulizija, ix-xufier tal-vettura li tajjar lill-fotografu mhux mistenni jiffaċċja akkużi kriminali.

source: With only eighteen medals available a day, a number of countries have failed to make the medal podium.
reference: Bi tmintax-il midalja biss disponibbli kuljum, numru ta' pajjiżi ma rnexxilhomx jaslu sal-podju tal-midalji.

source: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.
reference: Huma jinkludu l-Olanda, b'Anna Jochemsen tispiċċa d-disa' fil-klassi weqfin tan-nisa fis-Super-G lbieraħ, u l-Finlandja b'Katja Saarinen tispiċċa l-għaxar waħda fl-istess avveniment.

source: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.
reference: L-Awstraljan Mitchell Gourley spiċċa fil-ħdax-il post tas-Super-G tal-irġiel. Il-kompetitur Ċek Oldrich Jelinek spiċċa fis-sittax-il post fis-seduta Super-G tal-irġiel.

source: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.
reference: Arly Velasquez tal-Messiku spiċċa fil-ħmistax-il post fis-Super-G bilqiegħda tal-irġiel. Adam Hall tan-New Zealand spiċċa fid-disa’ post tas-Super-G bil-wieqfa tal-irġiel.

source: Poland's men's visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the Super-G. South Korea's Jong Seork Park finished twenty-fourth in the men's sitting Super-G.
reference: L-iskijatur tal-irġiel tal-Polinja b’insuffiċjenza fil-vista Maciej Krezel u l-gwida Anna Ogarzynska spiċċaw fit-tlettax-il post fis-Super-G. Jong Seork Park tal-Korea t’Isfel spiċċa fl-erbgħa u għoxrin post fis-Super-G bilqiegħda tal-irġiel.

source: UN peacekeepers, whom arrived in Haiti after the 2010 earthquake, are being blamed for the spread of the disease which started near the troop's encampment.
reference: Il-forżi taż-żamma tal-paċi tan-NU, li waslu f'Ħaiti wara t-terremot tal-2010, qed jiġu akkużati bit-tixrid tal-marda li bdiet qrib fejn kienu kkampjati t-truppi.

source: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.
reference: Skont il-kawża, l-iskart mill-kamp tan-NU ma kienx issanitizzat sewwa, u dan ikkawża li l-batterji jidħlu fit-tributarja tax-Xmara Artibonite, waħda mill-akbar ta' Ħaiti.

source: Prior to the arrival of troops, Haiti had not encountered problems related to the disease since the 1800s.
reference: Qabel il-wasla tat-truppi, il-Haiti ma kienx iltaqa’ ma’ problemi relatati mal-marda sa mis-snin 1800.

source: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.
reference: L-Istitut ta’ Ħaiti għall-Ġustizzja u d-Demokrazija rrefera għal studji indipendenti li jissuġġerixxu li l-battaljun għaż-żamma tal-paċi tan-NU tan-Nepal, b’mod mhux intenzjonat, ħa l-marda f’Ħaiti.

source: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.
reference: Danielle Lantagne, esperta tan-NU dwar il-marda, qalet li t-tifqigħa kienet probabbilment ikkawżata mill-gwardjani tal-paċi.

source: Hamilton confirmed Howard University Hospital admitted the patient in stable condition.
reference: Hamilton ikkonferma li meta ddaħħal fl-Isptar ta’ Howard University il-pazjent kien f’kundizzjoni stabbli.

source: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.
reference: Il-pazjent kien mar in-Niġerja, fejn kienu seħħew xi każijiet tal-virus tal-Ebola.

source: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.
reference: L-isptar segwa protokoll biex jikkontrolla l-infezzjonijiet, inkluża s-separazzjoni tal-pazjent minn nies oħra biex tiġi evitata infezzjoni possibbli ta’ ħaddieħor.

source: Before The Simpsons Simon had worked on several shows in various positions.
reference: Qabel “The Simpsons” Simon ħadem fuq diversi programmi f’pożizzjonijiet varji.

source: During the 1980s he worked on shows such as Taxi, Cheers, and The Tracy Ullman Show.
reference: Matul is-snin 80 huwa ħadem fuq shows bħal Taxi, Cheers, u The Tracy Ullman Show.

source: In 1989 he helped create The Simpsons with Brooks and Groening, and was responsible for hiring the show's first writing team.
reference: Fl-1989, huwa assista biex jikkrea “The Simpsons” ma’ Brooks u Groening, u kien responsabbli għall-għażla tal-ewwel tim li kiteb il-programm.

source: Despite leaving the show in 1993 he kept the title of executive producer, and continued to receive tens of millions of dollars every season in royalties.
reference: Minkejja li telaq mill-programm fl-1993 huwa żamm it-titlu ta’ produttur eżekuttiv, u kompla jirċievi għexieren ta’ miljuni ta’ dollari għal kull staġun bħala royalties.

source: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.
reference: Aktar kmieni, l-aġenzija tal-aħbarijiet Ċiniża Xinhua rrappurtat li ġie maħtuf ajruplan.

source: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.
reference: Rapporti aktar tard imbagħad iddikjaraw li l-ajruplan irċieva theddida ta’ bomba u ġie ddevjat lura lejn l-Afganistan, fejn niżel f’Kandahar.

source: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.
reference: Ir-rapporti bikrija jgħidu li l-ajruplan ġie ddevjat lura lejn l-Afganistan wara li ġie miċħud li jagħmel inżul ta’ emerġenza f’Urümqi.

source: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.
reference: L-inċidenti tal-ajru huma komuni fl-Iran, li għandu flotta li qed tiqdim u li hija miżmuma ħażin ħafna kemm għall-operazzjonijiet ċivili kif ukoll dawk militari.

source: International sanctions have meant that new aircraft cannot be purchased.
reference: Minħabba sanzjonijiet internazzjonali ma setgħux jinxtraw ajruplani ġodda.

source: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.
reference: Aktar kmieni din il-ġimgħa, iġġarraf ħelikopter tal-pulizija li qatel tliet persuni u darab tlieta oħra.

source: Last month Iran saw its worst air disaster in years when an airliner heading to Armenia crashed, killing the 168 on board.
reference: Ix-xahar li għadda l-Iran kellhom l-agħar diżastru tal-ajru fl-aħħar snin meta ajruplan li kien sejjer lejn l-Armenja ġġarraf u qatel l-168 persuna abbord.

source: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.
reference: Fl-istess xahar, ajruplan ieħor qabeż ir-runway ġewwa Mashhad, daħal ġo ħajt, u qatel sbatax-il persuna.

source: Aerosmith have cancelled their remaining concerts on their tour.
reference: Aerosmith ikkanċellaw il-kunċerti tagħhom li kien fadal fit-tour tagħhom.

source: The rock band was due to tour the United States and Canada until September 16.
reference: Il-grupp tar-rock kien mistenni jdur l-Istati Uniti u l-Kanada sas-16 ta' Settembru.

source: They have cancelled the tour after lead singer Steven Tyler was injured after he fell off stage while performing on August 5.
reference: Huma kkanċellaw it-tour wara li l-kantant ewlieni Steven Tyler weġġa' wara li waqa' minn fuq il-palk meta kien qed idoqq fil-5 ta' Awwissu.

source: Murray lost the first set in a tie break after both men held each and every serve in the set.
reference: Murray tilef l-ewwel sett f’tie break (mezz biex jiġi deċiż rebbieħ wara li ġew ras imb’ras) wara li ż-żewġ irġiel żammew kull serve fis-sett.

source: Del Potro had the early advantage in the second set, but this too required a tie break after reaching 6-6.
reference: Del Potro kellu l-vantaġġ bikri fit-tieni set, iżda dan ukoll kien jeħtieġ “tie break” wara li laħaq 6-6.

source: Potro received treatment to his shoulder at this point but managed to return to the game.
reference: Potro rċieva trattament fi spallejh f’dan il-punt imma rnexxielu jirritorna fil-logħba.

source: The program started at 8:30 p.m. local time (15.00 UTC).
reference: Il-programm beda fit-8:30 ta' filgħaxija ħin lokali (15:00 UTC).

source: Famous singers across the country presented bhajans, or devotional songs, to Shri Shyam's feet.
reference: Kantanti famużi minn madwar il-pajjiż kollu ppreżentaw “bhajans”, jew kanzunetti devozzjonali, ma’ saqajn Shri Shyam.

source: Singer Sanju Sharma started the evening, followed by Jai Shankar Choudhary. esented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.
reference: Il-kantant Sanju Sharma beda s-serata, segwit minn Jai Shankar Choudhary. Ippreżenta lil chhappan bhog bhajan ukoll. Il-kantant, Raju Khandelwal kien qed jakkumpanjah.

source: Then, Lakkha Singh took the lead in singing the bhajans.
reference: Imbagħad, Lakkha Singh ħa r-rwol ewlieni fil-kant tal-bhajans.

source: 108 plates of Chhappan Bhog (in Hinduism, 56 different edible items, like, sweets, fruits, nuts, dishes etc. which are offered to deity) were served to Baba Shyam.
reference: 108 dixxijiet ta' Chhappan Bhog (fil-Ħinduiżmu, 56 affarijiet li jittieklu differenti, bħal ħelu, frott, ġewż, ikel imsajjar, eċċ. li huma offruti lil alla) ġew servuti lil Baba Shyam.

source: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.
reference: Lakkha Singh ippreżenta lil chhappan bhog bhajan ukoll. Il-kantant, Raju Khandelwal kien qed jakkumpanjah.

source: At Thursday's keynote presentation of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata unveiled the controller design for the company's new Nintendo Revolution console.
reference: Fil-preżentazzjoni ewlenija tal-Ħamis tat-“Tokyo Game Show”, il-president tan-Nintendo Satoru Iwata żvela d-disinn tal-kontrollur għall-console Nintendo Revolution il-ġdid tal-kumpanija.

source: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.
reference: Simili għal remowt tat-televiżjoni, il-kontrollur juża żewġ sensers imqiegħda ħdejn it-televiżjoni tal-utent biex jittrijangula l-pożizzjoni tiegħu fi spazju tridimensjonali.

source: This will allow players to control actions and movements in video games by moving the device through the air.
reference: Dan se jippermetti lill-plejers li jikkontrollaw l-azzjonijiet u l-movimenti fil-logħbiet vidjow billi jċaqalqu l-apparat fl-arja.

source: Giancarlo Fisichella lost control of his car and ended the race very soon after the start.
reference: Giancarlo Fisichella tilef il-kontroll tal-karozza tiegħu u temm it-tellieqa ftit wara li bdiet.

source: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.
reference: Is-sieħeb tiegħu fit-tim Fernando Alonso kien fuq quddiem fil-biċċa l-kbira tat-tellieqa, iżda spiċċaha eżatt wara l-pit-stop tiegħu, probabbilment minħabba li kellu r-rota ta’ quddiem tal-lemin imdaħħla ħażin.

source: Michael Schumacher ended his race not long after Alonso, because of the suspension damage in the numerous battles during the race.
reference: Michael Schumacher temm it-tellieqa tiegħu ftit wara Alonso, minħabba danni fis-sospensjoni minħabba l-bosta battalji tul it-tellieqa.

source: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.
reference: Hi ħelwa ħafna u tkanta pjuttost tajjeb ukoll," qal skont traskrizzjoni tal-konferenza tal-aħbarijiet.

source: "I was moved every time we did a rehearsal on this, from the bottom of my heart."
reference: "Kull darba li għamilna l-provi ta’ din, ġejt emozzjonat, b’qalbi kollha."

source: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.
reference: Madwar 3 minuti wara t-tnedija, kamera abbord uriet ħafna biċċiet ta’ fowm iżolanti jinqalgħu minn mat-tank tal-fjuwil.

source: However, they are not thought to have caused any damage to the shuttle.
reference: Madankollu, mhumiex maħsuba li kkawżaw xi ħsara fix-shuttle.

source: NASA's shuttle program chief N. Wayne Hale Jr. said the foam had fallen "after the time we are concerned about."
reference: Il-kap tal-programm tax-shuttle tan-NASA N. Wayne Hale Jr qal li r-ragħwa waqgħet "wara l-ħin li ninsabu mħassbin dwaru."

source: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.
reference: Ħames minuti wara l-bidu tal-wirja jibda jqum ir-riħ, madwar minuta wara, ir-riħ qed jilħaq 70km/siegħa... imbagħad tibda nieżla x-xita, imma tant qawwija u bi qtar kbar li tniggiżlek il-ġilda bħal labra, imbagħad beda nieżel is-silġ, in-nies bdew jippanikjaw u jwerżqu u jiġru fuq xulxin.

source: I lost my sister and her friend, and on my way there were two disabled people in wheelchairs, people just jumping over and pushing them," Armand Versace said.
reference: Tlift lil oħti u lill-ħabib tagħha, u fi triqti kien hemm żewġ persuni b’diżabilità f’siġġijiet tar-roti, in-nies jaqbżu minn fuqhom u jimbuttawhom," qal Armand Versace.

source: NHK also reported that the Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear power plant in Niigata prefecture was operating normally.
reference: NHK irrapporta wkoll li l-impjant nukleari ta’ Kashiwazaki Kariwa fil-prefettura ta’ Niigata kien qed jaħdem normali.

source: Hokuriku Electric Power Co. reported no effects from the earthquake and that the Number 1 and 2 reactors at its Shika nuclear power plant were shut down.
reference: Hokuriku Electric Power Co. Irrapportat li ma kienx hemm effetti kkważati mit-terremot u li r-reatturi Numru 1 u 2 fl-impjant nukleari tagħha ta’ Shika ngħalqu.

source: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.
reference: Huwa rrappurtat li madwar 9400 dar fir-reġjun m’għandhomx ilma u madwar 100 m’għandhomx elettriku.

source: Some roads have been damaged, railway service interrupted in the affected areas, and the Noto Airport in Ishikawa prefecture remains closed.
reference: Xi toroq saritilhom il-ħsara, is-servizz ferrovjarju ġie interrott fiż-żoni milquta, u l-Ajruport ta’ Noto fil-prefettura ta’ Ishikawa għadu magħluq.

source: One bomb exploded outside the governor general's office.
reference: Bomba waħda splodiet quddiem l-uffiċċju tal-gvernatur ġenerali.

source: Three more bombs exploded near government buildings in a period of two hours.
reference: Tliet bombi oħra splodew qrib bini tal-gvern f'perjodu ta' sagħtejn.

source: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.
reference: Xi rapporti prrovdew li n-numru uffiċjali tal-imwiet huma tmienja, u rapporti uffiċjali jikkonfermaw li kien hemm sa 30 midruba; iżda n-numri finali għadhom mhumiex magħrufin.

source: Both cyanuric acid and melamine were found in urine samples from pets that died after consuming contaminated pet food.
reference: Kemm l-aċidu ċjanuriku kif ukoll il-melamina nstabu f’kampjuni tal-awrina ta’ annimali domestiċi li mietu wara li kkonsmaw ikel għall-annimali domestiċi li kien ikkontaminat.

source: The two compounds react with one another to form crystals that may block kidney function, researchers at the university said.
reference: Iż-żewġ komposti jirreaġixxu ma' xulxin biex jiffurmaw kristalli li jistgħu jimblukkaw il-funzjoni tal-kliewi, qalu r-riċerkaturi fl-università.

source: The researchers observed crystals formed in cat urine by the addition of melamine and cyanuric acid.
reference: Ir-riċerkaturi osservaw li ffurmaw kristalli fl-urina tal-qtates biż-żieda tal-melamina u l-aċidu ċjanuriku.

source: The composition of these crystals matches those found in the urine of affected pets when compared by infrared spectroscopy (FTIR).
reference: Il-kompożizzjoni ta’ dawn il-kristalli taqbel ma’ dawk misjuba fl-awrina ta’ annimali domestiċi affettwati meta mqabbla permezz ta’ spettroskopija infraaħmar (FTIR).

source: I don't know if you realize it or not, but most of the goods from Central America came into this country duty-free.
reference: Ma nafx jekk tirrealizzax jew le, imma ħafna mill-oġġetti mill-Amerika Ċentrali daħlu f’dan il-pajjiż mingħajr dazju.

source: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.
reference: Madankollu, tmenin fil-mija tal-merkanzija tagħna kienu ntaxxati permezz ta' tariffi fil-pajjiżi tal-Amerika Ċentrali. Aħna ngħinukom.

source: That didn't seem to make sense to me; it certainly wasn't fair.
reference: Dan ma dehrlix li kien jagħmel sens; ċertament ma kienx ġust.

source: All I say to people is you treat us the way we treat you.
reference: Ngħid biss lin-nies li intom tittrattawna kif aħna nittrattaw lilkom.

source: California Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger signed into law a bill that bans the sale or rental of violent video games to minors.
reference: Il-Gvernatur ta’ California Arnold Schwarzenegger iffirma abbozz fil-liġi li jipprojbixxi l-bejgħ jew il-kiri ta’ logħob tal-kompjuter vjolenti lil minuri.

source: The bill requires violent video games sold in the state of California to be labeled with a decal reading "18" and makes their sale to a minor punishable by a fine of $1000 per offense.
reference: L-abbozz jirrikjedi li vidjowgejms vjolenti mibjugħa fl-istat ta’ Kalifornja jiġu ttikkettati b’dekalkomanija li fuqha jkollha "18" u jagħmel il-bejgħ tagħhom lil minuri kkastigat b’multa ta’ $1000 għal kull reat.

source: The Director of Public Prosecutions, Kier Starmer QC, gave a statement this morning announcing the prosecution of both Huhne and Pryce.
reference: Id-Direttur tal-Prosekuzzjonijiet Pubbliċi, Kier Starmer QC, għamel dikjarazzjoni dalgħodu fejn ħabbar il-prosekuzzjoni kemm ta’ Huhne kif ukoll ta’ Pryce.

source: Huhne has resigned and he will be replaced in the Cabinet by Ed Davey MP. Norman Lamb MP is expected to take the Business Minister job Davey is vacating.
reference: Huhne rriżenja u se jiġi sostitwit fil-Kabinett minn Ed Davey MP. Norman Lamb MP huwa mistenni li jieħu l-impjieg tal-Ministru għan-Negozju li se jitlaq minnu Davey.

source: Huhne and Pryce are scheduled to appear at the Westminster Magistrates Court on February 16.
reference: Huhne u Pryce huma skedati li jidhru fil-Qorti tal-Maġistrati ta’ Westminster fis-16 ta’ Frar.

source: The fatalities were Nicholas Alden, 25, and Zachary Cuddeback, 21. Cuddeback had been the driver.
reference: Dawk li mietu kienu Nicholas Alden ta’ 25 sena u Zachary Cuddeback ta’ 21 sena. Cuddeback kien is-sewwieq.

source: Edgar Veguilla received arm and jaw wounds while Kristoffer Schneider was left requiring reconstructive surgery for his face.
reference: Edgar Veguilla spiċċa b’feriti fuq driegħu u x-xedaq filwaqt li Kristoffer Schneider kien jeħtieġ operazzjoni rikostruttiva f’wiċċu.
