reference: Matul it-tempesti qawwija tas-silġ, f’temp qasir tista’ tinżel biżżejjed borra biex inti teħel.

source: Visibility may also be restricted by falling or blowing snow or by condensation or ice on vehicle windows.
reference: Il-viżibilità tista' tkun restritta wkoll bil-borra nieżla jew ittir jew bil-kondensazzjoni jew is-silġ fuq it-twieqi tal-vetturi.

source: On the other hand, icy and snowy conditions are normal in many countries, and traffic goes on mostly uninterrupted all year round.
reference: Min-naħa l-oħra, il-kundizzjonijiet tas-silġ u tal-borra huma normali f’ħafna pajjiżi, u t-traffiku jibqa’ għaddej fil-biċċa l-kbira mingħajr interruzzjonijiet is-sena kollha.

source: Safaris are perhaps the greatest tourism draw in Africa and the highlight for many visitors.
reference: Is-safaris huma forsi l-ikbar attrazzjoni turistika fl-Afrika u l-punt ewlieni ta’ ħafna viżitaturi.

source: The term safari in popular use refers to overland travel to view the stunning African wildlife, particularly on savanna.
reference: It-terminu safari fl-użu popolari jirreferi għall-ivvjaġġar fuq l-art għall-osservazzjoni tal-annimali selvaġġi u meraviljużi Afrikani, partikularment fis-savana.

source: Some animals, such as elephants and giraffes, tend to approach closely to cars and standard equipment will allow good viewing.
reference: Xi annimali, bħall-iljunfanti u l-ġiraffi, għandhom tendenza li jersqu lejn il-karozzi u qrib tagħmir standard li jippermetti veduti tajbin.

source: Lions, cheetahs and leopards are sometimes shy and you will see them better with binoculars.
reference: L-iljuni, iċ-ċitas u l-leopardi kultant huma mgerrxin u tarahom aħjar bil-binokli.

source: A walking safari (also called a "bush walk", "hiking safari", or going "footing") consists of hiking, either for a few hours or several days.
reference: Safari bil-mixi (imsejjaħ ukoll "mixja fil-“bush” (“bush walk”)", "safari fuq hike (“hiking safari”)", jew “going "footing"”) jikkonsisti f’hike, jew għal ftit sigħat jew diversi jiem.

source: The Paralympics will take place from 24 August to 5 September 2021. Some events will be held in other locations throughout Japan.
reference: Il-Paralimpiks se jsiru mill-24 ta' Awwissu sal-5 ta' Settembru tal-2021. Xi avvenimenti se jiġu organizzati ġewwa postijiet oħra fil-Ġappun.

source: Tokyo will be the only Asian city to have hosted two summer Olympics, having hosted the games in 1964.
reference: Tokyo se tkun l-unika belt Asjatika li ospitat żewġ Olimpijadi tas-sajf, peress li diġà ospitat il-logħbiet fl-1964.

source: If you booked your flights and accommodation for 2020 before the postponement was announced, you may have a tricky situation.
reference: Jekk ipprenotajt it-titjiriet u l-akkomodazzjoni tiegħek għall-2020 qabel ma tħabbar il-posponiment, jista’ jkollok sitwazzjoni kumplikata.

source: Cancellation policies vary, but as of late March most coronavirus-based cancellation policies don't extend to July 2020, when the Olympics had been scheduled.
reference: Il-politiki ta’ kanċellazzjoni jvarjaw, iżda mill-aħħar ta’ Marzu ħafna mill-politiki ta’ kanċellazzjoni bbażati fuq il-koronavirus ma jestendux sa Lulju 2020, meta kien ġew skedati l-Olimpjadi.

source: It's expected that most event tickets will cost between ¥2,500 and ¥130,000, with typical tickets costing around ¥7,000.
reference: Huwa mistenni li l-biċċa l-kbira tal-biljetti tal-avvenimenti jiswew bejn ¥2,500 u ¥130,000, u biljetti tipiċi jiswew madwar ¥7,000.

source: Ironing damp clothes can help them dry. Many hotels have an iron and ironing board available for loan, even if one is not present in the room.
reference: Il-mogħdija fuq ħwejjeġ niedja tista’ tgħinhom jinxfu. Bosta lukandi għandhom ħadida tal-mogħdija u bord biex tgħaddi fuqha disponibbli biex tużahom, anke jekk ma jkollokx waħda fil-kamra.

source: If an iron isn't available, or if you don't fancy wearing ironed socks, then you can try using a hairdryer, if available.
reference: Jekk ma tkunx disponibbli ħadida tal-mogħdija, jew jekk ma tridx tilbes kalzetti mgħoddija, tista’ tipprova tuża hair dryer, jekk tkun disponibbli.

source: Be careful not to allow fabric to become too hot (which can cause shrinkage, or in extreme cases, scorch).
reference: Attent li ma tħallix id-drapp jiġi jaħraq wisq (li jista’ jikkawża li dan jixxrinkja, jew f’każijiet estremi, jinħaraq).

source: There are different ways of purifying water, some more effective against specific threats.
reference: Hemm diversi modi kif tippurifika l-ilma, ftit minnhom iktar effettivi kontra theddidiet speċifiċi.

source: In some areas boiling water for a minute is enough, in others several minutes are needed.
reference: F’xi żoni, jekk tgħalli l-ilma għal minuta huwa biżżejjed, f’oħrajn hemm bżonn ta’ diversi minuti.

source: Filters vary in effectiveness, and should you have a concern, then you should consider buying your water in a sealed bottle from a reputable company.
reference: Il-filtri jvarjaw fl-effettività tagħhom, u jekk ikollok xi tħassib, għandek tikkunsidra li tixtri l-ilma tiegħek fi fliexken issiġillati minn kumpanija li jkollha isem tajjeb.

source: Travellers may encounter animal pests that they are not familiar with in their home regions.
reference: Il-vjaġġaturi jistgħu jiltaqgħu ma' annimali skifużi li huma mhumiex familjari magħhom fir-reġjuni fejn joqogħdu.

source: Pests can spoil food, cause irritation, or in a worse case cause allergic reactions, spread venom, or transmit infections.
reference: Il-pesti jistgħu jirrovinaw l-ikel, jikkawżaw irritazzjoni, jew f’każ agħar jikkawżaw reazzjonijiet allerġiċi, jagħtu velenu, jew jittrażmettu infezzjonijiet.

source: Infectious diseases themselves, or dangerous animals that can injure or kill people by force, do not usually qualify as pests.
reference: Il-mard infettiv stess, jew l-annimali perikolużi li jistgħu jweġġgħu jew joqtlu nies bil-forza, ġeneralment ma jikkwalifikawx bħala pesti.

source: Duty free shopping is the opportunity to buy goods exempted from taxes and excises at certain locations.
reference: Ix-xiri mingħajr dazju huwa l-opportunità li tixtri oġġetti eżentati mit-taxxi u s-sisa f’ċerti postijiet.

source: Travellers bound for countries with heavy taxation can sometimes save a considerable amount of money, especially on products such as alcoholic beverages and tobacco.
reference: Il-vjaġġaturi li sejrin pajjiżi b'tassazzjoni qawwija jistgħu xi kultant jiffrankaw ammont konsiderevoli ta' flus, speċjalment fuq prodotti bħax-xorb alkoħoliku u t-tabakk.

source: The stretch between Point Marion and Fairmont presents the most challenging driving conditions on the Buffalo-Pittsburgh Highway, passing frequently through isolated backwoods terrain.
reference: It-triq bejn Point Marion u Fairmont tippreżenta l-aktar kundizzjonijiet diffiċli tas-sewqan fuq l-Awtostrada Buffalo-Pittsburgh, għax tgħaddi ta' spiss minn wesgħat iżolati ta' backwoods.

source: If you're not used to driving on country roads, keep your wits about you: steep grades, narrow lanes, and sharp curves predominate.
reference: Jekk m’intix imdorri ssuq fit-toroq tal-kampanja, oqgħod attent: hemm predominanza ta' għoljiet weqfin, korsiji dojoq u tidwir qawwi.

source: Posted speed limits are noticeably lower than in previous and subsequent sections — commonly 35-40 mph (56-64 km/h) — and strict obedience to them is even more important than otherwise.
reference: Il-limiti tal-veloċità massimi huma notevolment iktar baxxi milli fis-sezzjonijiet preċedenti u sussegwenti — komunement 35-40 mph (56-64 km/siegħa) — u l-ubbidjenza stretta tagħhom hija saħansitra iktar importanti milli mod ieħor.

source: Curiously, though, mobile phone service is much stronger here than along many other stretches of the route, e.g. the Pennsylvania Wilds.
reference: Madankollu, b'mod kurjuż, is-servizz tal-mowbajl huwa ħafna iktar qawwi hawn milli f’ħafna partijiet oħra tar-rotta, eż. il-Pennsylvania Wilds.

source: German pastries are quite good, and in Bavaria, are quite rich and varied, similar to those of their southern neighbor, Austria.
reference: Il-pasti Ġermaniżi huma pjuttost tajbin, u fil-Bavarja, huma rikki u varjati, simili għal dawk tal-ġar tan-Nofsinhar tagħhom, l-Awstrija.

source: Fruit pastries are common, with apples cooked into pastries year round, and cherries and plums making their appearances during the summer.
reference: Il-pasti tal-frott huma komuni, u t-tuffieħ imsajjar jintuża fil-pasti s-sena kollha, u ċ-ċiras u l-għanbaqar jibdew fis-sajf.

source: Many German baked goods also feature almonds, hazelnuts, and other tree nuts. Popular cakes often pair particularly well with a cup of strong coffee.
reference: Ħafna pasti Ġermaniżi fihom ukoll lewż, ġellewż, u ġewż ta' siġar oħrajn. Il-kejkijiet magħrufin spiss imorru sew ħafna ma’ kikkra kafè b'saħħtu.

source: If you want some small though rich pastries, try what depending on region are called Berliner, Pfannkuchen or Krapfen.
reference: Jekk trid xi pasti żgħar iżda rikki, ipprova dawk li skont ir-reġjun jissejjħu Berliner, Pfannkuchen jew Krapfen.

source: A curry is a dish based on herbs and spices, together with either meat or vegetables.
reference: Il-kari huwa dixx ibbażat fuq il-ħwawar, flimkien mal-laħam jew il-ħaxix.

source: A curry can be either "dry" or "wet" depending on the amount of liquid.
reference: Il-kari jista' jkun "xott" jew "immerraq" skont l-ammont ta' likwidu.

source: In inland regions of Northern India and Pakistan, yogurt is commonly used in curries; in Southern India and some other coastal regions of the subcontinent, coconut milk is commonly used.
reference: Fir-reġjuni interni tat-Tramuntana tal-Indja u l-Pakistan, il-jogurt komunement jintuża fil-curries; fin-Nofsinhar tal-Indja u f’xi reġjuni kostali oħra tas-subkontinent, komunement jintuża l-ħalib tal-ġewż tal-Indi.

source: With 17,000 islands to choose from, Indonesian food is an umbrella term covering a vast variety of regional cuisines found across the nation.
reference: Minħabba li hemm 17,000 gżira, l-ikel Indoneżjan huwa terminu ġenerali li jkopri l-varjetà kbira ta' tisjir reġjonali li jinstab madwar il-pajjiż.

source: But, if used without further qualifiers, the term tends to mean the food originally from the central and eastern parts of the main island Java.
reference: Iżda, jekk jintuża mingħajr kwalifikaturi ulterjuri, it-terminu għandu t-tendenza li jfisser l-ikel li joriġina mill-partijiet ċentrali u tal-Lvant tal-gżira ewlenija Java.

source: Now widely available throughout the archipelago, Javanese cuisine features an array of simply seasoned dishes, the predominant flavorings the Javanese favor being peanuts, chillies, sugar (especially Javanese coconut sugar) and various aromatic spices.
reference: It-tisjir Ġavaniż, li issa huwa disponibbli b’mod wiesa’ fl-arċipelagu, jinkludi firxa ta’ dixxijiet imħawwrin b’mod sempli, u l-aromatizzanti predominanti favoriti tal-Ġavaniżi huma l-karawett, iċ-ċilis, iz-zokkor (speċjalment iz-zokkor tal-ġewż tal-Indi Ġavaniż) u diversi ħwawar aromatiċi.

source: Stirrups are supports for the rider's feet that hang down on either side of the saddle.
reference: L-istaffi huma sostenn għas-saqajn tar-rikkieb li jiddendlu fuq kull naħa tas-sarġ.

source: They provide greater stability for the rider but can have safety concerns due to the potential for a rider's feet to get stuck in them.
reference: Huma jipprovdu stabbiltà akbar għar-rikkieb imma jista' jkollhom kwistjonijiet ta' sikurezza minħabba l-potenzjal li saqajn ir-rikkieb jeħlu fihom.

source: If a rider is thrown from a horse but has a foot caught in the stirrup, they could be dragged if the horse runs away. To minimize this risk, a number of safety precautions can be taken.
reference: Jekk rikkieb jaqa’ minn fuq żiemel iżda jkollu sieq maqbuda fl-istaffa, jista’ jiġi mkaxkar jekk iż-żiemel jaħrab. Biex jitnaqqas dan ir-riskju, jistgħu jittieħdu numru ta’ prekawzjonijiet ta’ sigurtà.

source: First, most riders wear riding boots with a heel and a smooth, quite narrow, sole.
reference: L-ewwelnett, ħafna mir-rikkieba jilbsu boots tal-irkib b’għarqub u pett lixx u pjuttost dejjaq.

source: Next, some saddles, particularly English saddles, have safety bars that allow a stirrup leather to fall off the saddle if pulled backwards by a falling rider.
reference: Sussegwentement, xi sruġ, b’mod partikolari sruġ Ingliżi, għandhom vireg tas-sigurtà li jippermettu li l-istrixxa tal-ġilda tal-istaffa tinqala’ minn mas-sarġ jekk tinġibed lura minn rikkieb li jaqa’.

source: Cochamó Valley - Chile's premier climbing destination, known as the Yosemite of South America, with a variety of granite big walls and crags.
reference: Cochamó Valley (Wied Cochamó) - Id-destinazzjoni ewlenija għat-tixbit taċ-Ċili, magħruf bħala l-Yosemite tal-Amerika t’Isfel, b’diversi ħitan kbar ta’ granit u blat.

source: Summits include breath-taking views from peaks. Climbers from all parts of the world are continually establishing new routes amongst its endless potential of walls.
reference: Il-aktar punti għoljin jinkludu veduti spettakolari mill-qċaċet. Xabbaturi mill-partijiet kollha tad-dinja kontinwament qed jistabbilixxu rotot ġodda fost il-potenzjal bla tmiem ta’ ħitan tiegħu.

source: Downhill snowsports, which include skiing and snowboarding, are popular sports involving sliding down snow-covered terrain with skis or a snowboard attached to your feet.
reference: L-isports tas-silġ għan-niżla, li jinkludi l-iskijar u s-snowboarding, huma sports popolari li jinvolvi ż-żerżiq għan-niżla fuq art miksija bis-silġ fuq skis jew bord tas-silġ imwaħħlin ma’ saqajk.

source: Skiing is a major travelling activity with many enthusiasts, occasionally known as "ski bums," planning entire vacations around skiing at a particular location.
reference: L-iskijjar huwa attività ta’ vjaġġar ewlieni b’ħafna dilettanti, kultant magħrufin bħala "ski bums," li jippjanaw vaganzi sħaħ madwar l-iskijjar f’post partikolari.

source: The idea of skiing is very old — cave paintings depicting skiers date back as far as 5000 BC!
reference: L-idea tal-iskijar hija qadima ħafna — il-pitturi tal-grotta li juru skijaturi jmorru lura sal-5000 QK!

source: Downhill skiing as a sport goes back to at least the 17th century, and in 1861 the first recreational ski club was opened by Norwegians in Australia.
reference: L-iskijar għan-niżla bħala sport imur lura mill-inqas sas-seklu 17, u fl-1861 infetaħ l-ewwel klabb tal-iskijar rikreazzjonali min-Norveġiżi fl-Awstralja.

source: Backpacking by ski: This activity is also called backcountry ski, ski touring or ski hiking.
reference: Backpacking bl-iskijjar: Din l-attività tissejjaħ ukoll “backcountry ski”, “ski touring” jew “ski hiking”.

source: It is related to but usually not involving alpine style ski touring or mountaineering, the latter ones done in steep terrain and requiring much stiffer skis and boots.
reference: Huwa relatat ma’, iżda ġeneralment ma jinvolvix, touring ta’ skijar jew tixbit mal-muntanji ta’ stil alpin, fejn dan tal-aħħar isir fuq f’art wieqfa u jeħtieġ skis u boots ħafna iktar iebsin.

source: Think of the skiing route as of a similar hiking route.
reference: Ikkunsidra r-rotta tal-iskijjar bħala rotta simili tal-iħħajkjar.

source: In good conditions you will be able to cover somewhat greater distances than walking – but only very seldom you will get the speeds of cross country skiing without a heavy backpack in groomed tracks.
reference: F’kundizzjonijiet tajbin se tkun tista’ tkopri distanzi kemmxejn itwal milli kieku timxi – imma huwa biss rari ħafna li se jkollok il-veloċitajiet tal-iskijar “cross country” mingħajr backpack tqil f’binarji ppreparati.

source: Europe is a continent that is relatively small but with many independent countries. Under normal circumstances, travelling through multiple countries would mean having to go through visa applications and passport control multiple times.
reference: L-Ewropa hija kontinent relattivament żgħir imma fiha ħafna pajjiżi indipendenti. Normalment, biex tivvjaġġa minn bosta pajjiżi jkollok tgħaddi minn applikazzjonijiet għal viża u kontroll tal-passaporti diversi drabi.

source: The Schengen zone, however, works somewhat like one country in this respect.
reference: Iż-żona Schengen, madankollu, taħdem xi ftit qisha pajjiż wieħed f'dan ir-rigward.

source: As long as you stay in this zone, you can generally cross borders without going through passport control checkpoints again.
reference: Sakemm tibqa’ f’din iż-żona, ġeneralment tkun tista’ taqsam il-fruntieri mingħajr ma terġa’ tgħaddi mill-punti ta’ kontroll għall-verifika tal-passaport.

source: Similarly, by having a Schengen visa, you do not need to apply for visas to each of the Schengen member countries separately, hence saving time, money and paperwork.
reference: B’mod simili, billi jkollok viża ta’ Schengen, m’għandekx bżonn tapplika għal viżi għal kull wieħed mill-pajjiżi membri ta’ Schengen separatament, u b’hekk tiffranka ħin, flus u dokumentazzjoni.

source: There is no universal definition for which manufactured items are antiques. Some tax agencies define goods older than 100 years as antiques.
reference: M'hemm l-ebda definizzjoni universali għal liema oġġetti manifatturati huma antikitajiet. Xi aġenziji tat-taxxa jiddefinixxu l-oġġetti li għandhom aktar minn 100 sena bħala antikitajiet.

source: The definition has geographic variations, where the age limit might be shorter in places such as North America than in Europe.
reference: Id-definizzjoni għandha varjazzjonijiet ġeografiċi, fejn il-limitu tal-età jista’ jkun iqsar f’postijiet bħall-Amerika ta’ Fuq milli fl-Ewropa.

source: Handicraft products might be defined as antiques, though they are younger than similar mass-produced goods.
reference: Prodotti tal-artiġjanat jistgħu jiġu definiti bħala antikitajiet, għalkemm huma iktar riċenti minn oġġetti simili prodotti fil-massa.

source: Reindeer husbandry is an important livelihood among the Sámi and the culture surrounding the trade is important also for many with other professions.
reference: It-trobbija tar-renni hija għajxien importanti fost is-Sámi u l-kultura madwar il-kummerċ hija importanti wkoll għal ħafna nies li għandhom professjonijiet oħra.

source: Even traditionally, though, not all Sámi have been involved in big scale reindeer husbandry, but lived from fishing, hunting and similar, having reindeer mostly as draft animals.
reference: Anke tradizzjonalment, minkejja dan, mhux is-Sámi kollha kienu involuti fit-trobbija fuq skala kbira tar-renni, iżda għexu mis-sajd, il-kaċċa u affarijiet simili, u kellhom ir-renni l-aktar bħala annimali biex jiġbdu piżijiet tqal.

source: Today many Sámi work in modern trades. Tourism is an important income in Sápmi, the Sámi area.
reference: Illum ħafna Sámi jaħdmu fi snajja' moderni. It-turiżmu huwa dħul importanti f'Sápmi, iż-żona tas-Sámi.

source: Though it is widely used, especially among non-Romani, the word "Gypsy" is often considered offensive because of its associations with negative stereotypes and inaccurate perceptions of Romani people.
reference: Għalkemm tintuża b'mod estensiv, speċjalment fost dak li mhumiex Romani, il-kelma "Ġipsi" ta' spiss titqies bħala offensiva minħabba l-assoċjazzjonijiet tagħha mal-isterjotipi negattivi u perċezzjonijiet mhux eżatti dwar il-poplu Romani.

source: If the country you will be visiting becomes subject to a travel advisory, your travel health insurance or your trip cancellation insurance may be affected.
reference: Jekk il-pajjiż li tkun ser iżżur isir suġġett għal avviż dwar l-ivvjaġġar, l-assigurazzjoni tas-saħħa tal-ivvjaġġar tiegħek jew l-assigurazzjoni tal-kanċellazzjoni tal-vjaġġ tiegħek jistgħu jiġu affettwati.

source: You may also wish to consult the advice of governments other than your own, but their advice is designed for their citizens.
reference: Tista' tikkunsidra wkoll li tikkonsulta l-parir tal-gvernijiet l-oħra u mhux tiegħek, imma l-parir tagħhom huwa mfassal għaċ-ċittadini tagħhom.

source: As one example, American citizens in the Middle East might face different situations from Europeans or Arabs.
reference: Bħala eżempju wieħed, iċ-ċittadini Amerikani fil-Lvant Nofsani jistgħu jiffaċċjaw sitwazzjonijiet differenti mill-Ewropej jew l-Għarab.

source: Advisories are merely a brief summary of the political situation in one country.
reference: Rapport konsultattiv huwa sommarju fil-qosor tas-sitwazzjoni politika f'pajjiż wieħed.

source: The views presented are often cursory, general and oversimplified compared to the more detailed information available elsewhere.
reference: Il-fehmiet ippreżentati huma ħafna drabi ta' malajr, ġenerali u ssimplifikati żżejjed meta mqabbla mal-informazzjoni aktar iddettaljata disponibbli f'postijiet oħra.

source: Severe weather is the generic term for any dangerous weather phenomenon with the potential to cause damage, serious social disruption, or loss of human life.
reference: Temp sever huwa t-terminu ġeneriku għal kwalunkwe fenomenu tat-temp perikoluż bil-potenzjal li jikkawża ħsara, tfixkil soċjali serju, jew telf ta’ ħajja umana.

source: Severe weather can occur anywhere in the world, and there are different types of it, which can depend on geography, topography, and atmospheric conditions.
reference: Temp sever jista’ jseħħ kullimkien fid-dinja, u hemm tipi differenti ta’ temp, li jistgħu jiddependu fuq il-ġeografija, it-topografija u l-kundizzjonijiet atmosferiċi.

source: High winds, hail, excessive precipitation, and wildfires are forms and effects of severe weather, as are thunderstorms, tornadoes, waterspouts, and cyclones.
reference: Irjieħ qawwija, silġ, xita eċċessiva, u nirien f’żoni mhux ikkultivati huma tipi u effetti ta’ temp sever, bħal ma huma l-maltempati bir-ragħad, it-trombi tal-arja, it-trombi tal-baħar, u ċ-ċikluni.

source: Regional and seasonal severe weather phenomena include blizzards, snowstorms, ice storms, and dust storms.
reference: Fenomeni tat-temp sever reġjonali u staġjonali jinkludu tempesti qawwijin tas-silġ, burraxki silġ, maltempati tas-silġ, u tempesti tat-trab.

source: Travellers are strongly advised to be aware of any risk of severe weather affecting their area as they may affect any travel plans.
reference: Il-vjaġġaturi huma avżati b'mod qawwi li għandhom ikunu jafu dwar kwalunkwe riskju ta' temp sever li jista' jaffettwa ż-żona tagħhom minħabba li jista' jaffettwa l-pjanijiet tal-ivvjaġġar tagħhom.

source: Anyone planning a visit to a country that could be considered a war zone should get professional training.
reference: Kull min jorganizza żjara ġewwa pajjiż li jista' jitqies bħala żona ta' gwerra jrid iwettaq taħriġ professjonali.

source: A search of the Internet for 'Hostile environment course' will probably provide the address of a local company.
reference: Tiftixa fuq l-Internet għal “Kors dwar l-ambjent ostili” probabbilment ittella’ indirizz ta’ kumpanija lokali.

source: A course will normally cover all the issues discussed here in far greater detail, usually with practical experience.
reference: Kors normalment ikopri l-kwistjonijiet kollha diskussi hawnhekk f'ħafna aktar dettall, ġeneralment b'esperjenza prattika.

source: A course will normally be from 2-5 days and will involve role play, a lot of first aid and sometimes weapons training.
reference: Kors normalment ikun minn 2-5 ijiem u jinvolvi role play, ħafna taħriġ fl-ewwel għajnuna u xi drabi taħriġ fl-użu tal-armi.

source: Books and magazines dealing with wilderness survival are common, but publications dealing with war zones are few.
reference: Kotba u rivisti dwar is-sopravivenza fis-selvaġġ huma komuni, iżda m’hemmx wisq pubblikazzjonijiet dwar żoni tal-gwerra.

source: Voyagers planning sex reassignment surgery abroad must ensure they're carrying valid documents for the return trip.
reference: Il-vjaġġaturi li qed jippjanaw operazzjoni kirurġika għal assenjazzjoni sesswali mill-ġdid barra l-pajjiż iridu jiżguraw li qed iġorru d-dokumenti validi għall-vjaġġ tar-ritorn.

source: The willingness of governments to issue passports with gender not stated (X) or documents updated to match a desired name and gender varies.
reference: Ir-rieda tal-gvernijiet li joħorġu passaporti bil-ġeneru mhux iddikjarat (X) jew dokumenti aġġornati biex jaqblu mal-isem u l-ġeneru mixtieq tvarja.

source: Willingness of foreign governments to honour these documents is just as widely variable.
reference: Ir-rieda tal-gvernijiet barranin li jonoraw dawn id-dokumenti tvarja bl-istess mod wiesa'.

source: Searches at security checkpoints have also become far more intrusive in the post-September 11, 2001 era.
reference: It-tfittxijiet fil-punti ta’ kontroll tas-sigurtà wkoll saru ferm aktar intrużivi fl-era ta’ wara l-11 ta’ Settembru 2001.

source: Pre-operative transgender people should not expect to pass through the scanners with their privacy and dignity intact.
reference: Persuni transġeneru pre-operattivi m’għandhomx jistennew li jgħaddu mill-iskeners bil-privatezza u d-dinjità tagħhom intatti.

source: Rip currents are the returning flow from waves breaking off the beach, often at a reef or similar.
reference: Il-kurrenti ta’ qsim (“rip currents”) huma l-fluss li jirritorna minn mewġ li jinqata’ mill-bajja, ħafna drabi f'sikka jew simili.

source: Due to the underwater topology the return flow is concentrated at a few deeper sections, and a fast current to deep water may form there.
reference: Minħabba t-topoloġija ta’ taħt l-ilma, il-fluss tar-ritorn huwa kkonċentrat fi ftit taqsimiet iktar fondi, u jista’ jifforma kurrent mgħaġġel għall-ilma fond hemmhekk.

source: Most deaths happen as result of fatigue trying to swim back against the current, which may be impossible.
reference: Ħafna mwiet jiġru minħabba għejja wara li wieħed jipprova jgħum lura kontra l-kurrent, li jista’ jkun impossibbli.

source: As soon as you get out of the current, swimming back is no more difficult than normally.
reference: Malli toħroġ mill-kurrent, ma jkunx iktar diffiċli mis-soltu li tgħum lura.

source: Try aiming somewhere where you are not caught again or, depending on your skills and on whether you have been noticed, you might want to wait for rescue.
reference: Ipprova mmira x'imkien fejn ma tinqabadx mill-ġdid jew, skont il-ħiliet tiegħek u jekk ġejtx innutat, jista' jkun li tippreferi tistenna s-salvataġġ.

source: Re-entry shock comes on sooner than culture shock (there's less of a honeymoon phase), lasts longer, and can be more severe.
reference: Ix-xokk tad-daħla mill-ġdid jiġi qabel ix-xokk tal-kultura (hemm fażi iqsar tal-qamar il-għasel), idum aktar, u jista’ jkun iktar qawwi.

source: Travellers who had an easy time adjusting to the new culture sometimes have a particularly hard time readjusting to their native culture.
reference: Vjaġġaturi li sabuha faċli jaġġustaw għall-kultura l-ġdida xi kultant isibuha partikularment diffiċli biex jaġġustaw mill-ġdid għall-kultura nattiva tagħhom.

source: When returning home after living abroad, you've adapted to the new culture and lost some of your habits from your home culture.
reference: Meta tirritorna f'pajjiżek wara li tkun għext barra, inti adattajt għall-kultura l-ġdida u tlift ftit mid-drawwiet tiegħek tal-kultura ta' pajjiżek.

source: When you went abroad at first, people were probably patient and understanding, knowing that travellers in a new country need to adapt.
reference: Meta sifirt, għall-ewwel in-nies probabbilment ħadu paċenzja u fehmuk, għax jafu li l-vjaġġaturi f'pajjiż ġdid ikollhom bżonn li jadattaw.

source: People may not anticipate that patience and understanding are also necessary for travellers returning home.
reference: In-nies jistgħu ma jantiċipawx li l-paċenzja u l-fehim huma meħtieġa wkoll għal vjaġġaturi li jirritornaw id-dar.

source: The pyramid sound and light show is one of the most interesting things in the area for kids.
reference: Il-wirja tal-ħsejjes u tad-dawl tal-piramida hija waħda mill-iktar affarijiet interessanti fin-naħa tat-tfal.

source: You can see the pyramids in the dark and you can see them in silence before the show begins.
reference: Inti tista' tara l-piramidi fid-dlam u tista' tarahom fis-skiet qabel jibda l-ispettaklu.

source: Usually you always here the sound of tourists and vendors. The story of the sound and light is just like a story book.
reference: Ġeneralment dejjem tisma' l-ħoss tat-turisti u l-bejjiegħa. L-istorja tal-ħoss u d-dawl qisha ktieb tal-istejjer.

source: The Sphinx is set as the backdrop and the narrator of a long story.
reference: L-Isfinks jintuża bħala l-isfond u n-narratur ta' storja twila.

source: The scenes are displayed on the pyramids and the different pyramids are lit up.
reference: Ix-xeni jintwerew fuq il-piramidi u l-piramidi differenti jkunu mixgħula.

source: South Shetland Islands, discovered in 1819, are claimed by several nations and have the most bases, with sixteen active in 2020.
reference: Il-Gżejjer Shetland tan-Nofsinhar, skoperti fl-1819, huma kklejmjati minn bosta nazzjonijiet u għandhom l-iktar bażijiet, b’sittax attivi fl-2020.

source: The archipelago lies 120 km north of the Peninsula. The largest is King George Island with the settlement of Villa Las Estrellas.
reference: L-arċipelagu jinsab 120 km fit-Tramuntana tal-Peniżola. L-ikbar waħda hija King George Island bil-kolonizzazzjoni ta’ Villa Las Estrellas.

source: Others include Livingston Island, and Deception where the flooded caldera of a still-active volcano provides a spectacular natural harbour.
reference: Oħrajn jinkludu Livingston Island, u Deception fejn il-kaldera mgħarrqa ta’ vulkan li għadu attiv tipprovdi port naturali spettakolari.

source: Ellsworth Land is the region south of the Peninsula, bounded by the Bellingshausen Sea.
reference: Ellsworth Land huwa r-reġjun fin-nofsinhar tal-Peniżola, imdawwar bil-Baħar Bellingshausen.

source: The mountains of the Peninsula here merge into the plateau, then re-emerge to form the 360 km chain of the Ellsworth Mountains, bisected by the Minnesota Glacier.
reference: Il-muntanji tal-Peniżola hawn jingħaqdu fil-pjanura, imbagħad jerġgħu joħorġu biex jiffurmaw il-katina ta’ 360 km tal-Muntanji Ellsworth, imferrqa fi tnejn mill-Glaċier ta’ Minnesota.

source: The northern part or Sentinel Range has Antarctica's highest mountains, the Vinson Massif, peaking at 4892 m Mount Vinson.
reference: Il-parti tat-Tramuntana jew il-Medda tas-Sentinella għandha l-ogħla muntanji tal-Antartika, il-Vinson Massif, b’quċċata li tilħaq 4892 m f’Mount Vinson.

source: In remote locations, without cell phone coverage, a satellite phone may be your only option.
reference: F’postijiet remoti, mingħajr kopertura tat-telefon ċellulari, it-telefon satellitari jista’ jkun l-unika għażla tiegħek.

source: A satellite phone is not generally a replacement for a mobile phone, as you have to be outdoors with clear line of sight to the satellite to make a phone call.
reference: Telefown bis-satellita ġeneralment ma jissotitwixxix mowbajl, peress li trid tkun barra b’veduta ċara tas-satellita biex tagħmel telefonata.

source: The service is frequently used by shipping, including pleasure craft, as well as expeditions who have remote data and voice needs.
reference: Is-servizz ta' spiss jintuża mill-vapuri, inklużi dgħajjes tad-divertiment, kif ukoll spedizzjonijiet li għandhom bżonn jikkomunikaw mill-bogħod bil-vuċi u d-data.

source: Your local telephone service provider should be able to give more information about connecting to this service.
reference: Il-fornitur lokali tiegħek tas-servizz tat-telefon għandu jkun kapaċi jagħtik aktar informazzjoni dwar kif tikkonnettja ma' dan is-servizz.

source: An increasingly more popular option for those planning a gap-year is to travel and learn.
reference: Għażla li qed issir aktar popolari fost dawk li qed jippjanaw sena ta' waqfien mill-istudju hija li jivvjaġġaw u jitgħallmu.

source: This is especially popular with school leavers, allowing them to take a year out before university, without compromising their education.
reference: Dan huwa partikularment popolari ma' dawk li jispiċċaw mill-iskola, u jippermetilhom li jieħdu sena qabel jidħlu l-università, mingħajr ma jikkompromettu l-edukazzjoni tagħhom.

source: In many cases, enrolling on a gap-year course abroad can actually improve your chances of moving into higher education back in your home country.
reference: F’ħafna każijiet, l-iskrizzjoni f’kors matul sena ta’ intervall barra mill-pajjiż tista’ attwalment ittejjeb il-possibiltajiet tiegħek li tipprogressa lejn edukazzjoni għolja lura fil-pajjiż tiegħek.

source: Typically there will be a tuition fee to enroll in these educational programs.
reference: Tipikament se jkun hemm ħlas għat-tagħlim biex tirreġistra f'dawn il-programmi edukattivi.

source: Finland is a great boating destination. The "Land of a thousand lakes" has thousands of islands too, in the lakes and in the coastal archipelagos.
reference: Il-Finlandja hija destinazzjoni tajba ħafna għat-tbaħħir. Il-"“Land of a thousand lakes”" (l-Art b’elf lag) għandha eluf ta’ gżejjer ukoll, fil-lagi u fl-arċipelagi kostali.

source: In the archipelagos and lakes you do not necessarily need a yacht.
reference: Fl-arċipelagi u l-lagi m’għandekx bżonn jott bilfors.

source: Although the coastal archipelagos and the biggest lakes are indeed big enough for any yacht, smaller boats or even a kayak offer a different experience.
reference: Għalkemm l-arċipelagi kostali u l-akbar għadajjar huma tabilħaqq kbar biżżejjed għal kwalunkwe jott, dgħajjes iżgħar jew anki kajak joffru esperjenza differenti.

source: Boating is a national pastime in Finland, with a boat to every seven or eight people.
reference: It-tbaħħir huwa passatemp nazzjonali fil-Finlandja, fejn hemm dgħajsa għal kull seba’ jew tmien persuni.

source: This is matched by Norway, Sweden and New Zealand, but otherwise quite unique (e.g. in the Netherlands the figure is one to forty).
reference: Dan japplika wkoll għan-Norveġja, l-Iżvezja u New Zealand, iżda altrimenti huwa pjuttost uniku (eż. fin-Netherlands il-figura hija wieħed għal kull erbgħin).

source: Most of the distinct Baltic Cruises feature an extended stay in St. Petersburg, Russia.
reference: Ħafna mill-Kruċieri distinti ġewwa l-Baltiku jinkludu żjara estiża ġewwa San Pietruburgu, fir-Russja.

source: This means you can visit the historic city for a couple of full days while returning and sleeping on the ship at night.
reference: Dan ifisser li tista' żżur il-belt storika għal xi jumejn sħaħ waqt li billejl tirritorna u torqod fuq il-vapur.

source: If you only go ashore using shipboard excursions you will not need a separate visa (as of 2009).
reference: Jekk titlaq fuq l-art biss billi tuża eskursjonijiet abbord mhux se jkollokx bżonn ta’ viża separata (mill-2009).

source: Some cruises feature Berlin, Germany in the brochures. As you can see from the map above Berlin is no where near the sea and a visit to the city is not included in the price of the cruise.
reference: Xi kruċieri juru lil Berlin, il-Ġermanja fil-fuljetti. Kif tistgħu taraw mill-mappa ta’ hawn fuq, Berlin mhix ħdejn il-baħar u żjara fil-belt mhix inkluża fil-prezz tal-kruċiera.

source: Travelling by plane can be a scary experience for people of all ages and backgrounds, particularly if they've not flown before or have experienced a traumatic event.
reference: L-ivvjaġġar bl-ajruplan jista' jkun esperjenza tal-biża' għal nies ta' kull età u sfond, partikularment jekk qatt ma taru qabel jew kellhom esperjenza ta' xi avveniment trawmatiku.

source: It is not something to be ashamed of: it is no different from the personal fears and dislikes of other things that very many people have.
reference: Mhix xi ħaġa li trid tistħi biha: mhix differenti mill-biżgħat u l-avverżjonijiet personali li għandhom ħafna nies għal affarijiet oħra.

source: For some, understanding something about how aircraft work and what happens during a flight may help to overcome a fear which is based on the unknown or on not being in control.
reference: Għal xi wħud, jekk jifhmu ftit dwar kif jaħdmu l-ajruplani u x’jiġri waqt titjira, dan jista’ jgħinhom jegħlbu biża’ li hija bbażata fuq dak li ma jafux jew fuq affarijiet li ma jkollhomx kontroll fuqhom.

source: Courier companies are well paid for delivering things quickly. Frequently, time is very important with business documents, merchandise or spare parts for an urgent repair.
reference: Il-kumpaniji tal-kurrier jitħallsu sew talli jikkonsenjaw l-affarijiet malajr. Spiss, il-ħin huwa importanti ħafna fil-każ ta’ dokumenti kummerċjali, merkanzija jew spare parts għal tiswijiet urġenti.

source: On some routes, the larger companies have their own planes, but for other routes and smaller firms there was a problem.
reference: Fuq xi rotot, il-kumpaniji l-kbar għandhom l-ajruplani tagħhom stess, iżda għal rotot oħra u kumpaniji iżgħar kien hemm problema.

source: If they sent things by air freight, on some routes it may have taken days to get through unloading and customs.
reference: Jekk bagħtu l-affarijiet tal-merkanzija bl-ajru, f’xi rotot jista’ jkun li jkun damu ġranet biex jgħaddu mill-ħatt u mid-dwana.

source: The only way to get it through faster was to send it as checked luggage. Airline regulations will not allow them to send luggage without a passenger, which is where you come in.
reference: L-uniku mod biex ngħaddiha aktar malajr kien li nibgħatha bħala bagalja ċċekkjata. Ir-regolamenti tal-linji tal-ajru ma jippermettulhomx li jibagħtu bagalji mingħajr passiġġier, u hawn fejn tidħol inti.

source: The obvious way of flying in first or business class is to fork out a thick wad of money for the privilege (or, better yet, get your company to do it for you).
reference: Il-mod ovvju ta' kif ittir fl-ewwel klassi jew fil-klassi tan-negozju huwa li toħroġ mazz oħxon ta' flus għall-privileġġ (jew, tant aħjar, qabbad lill-kumpanija tiegħek biex tagħmel dan għalik).

source: However, this does not come cheap: as rough rules of thumb, you can expect to pay up to four times the normal economy fare for business, and eleven times for first class!
reference: Madankollu, dan ma jkunx irħis: bħala regoli approssimattivi, tista’ tistenna li tħallas sa erba’ darbiet aktar min-noll ekonomiku normali għall-business (il-klassi tan-negozju), u ħdax-il darba iktar għall-first class (l-ewwel klassi)!

source: Generally speaking, there is no point in even looking for discounts for business or first-class seats on direct flights from A to B.
reference: Ġeneralment, ma tagħmilx sens li tfittex skontijiet għal sits fil-business class u dawk fil-first class fuq titjiriet diretti minn A sa B.

source: Airlines know well that there is a certain core group of flyers who are willing to pay top dollar for the privilege of getting somewhere fast and in comfort, and charge accordingly.
reference: Il-linji tal-ajru jafu sewwa li hemm ċertu grupp importanti ta' vjaġġaturi bl-ajru li huma lesti li jħallsu l-ogħla prezzijiet għall-privileġġ li jaslu xi mkien malajr u fil-kumdità, u jiċċarġjaw għal dawn l-affarijiet.

source: The capital of Moldova is Chişinău. The local language is Romanian, but Russian is widely used.
reference: Il-belt kapitali tal-Moldova hija Chişinău. Il-lingwa lokali hija r-Rumen, iżda r-Russu jintuża ħafna.

source: Moldova is a multi-ethnic republic that has suffered from ethnic conflict.
reference: Il-Moldova hija repubblika multi-etnika li sofriet minn kunflitt etniku.

source: In 1994, this conflict led to the creation of the self-proclaimed Transnistria Republic in eastern Moldova, which has its own government and currency but is not recognised by any UN member country.
reference: Fl-1994, dan il-kunflitt wassal għall-ħolqien tar-Repubblika tat-Transnistrija awtoproklamata fil-Lvant tal-Moldova, li għandha l-gvern u l-munita tagħha stess iżda ma hi rikonoxxuta minn ebda pajjiż membru tan-NU.

source: Economic links have been re-established between these two parts of Moldova despite the failure in political negotiations.
reference: Ir-rabtiet ekonomiċi ġew stabbiliti mill-ġdid bejn dawn iż-żewġ partijiet tal-Moldova minkejja li ln-negozjati politiċi ma rnexxewx.

source: The major religion in Moldova is Orthodox Christian.
reference: Ir-reliġjon ewlenija fil-Moldova hija Kristjana Ortodossa.

source: İzmir is the third largest city in Turkey with a population of around 3.7 million, the second biggest port after Istanbul, and a very good transport hub.
reference: Izmir hija t-tielet l-akbar belt fit-Turkija b’popolazzjoni ta’ madwar 3.7 miljuni, it-tieni l-akbar port wara Istanbul, u ċentru tat-trasport tajjeb ħafna.

source: Once the ancient city of Smyrna, it is now a modern, developed, and busy commercial center, set around a huge bay and surrounded by mountains.
reference: Dik li darba kienet il-belt antika ta’ Smyrna, issa hija ċentru tan-negozju modern, żviluppat u mimli attività, mibni madwar bajja enormi u mdawwar bil-muntanji.

source: The broad boulevards, glass-fronted buildings and modern shopping centers are dotted with traditional red-tiled roofs, the 18th century market, and old mosques and churches, although the city has an atmosphere more of Mediterranean Europe than traditional Turkey.
reference: Il-boulevards wesgħin, bini bil-faċċati tal-ħġieġ u ċentri moderni tal-ħwienet huma ttikkjati bi bjut tradizzjonali bil-madum aħmar, is-suq tas-seklu 18, u l-moskej u l-knejjes qodma, għalkemm il-belt għandha atmosfera aktar ta’ Ewropa Mediterranja mit-Turkija tradizzjonali.

source: The village of Haldarsvík offer views of the nearby island Eysturoy and has an unusual octagonal church.
reference: Ir-raħal ta' Haldarsvik joffri veduti tal-gżira Eysturoy li tinsab qrib u għandu knisja ottagonali mhux tas-soltu.

source: In the churchyard, there are interesting marble sculptures of doves over some tombs.
reference: Fiċ-ċimiterju, wieħed isib skulturi interessanti tal-irħam ta’ ħamiem fuq ċerti oqbra.

source: It's worth half an hour to stroll about the intriguing village.
reference: Ma jiddispjaċikx jekk tqatta’ nofs siegħa tippassiġġa madwar il-villaġġ intriganti.

source: To the north and within easy reach is the romantic and fascinating town of Sintra and which was made famous to foreigners after a glowing account of its splendours recorded by Lord Byron.
reference: Lejn it-Tramuntana u tintlaħaq faċilment hemm il-belt romantika u affaxxinanti ta' Sintra u li saret magħrufa mal-barranin wara d-deskrizzjoni mimlija tifħir dwar il-ġmiel kbir tagħha li esprima Lord Byron.

source: Scotturb Bus 403 travels regularly to Sintra, stopping at Cabo da Roca.
reference: Scotturb Bus 403 tivvjaġġa regolarment lejn Sintra, u tieqaf f’Cabo da Roca.

source: Also to the north visit the great Sanctuary of Our Lady of Fatima (Shrine), a place of worldwide famous Marian apparitions.
reference: Barra minn hekk, fit-Tramuntana żur is-Santwarju kbir tal-Madonna ta' Fatima (Kappella), post id-dehriet Marjani magħrufin mad-dinja kollha.

source: Please remember that you are essentially visiting a mass grave site, as well as a site that has an almost incalculable meaning to a significant portion of the world's population.
reference: Jekk jogħġbok ftakar li, essenzjalment, qed iżżur sit ta’ oqbra tal-massa, kif ukoll sit li għandu tifsira kważi inkalkolabbli għal porzjon sinifikanti tal-popolazzjoni tad-dinja.

source: There are still many men and women alive who survived their time here, and many more who had loved ones who were murdered or worked to death there, Jews and non-Jews alike.
reference: Għad hemm ħafna rġiel u nisa li għadhom ħajjin illum li rnexxilhom jibqgħu ħajjin tul iż-żmien li damu hawnhekk, u ħafna aktar li kellhom l-għeżież tagħhom maqtula jew imħaddmin sal-mewt hemmhekk, Lhud kif ukoll mhumiex Lhud.

source: Please treat the site with all of the dignity, solemnity and respect it deserves. Do not make jokes about the Holocaust or Nazis.
reference: Jekk jogħġbok ittratta s-sit bid-dinjità, is-solennità u r-rispett li jistħoqqlu. Tagħmilx ċajt dwar l-Olokawst jew in-Nażisti.

source: Do not deface the site by marking or scratching graffiti into structures.
reference: Tagħmilx vandaliżmu fuq il-post billi timmarka jew tobrox graffiti fuq l-istrutturi.

source: Barcelona's official languages are Catalan and Spanish. About a half prefer to speak Catalan, a vast majority understands it, and virtually everyone knows Spanish.
reference: Il-lingwi uffiċjali ta’ Barċellona huma l-Katalan u l-Ispanjol. Bejn wieħed u ieħor, nofs in-nies jippreferu jitkellmu bil-Katalan, il-maġġor parti tan-nies jifhmuh, u kważi kulħadd pratikament jaf jitkellem bl-Ispanjol.

source: However, most signs are indicated only in Catalan because it is established by law as the first official language.
reference: Madankollu, il-biċċa l-kbira tas-sinjali huma mmarkati biss bil-Katalan minħabba li din hija stabbilita bil-liġi bħala l-ewwel lingwa uffiċjali.

source: Yet, Spanish is also widely used in public transport and other facilities.
reference: Imma, l-Ispanjol jintuża wkoll b'mod estensiv fit-trasport pubbliku u faċilitajiet oħra.

source: Regular announcements in the Metro are made only in Catalan, but unplanned disruptions are announced by an automated system in a wide variety of languages including Spanish, English, French, Arabic and Japanese.
reference: Avviżi regolari fil-Metro jsiru bil-Katalan biss, iżda tfixkil mhux ippjanat jitħabbar minn sistema awtomatizzata f’varjetà wiesgħa ta’ lingwi inkluż bl-Ispanjol, bl-Ingliż, bil-Franċiż, bl-Għarbi u bil-Ġappuniż.

source: Parisians have a reputation for being egocentric, rude and arrogant.
reference: Il-Pariġini għandhom reputazzjoni ta' nies egoċentriċi, kesħin u arroganti.

source: While this is often only an inaccurate stereotype, the best way to get along in Paris still is to be on your best behavior, acting like someone who is "bien élevé" (well brought up). It will make getting about considerably easier.
reference: Waqt li ħafna drabi dan huwa biss stereotip mhux preċiż, l-aħjar mod biex tkampa f'Pariġi għadu li ġġib ruħek sewwa, u taġixxi bħal xi ħadd li huwa "bien élevé" (imrobbi sewwa). Dan jgħin konsiderevolment biex tkampa b'mod aktar faċli.

source: Parisians' abrupt exteriors will rapidly evaporate if you display some basic courtesies.
reference: L-atitudnijiet mhux amikevoli tal-Pariġini malajr jisfaw fix-xejn meta turihom korteżji bażiċi.

source: The Plitvice Lakes national park is heavily forested, mainly with beech, spruce, and fir trees, and features a mixture of Alpine and Mediterranean vegetation.
reference: Il-park naturali tal-Għadajjar ta' Plitvice huwa miksi b'ħafna siġar, prinċipalment siġar tal-fagu, spruce u żnuber, u fih taħlita ta' veġetazzjoni Alpina u Mediterranja.

source: It has a notably wide variety of plant communities, due to its range of microclimates, differing soils and varying levels of altitude.
reference: Għandha varjetà notevolment wiesgħa ta’ komunitajiet ta’ pjanti, minħabba l-firxa tagħha ta’ mikroklimi, ħamrija differenti u livelli differenti ta’ altitudni.

source: The area is also home to an extremely wide variety of animal and bird species.
reference: Iż-żona tilqa’ fiha wkoll varjetà estremament wiesgħa ta’ speċi ta’ annimali u għasafar.

source: Rare fauna such as the European brown bear, wolf, eagle, owl, lynx, wild cat and capercaillie can be found there, along with many more common species
reference: Fawna rari bħall-ors kannella Ewropew, il-lupu, l-ajkla, il-kokka, il-linċi, il-qattus selvaġġ u s-serduq selvaġġ jistgħu jinstabu hemm, flimkien ma’ ħafna aktar speċijiet komuni

source: While visiting the monasteries, women are required to wear skirts covering the knees and have their shoulders covered, too.
reference: Waqt li jżuru l-monasteri, in-nisa jkollhom jilbsu dbielet li jgħattu l-irkopptejn u li jkollhom spallithom mgħottijin wkoll.

source: Most of the monasteries do provide wraps for women who come unprepared, but if you bring your own, especially one with bright colors, you'll get a smile from the monk or nun at the entrance.
reference: Ħafna mill-monasteri jipprovdu xall għan-nisa li ma jiġux ippreparati, imma jekk inti ġġib tiegħek, speċjalment wieħed b’kuluri jgħajtu, se tirċievi tbissima mill-patri jew mis-soru fid-daħla.

source: Along the same line, men are required to wear trousers covering the knees.
reference: Bl-istess mod, l-irġiel huma meħtieġa jilbsu qliezet li jgħattu l-irkopptejn.

source: This too can be borrowed from the stock at the entrance but that clothing isn't washed after every user so you may not feel comfortable wearing these skirts. One size fits all for men!
reference: Dan ukoll jista' jiġi misluf mill-istokk li jkun hemm fid-daħla imma dawk il-ħwejjeġ ma jinħaslux wara kull persuna li tilbishom u allura jista' jkun li ma tħossokx komda tilbes dawn id-dbielet. Għall-irġiel hemm daqs uniku għal kulħadd!

source: Majorcan cuisine, like that of similar zones in the Mediterranean, is based on bread, vegetables and meat (specially pork), and uses olive oil throughout.
reference: It-tisjir tal-Majorka, bħal dak ta’ żoni simili fil-Mediterran, huwa bbażat fuq ħobż, ħaxix u laħam (speċjalment majjal), u juża żejt taż-żebbuġa f’kull platt.

source: A simple popular dinner, especially during the summer, is the Pa amb Oli: Bread with olive oil, tomato, and any available condiments such as cheese, tunafish, etc.
reference: Dixx popolari u sempliċi, speċjalment fis-sajf, huwa l-Pa amb Oli: Ħobż biż-żejt taż-żebbuġa, tadam, u l-kondimenti li jkunu disponibbli bħal ġobon, tonn taż-żejt, eċċ.

source: All nouns, alongside the word Sie for you, always begin with a capital letter, even in the middle of a sentence.
reference: In-nomi kollha, ħdejn il-kelma Sie għal inti, dejjem jibdew b'ittra kapitali, anki f'nofs is-sentenza.

source: This is an important way to distinguish between some verbs and objects.
reference: Dan hu metodu importanti kif tiddistingwi bejn xi verbi u oġġetti.

source: It also arguably makes reading easier, though writing is somewhat complicated by the need to find out whether a verb or adjective is used in a substantivized form.
reference: Ċertament, dan jiffaċilita l-qari, għalkemm il-kitba hija ftit ikkumplikata minħabba l-bżonn li nsiru nafu jekk verb jew aġġettiv humiex użati f’forma sostantivizzata.

source: Pronunciation is relatively easy in Italian since most words are pronounced exactly how they are written
reference: Il-pronunzja bit-Taljan hija relattivament faċli minħabba li ħafna kliem huma ppronunzjati eżatt kif huma miktubin

source: The main letters to watch out for are c and g, since their pronunciation varies based on the following vowel.
reference: L-ittri ewlenin li trid toqgħod attent għalihom huma “c” u “g”, minħabba li l-pronunzja tagħhom tvarja skont liema vokali tiġi warajhom.

source: Also, make sure to pronounce r and rr differently: caro means dear, whereas carro means chariot.
reference: Apparti hekk, kun ċert li tippronunzja r u rr differenti: caro tfisser għali, waqt li carro tfisser karru.

source: Persian has a relatively easy and mostly regular grammar.
reference: Il-lingwa Persjana għandha grammatika relattivament faċli u, fil-maġġor parti, regolari.

source: Therefore, reading this grammar primer would help you learn much about Persian grammar and understand phrases better.
reference: Għaldaqstant, il-qari ta' dan il-ktieb introduttorju tal-grammatika jista' jgħinek titgħallem ħafna dwar il-grammatika Persjana u tifhem aħjar il-frażijiet.

source: Needless to say, if you know a Romance language, it will be easier for you to learn Portuguese.
reference: Ovvjament, jekk taf lingwa Rumanza, se jkun iktar faċli għalik li titgħallem il-Portugiż.

source: However, people who know a little Spanish may hastily conclude that Portuguese is close enough that it need not be studied separately.
reference: Madankollu, in-nies li jafu ftit Spanjol jistgħu jikkonkludu bil-għaġla li l-Portugiż huwa simili biżżejjed li ma jkunx hemm għalfejn li jiġi studjat separatament.

source: Pre-modern observatories are usually obsolete today, and remain as museums, or sites of education.
reference: Osservatorji pre-moderni ġeneralment huma obsoleti llum il-ġurnata, u jibqgħu bħala mużewijiet, jew postijiet edukattivi.

source: As light pollution in their heyday was not the kind of problem it is today, they are usually located in cities or at campuses, easier to reach than those built in modern times.
reference: Billi t-tniġġis tad-dawl fl-aqwa tagħhom ma kienx it-tip ta’ problema li għandna bħalissa, ġeneralment dawn jinsabu fil-bliet jew fil-kampusis, u huwa aktar faċli tilħaq lilhom milli dawk mibnija fi żminijiet moderni.

source: Most modern research telescopes are enormous facilities in remote areas with favorable atmospheric conditions.
reference: Ħafna teleskopji moderni ta’ riċerka huma faċilitajiet enormi f’żoni remoti b’kundizzjonijiet atmosferiċi favorevoli.

source: Cherry blossom viewing, known as hanami, has been a part of Japanese culture since the 8th century.
reference: Il-wiri tal-fjur taċ-ċirasa, magħruf bħala “hanami”, ilu parti mill-kultura Ġappuniża sa mis-seklu 8.

source: The concept came from China where plum blossoms were the flower of choice.
reference: l-kunċett ġie miċ-Ċina fejn il-fjur tal-għanbaqar kienu l-fjura magħżula.

source: In Japan, the first cherry blossom parties were hosted by the emperor only for himself and other members of the aristocracy around the Imperial Court.
reference: Fil-Ġappun, l-ewwel festini tal-fjur taċ-ċirasa kienu ospitati mill-imperatur għalih u għall-membri oħra tal-aristokrazija biss madwar il-Qorti Imperjali.

source: Plants look their best when in a natural environment, so resist the temptation to remove even "just one" specimen.
reference: Il-pjanti jidhru fl-aħjar tagħhom meta jkunu f’ambjent naturali, għalhekk, irreżisti t-tentazzjoni li tneħħi anke kampjun "wieħed biss".

source: If visiting a formally arranged garden, collecting "specimens" is also going to get you ejected, without discussion.
reference: Jekk iżżur ġnien organizzat formalment, il-ġbir ta’ "kampjuni" se jwassal ukoll biex inti titkeċċa, mingħajr diskussjonijiet.

source: Singapore is generally an extremely safe place to be and very easy to navigate, and you can buy almost anything after arriving.
reference: Singapore ġeneralment huwa post estremament sigur biex tkun fih u faċli ħafna biex tinnavigah, u tista’ tixtri kważi kollox wara li tasal.

source: But being placed in the "high tropics" just a few degrees north of equator you will need to deal with both heat (always) and strong sun (when the sky is clear, more rarely).
reference: Imma meta titqiegħed fit-"tropiċi għoljin" ftit gradi biss fit-tramuntana tal-ekwatur se jkollok bżonn tiffaċċja kemm is-sħana (dejjem) kif ukoll ix-xemx qawwija (meta s-sema jkun ċar, aktar rari).

source: There are also a few buses going north to Hebron, the traditional burial place of the Biblical patriarchs Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, and their wives.
reference: Hemm ukoll ftit xarabankijiet li jmorru lejn it-Tramuntana għal Ħebron, il-post tradizzjonali tad-dfin tal-patrijarki Bibliċi Abraham, Isakk, Ġakobb, u n-nisa tagħhom.

source: Check that the bus you are thinking of taking goes into Hebron and not just to the nearby Jewish settlement of Kiryat Arba.
reference: Iċċekkja li l-karozza tal-linja li qed tippjana li taqbad tmur Hebron u mhux biss lejn l-insedjament Lhudi viċin Kiryat Arba.

source: Inland waterways can be a good theme to base a holiday around.
reference: Il-passaġġi fuq l-ilma interni jistgħu jkunu tema tajba biex tibbaża vaganza madwarha.

source: For example visiting castles in the Loire Valley, the Rhine valley or taking a cruise to interesting cites on the Danube or boating along the Erie Canal.
reference: Pereżempju żjarat f’kastelli fil-Wied ta’ Loire, il-wied tar-Rhine jew il-kruċieri lejn bliet interessanti fuq id-Danubju jew mawriet bid-dgħajjes tul il-Kanal Erie.

source: They also define routes for popular hiking and cycling trails.
reference: Huma jiddefinixxu wkoll ir-rotot ta' mogħdijiet popolari għal mixjiet twal u sewqan tar-roti.

source: Christmas is one of the most important holidays of Christianity, and is celebrated as the birthday of Jesus.
reference: Il-Milied huwa wieħed mill-aktar festi importanti tal-Kristjaneżmu, u huwa ċċelebrat bħala għeluq snin Ġesù.

source: Many of the traditions surrounding the holiday have been adopted also by non-believers in Christian countries and non-Christians around the world.
reference: Ħafna mit-tradizzjonijiet assoċjati mal-festa ġew adottati wkoll minn dawk li ma jemmnux fil-pajjiżi Kristjani u dawk li mhumiex Kristjani madwar id-dinja.

source: There's a tradition to pass the Easter night awake at some exposed point to see the sunrise.
reference: Hemm it-tradizzjoni li tgħaddi lejlet l-Għid imqajjem f'xi post espost biex tara t-tlugħ tax-xemx.

source: There are of course Christian theological explanations for this tradition, but it may well be a pre-Christian Spring and Fertility ritual.
reference: Ovvjament hemm spjegazzjonijiet teoloġiċi Kristjani għal din it-tradizzjoni, iżda jista' jkun ukoll ritwal tar-rebbiegħa u l-fertilità ta' qabel l-Insara.

source: More traditional churches often hold an Easter Vigil on Saturday night during the Easter weekend, with the congregations often breaking into celebration at the stroke of midnight to celebrate Christ's resurrection.
reference: Knejjes iktar tradizzjonali spiss jorganizzaw Velja tal-Għid nhar is-Sibt filgħaxija tul tmiem il-ġimgħa tal-Għid, u l-kongregazzjonijiet ħafna drabi jibdew iċ-ċelebrazzjonijiet mad-daqqa ta’ nofsillejl biex jiċċelebraw il-qawmien mill-mewt ta’ Kristu.

source: All animals that originally arrived in the islands came here either by swimming, flying or floating.
reference: L-annimali kollha li oriġinarjament waslu fil-gżejjer ġew hawn billi għamu, taru jew ifflowtjaw s'hawnhekk.

source: Due to the long distance from the continent mammals were unable to make the journey making the giant tortoise the primary grazing animal in the Galapagos.
reference: Minħabba d-distanza twila mill-kontinent, il-mammiferi ma setgħux jagħmlu l-vjaġġ u għalhekk il-fekruna ġganta saret l-annimal ewlieni ta’ mergħa ġewwa l-Galapagos.

source: Since the arrival of man to the Galapagos, many mammals have been introduced including goats, horses, cows, rats, cats and dogs.
reference: Sa mill-wasla tal-bniedem fil-Galapagos, ġew introdotti bosta mammiferi inklużi mogħoż, żwiemel, baqar, firien, qtates u klieb.

source: If you visit the Arctic or Antarctic areas in the winter you will experience the polar night, which means that the sun doesn't rise above the horizon.
reference: Jekk tmur fiż-żoni tal-Artiku jew tal-Antartiku fix-xitwa tesperjenza l-lejl polari, li jfisser li x-xemx ma togħliex iktar ’il fuq mill-orizzont.

source: This offers a good opportunity to see the Aurora borealis, as the sky will be dark more or less around the clock.
reference: Dan joffri opportunità tajba biex tara l-Aurora borealis, peress li s-sema se jkun xi ftit jew wisq mudlama l-ħin kollu.

source: As the areas are sparsely populated, and light pollution therefore often not a problem, you will also be able to enjoy the stars.
reference: Billi ż-żoni għandhom popolazzjoni baxxa, u t-tniġġis tad-dawl għalhekk ħafna drabi ma jikkawżax problemi, int se tkun tista’ wkoll tgawdi l-istilel.

source: Japanese work culture is more hierarchical and formal that what Westerners may be used to.
reference: Il-kultura tax-xogħol Ġappuniża hija aktar ġerarkika u formali minn dik li huma mdorrijin biha n-nies tal-Punent.

source: Suits are standard business attire, and coworkers call each other by their family names or by job titles.
reference: Is-suits huma ilbies standard għax-xogħol, u l-kollegi jsejħu lil xulxin bil-kunjom jew bit-titli tax-xogħol.

source: Workplace harmony is crucial, emphasizing group effort rather than praising individual accomplishments.
reference: L-armonija fuq il-post tax-xogħol hija kruċjali, bl-enfasi ssir fuq l-isforz tal-grupp u mhux fuq l-inkoraġġiment tal-kisbiet individwali.

source: Workers must often get their superiors' approval for any decisions they make, and are expected to obey their superiors' instructions without question.
reference: Il-ħaddiema ħafna drabi jridu jiksbu l-approvazzjoni tas-superjuri tagħhom għal kwalunkwe deċiżjoni li jieħdu, u huma mistennija li jobdu l-istruzzjonijiet tas-superjuri tagħhom mingħajr riservi.

source: "Issa għandna ġrieden ta' 4 xhur li mhumiex dijabetiċi li qabel kienu dijabetiċi," huwa żied.
reference: "We now have 4-month-old mice that are non-diabetic that used to be diabetic," he added.

source: Dr. Ehud Ur, professur tal-mediċina fl-Università Dalhousie ġewwa Halifax, Nova Scotia u president tad-diviżjoni klinika u xjentifika tal-Assoċjazzjoni Kanadiża tad-Dijabete wissa li r-riċerka għadha fil-bidu tagħha.
reference: Dr. Ehud Ur, professor of medicine at Dalhousie University in Halifax, Nova Scotia and chair of the clinical and scientific division of the Canadian Diabetes Association cautioned that the research is still in its early days.

source: Bħal xi esperti oħra, huwa xettiku dwar jekk id-dijabete tistax titfejjaq, u jinnota li dawn is-sejbiet m’għandhom l-ebda rilevanza għal nies li diġà għandhom dijabete tat-Tip 1.
reference: Like some other experts, he is skeptical about whether diabetes can be cured, noting that these findings have no relevance to people who already have Type 1 diabetes.

source: Nhar it-Tnejn, Sara Danius, segretarja permanenti tal-Kumitat Nobel għal-Letteratura fl-Akkademja Żvediża, ħabbret pubblikament waqt programm tar-radju fuq Sveriges Radio fl-Iżvezja li l-kumitat, peress li ma rnexxielux jikkuntattja lil Bob Dylan direttament dwar ir-rebħ tal-Premju Nobel għal-Letteratura tal-2016, abbanduna l-isforzi tiegħu biex jikkuntattjah.
reference: On Monday, Sara Danius, permanent secretary of the Nobel Committee for Literature at the Swedish Academy, publicly announced during a radio program on Sveriges Radio in Sweden the committee, unable to reach Bob Dylan directly about winning the 2016 Nobel Prize in Literature, had abandoned its efforts to reach him.

source: Danius qal, "Bħalissa m’aħna qed nagħmlu xejn. Ċempilt u bgħatt emails lill-eqreb kollaboratur tiegħu u rċevejt tweġibiet kordjali ħafna. Għalissa, dan żgur huwa biżżejjed."
reference: Danius said, "Right now we are doing nothing. I have called and sent emails to his closest collaborator and received very friendly replies. For now, that is certainly enough."

source: Preċedentement, il-Kap Eżekuttiv ta’ Ring, Jamie Siminoff, irrimarka li l-kumpanija bdiet meta l-qanpiena tal-bieb tiegħu ma kinitx tinstema’ mill-ħanut tiegħu fil-garaxx.
reference: Previously, Ring's CEO, Jamie Siminoff, remarked the company started when his doorbell wasn't audible from his shop in his garage.

source: Huwa bena qanpiena tal-bieb bil-WiFi, qal.
reference: He built a WiFi door bell, he said.

source: Siminoff qal li l-bejgħ żdied wara li fl-2013 deher f’episodju ta’ Shark Tank fejn il-bord tal-ispettaklu naqas milli jiffinanzja n-negozju ġdid.
reference: Siminoff said sales boosted after his 2013 appearance in a Shark Tank episode where the show panel declined funding the startup.

source: Lejn tmiem l-2017, Siminoff deher fuq l-istazzjon tat-televiżjoni tax-xiri QVC.
reference: In late 2017, Siminoff appeared on shopping television channel QVC.

source: Ring wasal għal soluzzjoni ta’ kawża ma’ kumpanija tas-sigurtà li tikkompeti, il-Korporazzjoni ADT.
reference: Ring also settled a lawsuit with competing security company, the ADT Corporation.

source: Waqt li vaċċin sperimentali wieħed jidher li kapaċi jnaqqqas il-mortalità tal-Ebola, sa issa, l-ebda mediċina ma ntweriet b'mod ċar li hija adatta għat-trattament tal-infezzjoni eżistenti.
reference: While one experimental vaccine appears able to reduce Ebola mortality, up until now, no drugs have been clearly demonstrated suitable for treating existing infection.

source: Cocktail wieħed ta’ antikorpi, ZMapp, inizjalment wera potenzjal fil-qasam, iżda studji formali indikaw li kellu inqas benefiċċju minn dak imfittex fil-prevenzjoni tal-mewt.
reference: One antibody cocktail, ZMapp, initially showed promise in the field, but formal studies indicated it had less benefit than sought in preventing death.

source: Fil-prova PALM, ZMapp serva bħala kontroll, li jfisser li x-xjentisti użawh bħala linja bażi u qabblu t-tliet trattamenti l-oħra miegħu.
reference: In the PALM trial, ZMapp served as a control, meaning scientists used it as a baseline and compared the three other treatments to it.

source: Il-USA Gymnastics tappoġġja l-ittra tal-Kumitat Olimpiku tal-Istati Uniti u taċċetta l-ħtieġa assoluta tal-familja Olimpika li tippromwovi ambjent sikur għall-atleti kollha tagħna.
reference: USA Gymnastics supports the United States Olympic Committee's letter and accepts the absolute need of the Olympic family to promote a safe environment for all of our athletes.

source: Aħna naqblu mal-istqarrija tal-USOC li l-interessi tal-atleti u l-klabbs tagħna, u l-isport tagħhom, jistgħu jiġu moqdijin aħjar billi nagħmlu progress b'tibdil sinifikanti fi ħdan l-organizzazzjoni tagħna, aktar milli bit-tneħħija taċ-ċertifikazzjoni.
reference: We agree with the USOC's statement that the interests of our athletes and clubs, and their sport, may be better served by moving forward with meaningful change within our organization, rather than decertification.

source: Il-USA Gymnastics tappoġġja investigazzjoni indipendenti li tista' titfa' dawl dwar kif l-abbuż tal-proporzjon deskritt b'tant kuraġġ minn dawk li salvaw minn Larry Nassar baqa' ma nkixifx għal tant żmien u tħaddan kwalunkwe bidla meħtieġa u xierqa.
reference: USA Gymnastics supports an independent investigation that may shine light on how abuse of the proportion described so courageously by the survivors of Larry Nassar could have gone undetected for so long and embraces any necessary and appropriate changes.

source: Il-USA Gymnastics u l-USOC għandhom l-istess għan — li jagħmlu l-isport tal-ġinnastika, u oħrajn, sikur kemm jista' jkun għall-atleti biex isegwu l-ħolm tagħhom f'ambjent sikur, pożittiv u awtorizzat.
reference: USA Gymnastics and the USOC have the same goal — making the sport of gymnastics, and others, as safe as possible for athletes to follow their dreams in a safe, positive and empowered environment.

source: Matul is-sittinijiet, Brzezinski ħadem għal John F. Kennedy bħala l-konsulent tiegħu u mbagħad għall-amministrazzjoni ta' Lyndon B. Johnson.
reference: Throughout 1960s, Brzezinski worked for John F. Kennedy as his advisor and then the Lyndon B. Johnson administration.

source: Matul lis-selezzjonijiet tal-1976 huwa ta parir lil Carter dwar il-politika barranija, imbagħad serva bħala Konsulent tas-Sigurtà Nazzjonali (NSA) mill-1977 sal-1981, wara Henry Kissinger.
reference: During the 1976 selections he advised Carter on foreign policy, then served as National Security Advisor (NSA) from 1977 to 1981, succeeding Henry Kissinger.

source: Bħala NSA, huwa għen lil Carter fl-immaniġġjar diplomatiku tal-affarijiet dinjija, bħall-Ftehimiet ta’ Camp David, 1978; in-normalizzazzjoni tar-relazzjonijiet bejn l-Istati Uniti u ċ-Ċina matul l-aħħar tas-snin sebgħin; ir-Rivoluzzjoni Iranjana, li wasslet għall-kriżi tal-ostaġġi fl-Iran, 1979; u l-invażjoni Sovjetika fl-Afganistan, 1979.
reference: As NSA, he assisted Carter in diplomatically handling world affairs, such as the Camp David Accords, 1978; normalizing US–China relations thought the late 1970s; the Iranian Revolution, which led to the Iran hostage crisis, 1979; and the Soviet invasion in Afghanistan, 1979.

source: Il-film, li jieħdu sehem fih Ryan Gosling u Emma Stone, irċieva nominazzjonijiet fil-kategoriji ewlenin kollha.
reference: The movie, featuring Ryan Gosling and Emma Stone, received nominations in all major categories.

source: Gosling u Stone rċevew nominazzjonijiet għall-Aqwa Attur u l-Aqwa Attriċi rispettivament.
reference: Gosling and Stone received nominations for Best Actor and Actress respectively.

source: In-nominazzjonijiet l-oħra jinkludu l-Aħjar Film, Direttur, Ċinematografija, Disinn tal-Kostumi, Editjar tal-Film, Mużika Oriġinali, Disinn tal-Produzzjoni, Editjar tal-Ħoss, Taħlit tal-Ħoss u Screenplay Oriġinali.
reference: The other nominations include Best Picture, Director, Cinematography, Costume Design, Film-editing, Original Score, Production Design, Sound Editing, Sound Mixing and Original Screenplay.

source: Żewġ diski mill-film, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) u City of Stars, ġew nominati għall-aħjar kanzunetta oriġinali. L-istudio Lionsgate irċieva 26 nominazzjoni — aktar minn kull studio ieħor.
reference: Two songs from the movie, Audition (The Fools Who Dream) and City of Stars, received nominations for best original song. Lionsgate studio received 26 nominations — more than any other studio.

source: Tard nhar il-Ħadd, il-President tal-Istati Uniti Donald Trump, fi stqarrija mogħtija permezz tas-segretarju tal-istampa, ħabbar li t-truppi Amerikani se jitilqu mis-Sirja.
reference: Late on Sunday, the United States President Donald Trump, in a statement delivered via the press secretary, announced US troops would be leaving Syria.

source: It-tħabbira saret wara li Trump kellu konverżazzjoni bit-telefown mal-President Tork Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.
reference: The announcement was made after Trump had a phone conversation with Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdoğan.

source: It-Turkija se tieħu f'idejha wkoll l-għassa tal-ġellieda tal-ISIS maqbudin li, qalet l-istqarrija, in-nazzjonijiet Ewropej irrifjutaw li jirripatrijaw.
reference: Turkey would also take over guarding captured ISIS fighters which, the statement said, European nations have refused to repatriate.

source: Dan mhux biss jikkonferma li mill-inqas xi dinosawri kellhom ir-rix, teorija diġà mifruxa ħafna, imma jipprovdi dettalji li l-fossili ġeneralment ma jistgħux jagħtu, bħall-kulur u l-arranġament tridimensjonali.
reference: This not only confirms that at least some dinosaurs had feathers, a theory already widespread, but provides details fossils generally cannot, such as color and three-dimensional arrangement.

source: . Ix-xjenzati jistqarru li r-rix ta’ dan l-annimal kien kannella kulur il-qastan fin-naħa ta’ fuq u l-qiegħ huwa ċar jew kulur ta’ karotenojdi.
reference: . Scientists say this animal's plumage was chestnut-brown on top with a pale or carotenoid-colored underside.

source: Is-sejba tipprovdi informazzjoni wkoll dwar l-evoluzzjoni tar-rix fl-għasafar.
reference: The find also grants insight into the evolution of feathers in birds.

source: Minħabba li r-rix tad-dinosawru m’għandhomx xaft żviluppat tajjeb, imsejjaħ rachis, iżda għandhom karatteristiċi oħra ta’ rix — “barbs” u “barbules” — ir-riċerkaturi ddeduċew li r-rachis x’aktarx kien żvilupp evoluzzjonarju li seħħ wara dawn il-karatteristiċi l-oħra.
reference: Because the dinosaur feathers do not have a well-developed shaft, called a rachis, but do have other features of feathers — barbs and barbules — the researchers inferred the rachis was likely a later evolutionary development that these other features.

source: L-istruttura tar-rix tissuġġerixxi li ma kienux jintużaw għat-titjir iżda pjuttost għar-regolazzjoni tat-temperatura jew għall-wiri. Ir-riċerkaturi ssuġġerew li, minkejja li dan huwa d-denb ta’ dinosawru żgħir, il-kampjun juri rix ta’ adult u mhux rix irqiq u artab taż-żgħar.
reference: The feathers' structure suggests that they were not used in flight but rather for temperature regulation or display. The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.

source: Ir-riċerkaturi ssuġġerew li, minkejja li dan huwa d-denb ta' dinosawru żgħir fl-età, il-kampjun juri rix tal-adulti u mhux il-pil ta' fellus.
reference: The researchers suggested that, even though this is the tail of a young dinosaur, the sample shows adult plumage and not a chick's down.

source: Karozza bomba splodiet fil-kwartieri ġenerali tal-pulizija f'Gaziantep, fit-Turkija, ilbieraħ filgħodu u qatlet żewġ uffiċjali tal-pulizija u korriet aktar minn għoxrin persuna oħra.
reference: A car bomb detonated at police headquarters in Gaziantep, Turkey yesterday morning killed two police officers and injured more than twenty other people.

source: L-uffiċċju tal-gvernatur qal li dsatax-il persuna minn dawk midruba kienu uffiċjali tal-pulizija.
reference: The governor's office said nineteen of the injured were police officers.

source: Il-pulizija qalu li jissuspettaw allegat militant tad-Daesh (ISIL) b’responsabbiltà għall-attakk.
reference: Police said they suspect an alleged Daesh (ISIL) militant of responsibility for the attack.

source: Huma sabu li x-Xemx taħdem fuq l-istess prinċipji bażiċi bħall-istilel l-oħra: L-attività tal-istilel kollha fis-sistema nstabet li kienet immexxija mil-luminożità tagħhom, ir-rotazzjoni tagħhom, u xejn iżjed.
reference: They found the Sun operated on the same basic principles as other stars: The activity of all stars in the system was found to be driven by their luminosity, their rotation, and nothing else.

source: Il-luminożità u r-rotazzjoni jintużaw flimkien biex jiddeterminaw in-numru Rossby ta’ stilla, li huwa relatat mal-fluss tal-plażma.
reference: The luminosity and rotation are used together to determine a star's Rossby number, which is related to plasma flow.

source: Aktar ma jkun żgħir in-numru Rossby, inqas tkun attiva l-istilla fir-rigward tat-treġġigħ lura manjetiku.
reference: The smaller the Rossby number, the less active the star with respect to magnetic reversals.

source: Matul il-vjaġġ tiegħu, Iwasaki sab problemi f’ħafna okkażjonijiet.
reference: During his trip, Iwasaki ran into trouble on many occasions.

source: Huwa ġie misruq minn pirati, attakkat fit-Tibet minn kelb bl-idrofobija, ħarab miż-żwieġ fin-Nepal u ġie arrestat l-Indja.
reference: He was robbed by pirates, attacked in Tibet by a rabid dog, escaped marriage in Nepal and was arrested in India.

source: L-istandard 802.11n jaħdem kemm fuq il-frekwenzi 2.4Ghz kif ukoll fuq 5.0Ghz.
reference: The 802.11n standard operates on both the 2.4Ghz and 5.0Ghz frequencies.

source: Dan se jippermettilu li jkun kompatibbli b'lura mal-802.11a, 802.11b u 802.11g, sakemm l-istazzjon bażi jkollu radjijiet doppji.
reference: This will allow it to be backwards compatible with 802.11a, 802.11b and 802.11g, provided that the base station has dual radios.

source: Il-veloċitajiet ta' 802.11n huma sostanzjalment aktar veloċi minn dawk tal-preċedessuri tiegħu b'throughput teoretika massimu ta' 600Mbit/s.
reference: The speeds of 802.11n are substantially faster than that of its predecessors with a maximum theoretical throughput of 600Mbit/s.

source: Duvall, li hija miżżewwġa b’żewġt itfal adulti, ma għamlitx xi impressjoni kbira fuq Miller, li l-istorja kienet relatata miegħu.
reference: Duvall, who is married with two adult children, did not leave a big impression on Miller, to whom the story was related.

source: Meta ġie mistoqsi għal kumment, Miller qal, "Mike jitkellem ħafna waqt is-smigħ...jien kont qed nipprepara u għalhekk fir-realtà ma kontx qed nisma' dak li kien qed jgħid."
reference: When asked for comment, Miller said, "Mike talks a lot during the hearing...I was getting ready so I wasn't really hearing what he was saying."

source: Se nagħmlu ħilitna biex innaqsu l-emissjonijiet tad-dijossidu tal-karbonju għal kull unità tal-PGD b'marġni notevoli sal-2020 mil-livell tal-2005, qal Hu.
reference: "We will endeavour to cut carbon dioxide emissions per unit of GDP by a notable margin by 2020 from the 2005 level," Hu said.

source: Huwa ma stabbilixxiex figura għat-tnaqqis, u qal li dawn se jsiru abbażi tal-produzzjoni ekonomika taċ-Ċina.
reference: He did not set a figure for the cuts, saying they will be made based on China's economic output.

source: Hu ħeġġeġ lill-pajjiżi li qed jiżviluppaw "biex jevitaw il-perkors antik li l-ewwel tniġġes u mbagħad tnaddaf wara."
reference: Hu encouraged developing countries "to avoid the old path of polluting first and cleaning up later."

source: Huwa żied jgħid li, "madankollu, jintalbu jassumu obbligi li jmorru lil hinn mill-istadju tal-iżvilupp, ir-responsabbiltà u l-kapaċitajiet tagħhom."
reference: He added that "they should not, however, be asked to take on obligations that go beyond their development stage, responsibility and capabilities."

source: Il-Grupp ta’ Studju tal-Iraq ippreżenta r-rapport tiegħu f’12.00 GMT illum.
reference: The Iraq Study Group presented its report at 12.00 GMT today.

source: Huwa jwissi li Ħadd ma jista’ jiggarantixxi li kwalunkwe azzjoni li tittieħed l-Iraq f’dan il-punt se twaqqaf il-gwerra settarja, il-vjolenza li qed tikber, jew dixxendenza lejn il-kaos.
reference: It warns No one can guarantee that any course of action in Iraq at this point will stop sectarian warfare, growing violence, or a slide toward chaos.

source: Ir-Rapport jibda b'talba għal dibattitu miftuħ u l-formazzjoni ta' kunsens fl-Istati Uniti dwar il-politika rigward il-Lvant Nofsani.
reference: The Report opens with plea for open debate and the formation of a consensus in the United States about the policy towards the Middle East.

source: Ir-Rapport jikkritika b'mod qawwi kważi kull aspett tal-politika preżenti tal-Eżekuttiv fir-rigward tal-Iraq u jħeġġeġ bidla immedjata fid-direzzjoni.
reference: The Report is highly critical of almost every aspect of the present policy of the Executive towards Iraq and it urges an immediate change of direction.

source: L-ewwel waħda fost it-78 rakkomandazzjoni tiegħu hija li għandha tittieħed inizjattiva diplomatika ġdida qabel tispiċċa din is-sena biex il-fruntieri tal-Iraq ikunu żgurati kontra interventi ostili u biex jerġgħu jiġu stabbiliti relazzjonijiet diplomatiċi mal-ġirien tagħha.
reference: First among its 78 recommendations is that a new diplomatic initiative should be taken before the end of this year to secure Iraq’s borders against hostile interventions and to re-establish diplomatic relations with its neighbors.

source: Is-senatur attwali u l-First Lady tal-Arġentina Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner ħabbret il-kandidatura presidenzjali tagħha lbieraħ filgħaxija ġewwa La Plata, belt 50 kilometru (31 mil) ’il bogħod minn Buenos Aires.
reference: Current senator and Argentine First Lady Cristina Fernandez de Kirchner announced her presidential candidacy yesterday evening in La Plata, a city 50 kilometers (31 miles) away from Buenos Aires.

source: Is-Sinjura Kirchner ħabbret l-intenzjoni tagħha li tikkontesta għal president fit-Teatru Arġentin, l-istess post li kienet tuża biex tibda l-kampanja tagħha tal-2005 għas-Senat bħala membru tad-delegazzjoni tal-provinċja ta’ Buenos Aires.
reference: Mrs. Kirchner announced her intention to run for president at the Argentine Theatre, the same location she used to start her 2005 campaign for the Senate as member of the Buenos Aires province delegation.

source: Id-dibattitu tqanqal minn kontroversja dwar l-infiq fuq għajnuna u rikostruzzjoni wara l-Uragan Katrina; li xi konservattivi fiskali semmewh b’mod umoristiku "d-Deal ta’ New Orleans ta’ Bush."
reference: The debate was sparked by controversy over spending on relief and reconstruction in the wake Hurricane Katrina; which some fiscal conservatives have humorously labeled "Bush's New Orleans Deal."
