source: Il-kritika liberali tal-isforz ta’ rikostruzzjoni ffokat fuq l-għoti ta’ kuntratti ta’ rikostruzzjoni lil dawk perċepiti bħala nies ta’ ġewwa ta’ Washington.
reference: Liberal criticism of the reconstruction effort has focused on the awarding of reconstruction contracts to perceived Washington insiders.

source: Iktar minn erba’ miljun persuna marru Ruma biex jattendu l-funeral.
reference: Over four million people went to Rome to attend the funeral.

source: In-numru ta’ nies preżenti kien tant kbir li ma kienx possibbli li kulħadd li jkollu aċċess għall-funeral fi Pjazza San Pietru.
reference: The number of people present was so large that it was not possible for everybody to gain access to the funeral in St. Peter's Square.

source: Diversi skrins kbar tat-televiżjoni ġew installati f’diversi postijiet ġewwa Ruma biex in-nies ikunu jistgħu jaraw iċ-ċerimonja.
reference: Several large television screens were installed in various places in Rome to let the people watch the ceremony.

source: F’ħafna bliet oħra tal-Italja u fil-bqija tad-dinja, partikolarment fil-Polonja, saru arranġamenti simili, li kienu jarawhom għadd kbir ta’ nies.
reference: In many other cities of Italy and in the rest of the world, particularly in Poland, similar setups were made, which were viewed by a great number of people.

source: L-istoriċi kkritikaw il-politiki tal-FBI tal-passat talli ffukaw ir-riżorsi fuq każijiet li faċli jissolvew, speċjalment każijiet ta’ karozzi misruqa, bil-għan li tingħata spinta lir-rata ta’ suċċess tal-aġenzija.
reference: Historians have criticized past FBI policies for focusing resources on cases which are easy to solve, especially stolen car cases, with the intent of boosting the agency's success rate.

source: Il-Kungress beda jiffinanzja l-inizjattiva tal-oxxenità fis-sena fiskali tal-2005 u speċifika li l-FBI għandu jiddedika 10 aġenti għall-pornografija tal-adulti.
reference: Congress began funding the obscenity initiative in fiscal 2005 and specified that the FBI must devote 10 agents to adult pornography.

source: Robin Uthappa wettaq l-ogħla punteġġ tal-innings, 70 run f’41 ballun biss billi laqat 11-il four u 2 sixes.
reference: Robin Uthappa made the innings highest score, 70 runs in just 41 balls by hitting 11 fours and 2 sixes.

source: Il-battituri tal-ordni tan-nofs, Sachin Tendulkar u Rahul Dravid, għamlu prestazzjoni tajba u għamlu sħubija ta’ mitt run.
reference: Middle order batsmen, Sachin Tendulkar and Rahul Dravid, performed well and made a hundred-run partnership.

source: Iżda, wara li tilfet il-wicket tal-kaptan, l-Indja għamlet biss 36 ġirja u tilfet 7 wickets biex ittemm l-innings.
reference: But, after losing the captain's wicket India only made 36 runs loosing 7 wickets to end the innings.

source: Il-President tal-Istati Uniti George W. Bush wasal f'Singapore fl-għodwa tas-16 ta' Novembru, biex beda mawra ta' ġimgħa madwar l-Asja.
reference: U.S. President George W. Bush arrived in Singapore the morning of November 16, beginning a week-long tour of Asia.

source: Huwa ġie milqugħ mid-Deputat Prim Ministru ta’ Singapor Wong Kan Seng u ddiskuta kwistjonijiet ta’ kummerċ u terroriżmu mal-Prim Ministru ta’ Singapor Lee Hsien Loong.
reference: He was greeted by Singapore's Deputy Prime Minister Wong Kan Seng and discussed trade and terrorism issues with the Singapore Prime Minister Lee Hsien Loong.

source: Wara ġimgħa ta' telf fl-elezzjoni ta' nofs it-terminu, Bush kellem lill-udjenza dwar l-espansjoni tal-kummerċ fl-Asja.
reference: After a week of losses in the midterm election, Bush told an audience about the expansion of trade in Asia.

source: Il-Prim Ministru Stephen Harper qabel li jibgħat “l-Att dwar l-Arja Nadifa” tal-gvern lil kumitat tal-partit kollu għal reviżjoni, qabel it-tieni qari tiegħu, wara l-laqgħa ta’ 25 minuta ta’ nhar it-Tlieta mal-mexxej tal-NDP Jack Layton fil-PMO.
reference: Prime Minister Stephen Harper has agreed to send the government's 'Clean Air Act' to an all-party committee for review, before its second reading, after Tuesday's 25 minute meeting with NDP leader Jack Layton at the PMO.

source: Layton kien talab bidliet fl-abbozz ambjentali tal-konservattivi waqt il-laqgħa mal-PM, u talab għal "kitba mill-ġdid fid-dettall u kompluta" tal-abbozz ambjentali tal-partit Konservattiv.
reference: Layton had asked for changes to the conservatives' environmental bill during the meeting with the PM, asking for a "thorough and complete rewriting" of the Conservative party's environmental bill.

source: Minn meta intervjena l-Gvern Federali biex jieħu f’idejh il-finanzjament tal-isptar Mersey ġewwa Devonport, Tasmania, il-gvern statali u xi MPs federali kkritikaw dan l-att bħala gimmick ta’ qabel l-elezzjoni federali li se tissejjaħ sa Novembru.
reference: Ever since the Federal Government stepped in to take over funding of the Mersey hospital in Devonport, Tasmania, the state government and some federal MPs have criticised this act as a stunt in the prelude to the federal election to be called by November.

source: Iżda l-Prim Ministru John Howard qal li l-att sar biss biex jipproteġi lill-faċilitajiet tal-isptar milli jiġu degradati mill-gvern ta' Tasmanja', billi ngħataw AUD$45 miljun żejda.
reference: But Prime Minister John Howard has said the act was only to safeguard the facilities of the hospital from being downgraded by the Tasmanian government, in giving an extra AUD$45 million.

source: Skont l-aħħar bulettin, il-qari tal-livell tal-baħar indika li kien iġġenerat tsunami. Kien hemm xi attività definittivament ta' tsunami li ġiet irrekordjata qrib Pago Pago u Niue.
reference: According to the latest bulletin, sea level readings indicated a tsunami was generated. There was some definite tsunami activity recorded near Pago Pago and Niue.

source: Ma ġewx irrappurtati ħsarat jew korrimenti serji fit-Tonga, imma mar id-dawl temporanjament u dan, allegatament, impedixxa lill-awtoritajiet Tongani milli jirċievu t-twissija tat-tsunami maħruġa mill-PTWC.
reference: No major damage or injuries have been reported in Tonga, but power was temporarily lost, which reportedly prevented Tongan authorities from receiving the tsunami warning issued by the PTWC.

source: Erbatax-il skola fil-Hawaii li jinsabu fuq il-kosti jew viċin tagħhom ingħalqu l-ġurnata kollha nhar l-Erbgħa minkejja li t-twissijiet tneħħew.
reference: Fourteen schools in Hawaii located on or near coastlines were closed all of Wednesday despite the warnings being lifted.

source: Il-President tal-Istati Uniti George W. Bush laqa' l-istqarrija.
reference: U.S. President George W. Bush welcomed the announcement.

source: Il-kelliem għal Bush, Gordon Johndroe, sejjaħ il-wegħda tal-Korea ta’ Fuq bħala "pass importanti lejn l-għan li tinkiseb id-denuklearizzazzjoni verifikabbli tal-peniżola Koreana."
reference: Bush spokesman Gordon Johndroe called North Korea's pledge "a major step towards the goal of achieving the verifiable denuclearization of the Korean peninsula."

source: L-għaxar maltempata b'isem tal-istaġun tal-Uragani tal-Atlantiku, Maltempata Subtropikali Jerry, iffurmat fl-Oċean Atlantiku llum.
reference: The tenth named storm of the Atlantic Hurricane season, Subtropical Storm Jerry, formed in the Atlantic Ocean today.

source: Iċ-Ċentru Nazzjonali tal-Uragani (NHC) jgħid li f’dan il-punt Jerry ma joħloq l-ebda theddida għall-art.
reference: The National Hurricane Center (NHC) says that at this point Jerry poses no threat to land.

source: Il-Korp tal-Inġiniera tal-Istati Uniti għamel stima li 6 pulzieri xita jistgħu jkissru l-ilqugħ tax-xmara li preċedentement saritilhom il-ħsara.
reference: The U.S. Corps of Engineers estimated that 6 inches of rainfall could breach the previously damaged levees.

source: Id-Disa’ Sala, li kellha għargħar għoli sa 20 pied waqt l-Uragan Katrina, bħalissa tinsab f’ilma għoli sal-qadd peress li l-eqreb diga kienet inqabżet.
reference: The Ninth Ward, which saw flooding as high as 20 feet during Hurricane Katrina, is currently in waist-high water as the nearby levee was overtopped.

source: L-ilma qed jaqbeż l-ilqugħ f'taqsima li hi wiesgħa 100 pied.
reference: Water is spilling over the levee in a section 100 feet wide.

source: L-Amministratur tal-Commons Adam Cuerden esprima l-frustrazzjoni tiegħu dwar it-tħassir meta tkellem ma’ Wikinews ix-xahar li għadda.
reference: Commons Administrator Adam Cuerden expressed his frustration over the deletions when he spoke to Wikinews last month.

source: "Huwa [Wales] bażikament gidbilna mill-bidu nett. L-ewwel, billi jaġixxi bħallikieku dan sar għal raġunijiet legali. It-tieni, billi taparsi kien qed jismagħna, sat-tħassir tal-arti tiegħu."
reference: "He [Wales] basically lied to us from the start. First, by acting as if this was for legal reasons. Second, by pretending he was listening to us, right up to his art deletion."

source: L-irritazzjoni tal-komunità wasslet għal sforzi attwali biex titfassal politika rigward kontenut sesswali għas-sit li jospita miljuni ta’ midja liċenzjati b’mod miftuħ.
reference: The community irritation led to current efforts to draft a policy regarding sexual content for the site which hosts millions of openly-licensed media.

source: Ix-xogħol li sar kien l-aktar teoretiku, imma l-programm inkiteb biex jistimula l-osservazzjonijiet magħmula tal-galassja Sagittarius.
reference: The work done was mostly theoretical, but the program was written to simulate observations made of the Sagittarius galaxy.

source: L-effett li kien qed ifittex it-tim ikun ikkawżat mill-forzi tal-marea bejn il-materja skura tal-galassja u l-materja skura tat-Triq ta’ Sant’Anna.
reference: The effect the team was looking for would be caused by tidal forces between the galaxy's dark matter and the Milky Way's dark matter.

source: Bħalma l-qamar għandu ġibda fuq l-art, u jikkawża mareati, hekk ukoll it-Triq ta’ Sant’Anna tagħmel forza fuq il-galassja ta’ Sagittarius.
reference: Just like the moon exerts a pull on the earth, causing tides, so does the Milky Way exert a force on the Sagittarius galaxy.

source: Ix-xjenzati waslu għall-konklużjoni li l-materja skura taffettwa lil materja skura oħra bħalma tagħmel il-materja regolari.
reference: The scientists were able to conclude that the dark matter affect other dark matter in the same way regular matter does.

source: Din it-teorija tgħid li l-maġġoranza tal-materja skura madwar galassja tinsab madwar il-galassja f'tip ta' dijadema u hija magħmula minn ħafna partikuli żgħar.
reference: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.

source: Rapporti televiżivi juru duħħan abjad ħiereġ mill-impjant.
reference: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.

source: L-awtoritajiet lokali qed iwissu lir-residenti fil-viċinanza tal-impjant biex jibqgħu ġewwa, jitfu l-kundizzjonaturi tal-arja u ma jixorbux ilma tal-vit.
reference: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.

source: Skont l-aġenzija nukleari tal-Ġappun, iċ-ċesju u l-jodju radjuattivi ġew identifikati fl-impjant.
reference: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.

source: L-awtoritajiet jispekulaw li dan jindika li jista’ jkun li l-kontenituri li fihom fjuwil tal-uranju fis-sit inqasmu u qiegħdin inixxu.
reference: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.

source: Dr Tony Moll skopra t-Tuberkulożi Estremament Reżistenti għall-Mediċina (XDR-TB) fir-reġjun tal-Afrika t’Isfel KwaZulu-Natal.
reference: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.

source: F’intervista, huwa qal li l-varjant il-ġdid kien "inkwetanti u allarmanti ħafna minħabba r-rata għolja ħafna ta’ fatalitajiet."
reference: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."

source: Dr Moll jaħseb li, Xi pazjenti setgħu ħadu l-bug mill-isptar, u mill-inqas tnejn kienu ħaddiema tas-saħħa tal-isptar.
reference: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.

source: Fi żmien sena, persuna infettata tista’ tinfetta 10 sa 15-il kuntatt mill-qrib.
reference: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.

source: Madankollu, il-persentaġġ ta’ XDR-TB fil-grupp kollu tan-nies bit-tuberkulosi għadu jidher li huwa baxx; 6,000 mit-total ta’ 330,000 persuna infettati fi kwalunkwe mument partikolari fl-Afrika t’Isfel.
reference: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.

source: Is-satelliti, li t-tnejn kienu jiżnu aktar minn 1,000 libbra, u li kienu qed jivvjaġġaw bi kważi 17,500 mil fis-siegħa, ħabtu 491 mil 'il fuq mid-dinja.
reference: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.

source: Ix-xjentisti jgħidu li l-isplużjoni kkawżata mill-kolliżjoni kienet kbira.
reference: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.

source: Għadhom qed jippruvaw jiddeterminaw eżattament kemm kienet kbira l-ħabta u kif se taffettwa d-Dinja.
reference: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.

source: Il-Kmand Strateġiku tal-Istati Uniti tal-uffiċċju tad-Dipartiment tad-Difiża tal-Istati Uniti qed jittraċċa t-tifrik.
reference: The United States Strategic Command of the U.S. Department of Defense office is tracking the debris.

source: Ir-riżultat tal-analiżi tal-ipplottjar se jitqiegħed f'sit web pubbliku.
reference: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.

source: Tabiba li kienet taħdem fl-Isptar tat-Tfal ta' Pittsburgh, f'Pennsylvania se tiġi akkużata bi qtil aggravat wara li nhar l-Erbgħa ommha nstabet mejta fil-but tal-karozza tagħha, jgħidu l-awtoritajiet f'Ohio.
reference: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.

source: It-tabib Malar Balasubramanian, ta’ 29 sena, instab ġewwa Blue Ash, Ohio, subborg ta’ madwar 15-il mil fit-tramuntana ta’ Cincinnati mimdud mal-art ħdejn it-triq b’T-shirt u bil-ħwejjeġ ta’ taħt fi stat apparentement taħt medikazzjoni qawwija.
reference: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.

source: Hija ħadet lill-uffiċjali ħdejn l-Oldsmobile Intrigue sewda tagħha li kienet 500 pied ’il bogħod.
reference: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.

source: Hemm, huma sabu l-ġisem ta' Saroja Balasubramanian, ta' 53 sena, mgħotti b'kutri mtebbgħin bid-demm.
reference: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.

source: Il-pulizija qalu li l-katavru deher li kien ilu hemm madwar ġurnata.
reference: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.

source: L-ewwel każijiet tal-marda f’dan l-istaġun ġew irrappurtati fl-aħħar ta’ Lulju.
reference: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.

source: Il-marda tinġarr mill-qżieqeż, li mbagħad temigra fil-bnedmin permezz tan-nemus.
reference: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.

source: It-tifqigħa wasslet lill-gvern Indjan biex iwettaq miżuri bħall-iskjerament ta' nies li jaqbdu l-ħnieżer fiż-żoni affettwati serjament, it-tqassim ta' eluf ta' purtieri kontra n-nemus u l-bexx tal-pestiċidi.
reference: The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.

source: Diversi miljuni ta' kunjetti tat-tilqima kontra l-enċefalite ġew imwiegħda wkoll mill-gvern, li se jgħin fit-tħejjija tal-aġenziji tas-saħħa għas-sena d-dieħla.
reference: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.

source: Il-pjanijiet li t-tilqim jiġu kkonsenjati fl-iktar żoni storikament milquta din is-sena ġew imdewwma minħabba nuqqas ta’ fondi u prijoritizzazzjoni baxxa mqabbla ma' mard ieħor.
reference: Plans for vaccines to be delivered to the historically most affected areas this year were delayed due to lack of funds and low prioritisation relative to other diseases.

source: Fl-1956, Słania mar l-Iżvezja, fejn tliet snin wara beda jaħdem għall-Uffiċċju tal-Posta Żvediż u sar l-inċiżur ewlieni tagħhom.
reference: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.

source: Huwa pproduċa aktar minn 1,000 bolla għall-Iżvezja u 28 pajjiż ieħor.
reference: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.

source: Xogħlu huwa ta' kwalità u dettall tant rikonoxxuti li huwa wieħed mill-veru ftit "ismijiet magħrufin sew" fost il-filatelisti. Xi wħud jispeċjalizzaw fl-ikkollezzjonar tax-xogħol tiegħu biss.
reference: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.

source: L-1,000 bolla tiegħu kienet dik eċċellenti "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" (Għemejjel Kbar magħmulin minn Rejiet Żvediżi) ta’ David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl fis-sena 2000, li hija mniżżla fil-Ktieb tar-Rekords Dinjin Guiness.
reference: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.

source: Kien ukoll involut fit-tnaqqix tal-karti tal-flus għal ħafna pajjiżi, eżempji riċenti tax-xogħol tiegħu jinkludu r-ritratti tal-Prim Ministru fuq in-naħa ta' quddiem tal-karti tal-flus tal-$5 u l-$100 Kanadiżi.
reference: He was also engaged in engraving banknotes for many countries, recent examples of his work including the Prime Ministerial portraits on the front of the new Canadian $5 and $100 bills.

source: Wara li seħħ l-inċident, Gibson kien ittrasportat lejn sptar imma miet ftit wara.
reference: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.

source: Is-sewwieq tat-trakk, li għandu 64 sena, ma weġġax fil-ħabta.
reference: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.

source: Il-vettura nnifisha ttieħdet mill-post tal-inċident bejn wieħed u ieħor f'1200 GMT fl-istess jum.
reference: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.

source: Persuna li taħdem f'garaxx qrib fejn seħħ l-inċident qalet: "Kien hemm tfal qed jistennew biex jaqsmu t-triq u kollha kienu qed iwerżqu u jibku."
reference: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."

source: Huma kollha ġrew lura minn fejn kien seħħ l-inċident.
reference: They all ran back from where the accident had happened.

source: Suġġetti oħra fuq l-aġenda ġewwa Bali jinkludu li jiġu salvati l-foresti li fadal fid-dinja, u l-qsim ta’ teknoloġiji biex jgħinu lin-nazzjonijiet li qed jiżviluppaw jikbru b’modi li jniġġsu inqas.
reference: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.

source: In-N.U. tittama wkoll li tiffinalizza fond biex tgħin lill-pajjiżi affettwati mit-tisħin globali biex ikampaw mal-impatti.
reference: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.

source: Il-flus jistgħu jingħataw għal djar protetti kontra l-għargħar, ġestjoni aħjar tal-ilma, u diversifikazzjoni tal-għelejjel.
reference: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.

source: Fluke kiteb li l-isforzi minn xi wħud biex jimpedixxu lin-nisa milli jitkellmu dwar is-saħħa tan-nisa ma rnexxewx.
reference: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.

source: Hija kkonkludiet hekk minħabba l-ammont kbir ta’ kummenti pożittivi u inkoraġġiment li rċiviet kemm minn nisa kif ukoll minn irġiel li ħeġġew biex il-medikazzjoni kontraċettiva titqies bħala bżonn mediku.
reference: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.

source: Meta il-ġlied waqaf wara li l-midruba ġew ittrasportati għall-isptar, madwar 40 mill-priġunieri l-oħra li kien baqa' baqgħu fil-bitħa u rrifjutaw li jirritornaw fiċ-ċelel tagħhom.
reference: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.

source: In-negozjaturi ppruvaw jirranġaw is-sitwazzjoni, iżda t-talbiet tal-priġunieri mhumiex ċari.
reference: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.

source: Bejn l-10:00 u l-11:00 ta’ bil-lejl MDT, il-ħabsin qabbdu nar fil-bitħa.
reference: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.

source: Ftit wara, uffiċjali mgħammra b’tagħmir għall-irvellijiet daħlu fil-bitħa u dawwru lill-priġunieri bil-gass tad-dmugħ.
reference: Soon, officers equipped with riot gear entered the yard and cornered the inmates with tear gas.

source: L-ekwipaġġi tas-salvataġġ tan-nirien eventwalment tfew in-nar sal-11:35 ta’ bil-lejl.
reference: Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.

source: Wara li nbniet id-diga fl-1963 waqaf l-għargħar staġjonali li kien jifrex s-sediment f'kull parti tax-xmara.
reference: After the dam was built in 1963, the seasonal floods that would spread sediment throughout the river were halted.

source: Dan is-sediment kien meħtieġ għall-ħolqien ta' sikek tar-ramel u xtut tar-ramel, li servew bħala ħabitats tal-ħlejjaq selvaġġi.
reference: This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.

source: Minħabba dan, żewġ speċijiet ta’ ħut saru estinti, u tnejn oħra saru speċi mhedda, inkluża l-humpback chub.
reference: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.

source: Għalkemm il-livell tal-ilma se jogħla biss ftit piedi wara l-għargħar, l-uffiċjali qed jittamaw li dan ikun biżżejjed biex jirrestawra s-sikek tar-ramel li għebu aktar 'l isfel fix-xmara.
reference: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.

source: Ma nħarġet ebda twissija ta’ tsunami, u skont l-aġenzija tal-ġeofiżika ta’ Jakarta, ma hi se toħroġ ebda twissija ta’ tsunami minħabba li t-terremot ma laħaqx ir-rekwiżit tal-kobor ta’ 6.5.
reference: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.

source: Minkejja li m’hemm l-ebda theddida ta’ tsunami, ir-residenti bdew jippanikjaw u jitilqu mill-postijiet tax-xogħol tagħhom u minn djarhom.
reference: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.

source: Għalkemm Winfrey qabżilha d-dmugħ meta tat l-addijo, hija għamlitha ċara mal-ammiraturi tagħha li se tirritorna.
reference: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.

source: "Dan mhux se jkun addijo. Dan huwa l-għeluq ta' kapitolu u l-ftuħ ta' wieħed ġdid."
reference: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."

source: Ir-riżultati finali mill-elezzjonijiet presidenzjali u parlamentari tan-Namibja indikaw li l-president preżenti, Hifikepunye Pohamba, reġa’ ġie elett b’marġni wiesgħa.
reference: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.

source: Il-partit fil-gvern, l-Organizzazzjoni tal-Poplu tal-Afrika tal-Lbiċ (SWAPO), żamm ukoll il-maġġoranza fl-elezzjonijiet parlamentari.
reference: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.

source: It-truppi ta’ koalizzjoni u Afgani marru fiż-żona biex jiżguraw is-sit u ajruplani oħra tal-koalizzjoni ntbagħtu biex jipprovdu assistenza.
reference: Coalition and Afghan troops moved into the area to secure the site and other coalition aircraft have been sent to assist.

source: It-tiġrifa saret fl-għoli fuq art muntanjuża, u huwa maħsub saret minħabba nar ostili.
reference: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.

source: L-isforzi biex jinstab is-sit tal-ħabta qed jiffaċċjaw maltemp u art mhux navigabbli.
reference: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.

source: Il-karità medika Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres u l-Organizzazzjoni Dinjija tas-Saħħa jgħidu li hija l-agħar tifqigħa rreġistrata fil-pajjiż.
reference: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.

source: Il-kelliem għal Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman qal: "L-Angola miexja lejn l-agħar tifqigħa li qatt kellha u s-sitwazzjoni tibqa’ ħażina ħafna fl-Angola," qal.
reference: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.

source: Il-logħob beda fl-10:00 ta’ filgħodu b’temp mill-aqwa u apparti minn ħalba xita f’nofs l-għodwa li għaddiet malajr, kienet ġurnata perfetta għal 7’s rugby.
reference: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.

source: L-Afrika t'Isfel, l-aħjar kompetituri tat-turnament, bdew fuq nota tajba meta kellhom rebħa komda ta' 26 - 00 konta ż-Żambja il-kompetituri fil-5es post.
reference: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.

source: Waqt li dehru li deċiżament kienu ilhom ma jilagħbu fil-logħba kontra sħabhom tan-Nofsinhar tagħhom, South Africa l-Afrika madankollu tjiebu b’mod kostanti iktar ma pprogressa l-kampjonat.
reference: Looking decidedly rusty in the game against their southern sisters, South Africa however steadily improved as the tournament progressed.

source: Id-difiża dixxiplinata tagħhom, il-ħiliet tal-immaniġġjar tal-ballun u x-xogħol eċċellenti fit-tim ġiegħluhom jispikkaw u kien ċar li dan kien it-tim li kellu jiġi megħlub.
reference: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.

source: Uffiċjali għall-belt ta’ Amsterdam u l-Mużew Anne Frank jiddikjaraw li s-siġra hija infettata b’fungus u toħloq periklu għas-saħħa pubblika billi jsostnu li kienet f’periklu imminenti li taqa’.
reference: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.

source: Kienet skedata li tinqata’ nhar it-Tlieta, iżda ġiet salvata wara deċiżjoni tal-qorti ta’ emerġenza.
reference: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.

source: Id-dħulijiet kollha tal-għerien, li ssemmew "Is-Seba' Aħwa Bniet", għandhom dijametru ta' mill-anqas 100 sa 250 metru (328 sa 820 pied).
reference: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.

source: Senjaturi bl-infraaħmar juru li l-varjazzjonijiet fit-temperatura minn matul il-lejl u matul il-jum juru li probabbilment huma għerien.
reference: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.

source: Huma aktar friski mis-superfiċje tal-madwar matul il-jum u aktar sħan bil-lejl.
reference: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.

source: L-imġiba termali tagħhom mhijiex kostanti daqs għerien kbar fid-Dinja li ħafna drabi jżommu temperatura pjuttost kostanti, iżda hija konsistenti ma’ li dawn huma toqob fondi fl-art," qal Glen Cushing tat-Tim tal-Astroġeoloġija tal-Istħarriġ Ġeoloġiku tal-Istati Uniti (USGS) u tal-Università tat-Tramuntana ta’ Arizona li tinsab ġewwa Flagstaff, Arizona.
reference: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.

source: Fi Franza, il-votazzjoni tradizzjonalment kienet esperjenza ta’ teknoloġija baxxa: il-votanti jiżolaw lilhom infushom f’kabina u jpoġġu folja ta’ karta stampata minn qabel li tindika l-kandidat tal-għażla tagħhom f’envelop.
reference: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.

source: Wara li l-uffiċjali jivverifikaw l-identità tal-votant, il-votant jixħet l-envelop fil-kaxxa tal-voti u jiffirma l-lista tal-ismijiet tal-votanti.
reference: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.

source: Il-liġi elettorali Franċiża tikkodifika l-proċeduri b’mod pjuttost strett.
reference: French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.

source: Sa mill-1988, il-kaxxi tal-vot iridu jkunu trasparenti sabiex il-votanti u l-osservaturi jkunu jistgħu jaraw li l-ebda envelops ma huma preżenti fil-bidu tal-vot u li l-ebda envelops ma jiġu miżjuda ħlief dawk tal-votanti magħduda u awtorizzati kif xieraq.
reference: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.

source: Il-kandidati jistgħu jibagħtu rappreżentanti biex jixhdu kull parti tal-proċess. Filgħaxija, il-voti jingħaddu minn voluntiera taħt sorveljanza qawwija, skont proċeduri speċifiċi.
reference: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.

source: ASUS Eee PC, imniedi qabel fid-dinja kolha għal fatturi ta’ ffrankar tal-ispejjeż u ta’ funzjonalità, sar suġġett jaħraq fix-Xahar tal-IT ta’ Taipei fl-2007.
reference: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.

source: Iżda s-suq tal-konsumaturi tal-laptops se jkun varjat u mibdul radikalment wara li fl-2007 ASUS ingħatat it-“Taiwan Sustainable Award” (il-Premju Sostenibbli tat-Taiwan) mill-Eżekuttiv Yuan tar-Repubblika taċ-Ċina.
reference: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.

source: Is-sit web tal-istazzjon jiddeskrivi l-ispettaklu bħala "teatru tar-radju ta' stil qadim bi spin ġdida u eċċessivament ossessiva!"
reference: The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"

source: Meta beda, il-programm kien jidher biss fuq is-sit tar-radju fuq l-internet stabbilit TogiNet Radio, sit li jiffoka fuq “radju tad-diskors”.
reference: In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.

source: Fi tmiem l-2015, TogiNet stabbilixxa AstroNet Radio bħala stazzjon sussidjarju.
reference: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.

source: L-ispettaklu oriġinarjament kien fih atturi tal-vuċi dilettanti, lokali għal Texas tal-Lvant.
reference: The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.

source: Kien hemm rapporti ta' sakkeġġi li komplew matul il-lejl f'ħafna postijiet, minħabba li l-uffiċjali tal-infurzar tal-liġi ma kienux preżenti fit-toroq ta' Bishkek.
reference: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.

source: Bishkek ġiet deskritta bħala li waqgħet fi stat ta’ "anarkija" minn osservatur wieħed, hekk kif gruppi ta’ nies bdew jimirħu fit-toroq u jisirqu ħwienet ta’ oġġetti tal-konsumatur.
reference: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.

source: Diversi residenti ta’ Bishkek waħħlu fid-dimostranti min-Nofsinhar għall-illegalità.
reference: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.

source: L-Afrika t’Isfel rebħu lill-All Blacks (New Zealand) f’logħba tat-Tri Nations tal-unjoni tar-rugby fir-Royal Bafokeng Stadium ġewwa Rustenburg, l-Afrika t’Isfel.
reference: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.

source: Il-punteġġ finali kien rebħa ta’ punt wieħed, 21 għal 20, li temm il-15-il sensiela ta’ rebħiet ta’ logħob tal-All Blacks.
reference: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.

source: Għall-iSpringboks, dan temm sensiela ta’ telf ta’ ħames logħbiet.
reference: For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.

source: Kienet l-aħħar partita għall-“All Blacks”, li kienu diġà rebħu t-trofew ġimagħtejn ilu.
reference: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.

source: Il-logħba finali tas-serje se ssir ġewwa Ellis Park f’Johannesburg il-ġimgħa d-dieħla, meta Springboks jilagħbu l-Awstralja.
reference: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.

source: Terremot moderat nhar it-Tnejn għeżżeż lill-Punent ta' Montana fl-10:08 ta' filgħaxija.
reference: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.

source: Ma ġie rċevut ebda rapport immedjat ta’ ħsara mill-Istħarriġ Ġeoloġiku tal-Istati Uniti (USGS - United States Geological Survey) u ċ-Ċentru Nazzjonali ta’ Informazzjoni dwar it-Terremoti (“National Earthquake Information Center”) tagħha.
reference: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.

source: It-terremot kien iċċentrat madwar 20 km (15-il mil) fit-Tramuntana-Grigal ta’ Dillon, u madwar 65 km (40 mil) fin-Nofsinhar ta’ Butte.
reference: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.

source: Ir-razza tal-influwenza tat-tjur li hija letali għall-bnedmin, l-H5N1, ġiet ikkonfermata li infettat papra selvaġġa mejta, li nstabet nhar it-Tnejn, f'art mistagħdra qrib Lyon fil-Lvant ta' Franza.
reference: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.

source: Franza hija s-seba’ pajjiż fl-Unjoni Ewropea li sofra minn dan il-virus; wara l-Awstrija, il-Ġermanja, is-Slovenja, il-Bulgarija, il-Greċja u l-Italja.
reference: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.

source: Każijiet b'suspett ta’ H5N1 fil-Kroazja u d-Danimarka għadhom mhumiex ikkonfermati.
reference: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.

source: Chambers kien ħarrek lil Alla għall-"imwiet mifruxa madwar id-dinja, il-qerda u t-terrorizzazzjoni ta’ miljuni u miljuni ta’ abitanti tad-Dinja."
reference: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."

source: Chambers, agnostiku, jargumenta li l-kawża tiegħu hija "frivola" u "kwalunkwe persuna tista’ tħarrek lil ħaddieħor."
reference: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."

source: L-istorja ppreżentata fl-opra Franċiża, minn Camille Saint-Saens, hija ta' artist "li ħajtu hija kkontrollata mill-imħabba għad-drogi u l-Ġappun."
reference: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."

source: B'riżultat ta' dan, l-artisti jpejpu joints tal-kannabis fuq il-palk, u t-teatru stess jinkoraġixxi lill-udjenza biex jagħmlu bħalhom.
reference: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.

source: L-Eks Speaker tal-Kamra Newt Gingrich, il-gvernatur ta’ Texas Rick Perry, u l-Membru tal-Kungress Michele Bachmann spiċċaw fir-raba’, il-ħames u s-sitt post, rispettivament.
reference: Former House Speaker Newt Gingrich, Texas governor Rick Perry, and Congresswoman Michele Bachmann finished in fourth, fifth, and sixth place, respectively.

source: Wara li daħlu r-riżultati, Gingrich faħħar li Santorum, imma kellu kliem iebes kontra Romney, li f'ismu kienu ġew mxandra riklami negattivi tal-kampanja f'Iowa kontra Gingrich.
reference: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.

source: Perry iddikjara "se nirritorna lejn Texas biex nevalwa r-riżultati tal-kawkażu ta' llejla, niddetermina jekk hemmx triq ’il quddiem għalija nnifsi f’din it-tellieqa", iżda wara qal li hu se jibqa' fit-tellieqa u jikkompeti fil-primarja tal-21 ta’ Jannar ġewwa South Carolina.
reference: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.

source: Bachmann, li rebħet il-Votazzjoni Ames Straw f’Awwissu, iddeċidiet li ttemm il-kampanja tagħha.
reference: Bachmann, who won the Ames Straw Poll in August, decided to end her campaign.

source: Il-fotografu kien ittrasportat għaċ-Ċentru Mediku Ronald Reagan tal-UCLA, fejn sussegwentement miet.
reference: The photographer was transported to Ronald Reagan UCLA Medical Center, where he subsequently died.

source: Huwa rrappurtat li kellu 20 sena magħluqa. F'dikjarazzjoni, Bieber qal "[g]ħalkemm ma kontx preżenti u lanqas kont involut direttament f'dan l-inċident traġiku, il-ħsibijiet u t-talb tiegħi huma mal-familja tal-vittma."
reference: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."

source: Is-sit web tal-aħbarijiet tad-divertiment TMZ jifhem li l-fotografu waqqaf il-vettura tiegħu fuq in-naħa l-oħra ta’ Sepulveda Boulevard u pprova jieħu ritratti tal-waqfa tal-pulizija qabel jaqsam it-triq u jkompli, u dan wassal biex l-uffiċjal tal-pulizija tal-California Highway Patrol li jmexxi t-traffiku jieqaf u jordnalu jmur lura, darbtejn.
reference: Entertainment news website TMZ understands the photographer stopped his vehicle on the other side of Sepulveda Boulevard and attempted to take pictures of the police stop before crossing the road and continuing, prompting the California Highway Patrol police officer conducting the traffic stop to order him back across, twice.

source: Skont il-pulizija, ix-xufier tal-vettura li tajjar lill-fotografu mhux mistenni jiffaċċja akkużi kriminali.
reference: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.

source: Bi tmintax-il midalja biss disponibbli kuljum, numru ta' pajjiżi ma rnexxilhomx jaslu sal-podju tal-midalji.
reference: With only eighteen medals available a day, a number of countries have failed to make the medal podium.

source: Huma jinkludu l-Olanda, b'Anna Jochemsen tispiċċa d-disa' fil-klassi weqfin tan-nisa fis-Super-G lbieraħ, u l-Finlandja b'Katja Saarinen tispiċċa l-għaxar waħda fl-istess avveniment.
reference: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.

source: L-Awstraljan Mitchell Gourley spiċċa fil-ħdax-il post tas-Super-G tal-irġiel. Il-kompetitur Ċek Oldrich Jelinek spiċċa fis-sittax-il post fis-seduta Super-G tal-irġiel.
reference: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.

source: Arly Velasquez tal-Messiku spiċċa fil-ħmistax-il post fis-Super-G bilqiegħda tal-irġiel. Adam Hall tan-New Zealand spiċċa fid-disa’ post tas-Super-G bil-wieqfa tal-irġiel.
reference: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.

source: L-iskijatur tal-irġiel tal-Polinja b’insuffiċjenza fil-vista Maciej Krezel u l-gwida Anna Ogarzynska spiċċaw fit-tlettax-il post fis-Super-G. Jong Seork Park tal-Korea t’Isfel spiċċa fl-erbgħa u għoxrin post fis-Super-G bilqiegħda tal-irġiel.
reference: Poland's men's visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the Super-G. South Korea's Jong Seork Park finished twenty-fourth in the men's sitting Super-G.

source: Il-forżi taż-żamma tal-paċi tan-NU, li waslu f'Ħaiti wara t-terremot tal-2010, qed jiġu akkużati bit-tixrid tal-marda li bdiet qrib fejn kienu kkampjati t-truppi.
reference: UN peacekeepers, whom arrived in Haiti after the 2010 earthquake, are being blamed for the spread of the disease which started near the troop's encampment.

source: Skont il-kawża, l-iskart mill-kamp tan-NU ma kienx issanitizzat sewwa, u dan ikkawża li l-batterji jidħlu fit-tributarja tax-Xmara Artibonite, waħda mill-akbar ta' Ħaiti.
reference: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.

source: Qabel il-wasla tat-truppi, il-Haiti ma kienx iltaqa’ ma’ problemi relatati mal-marda sa mis-snin 1800.
reference: Prior to the arrival of troops, Haiti had not encountered problems related to the disease since the 1800s.

source: L-Istitut ta’ Ħaiti għall-Ġustizzja u d-Demokrazija rrefera għal studji indipendenti li jissuġġerixxu li l-battaljun għaż-żamma tal-paċi tan-NU tan-Nepal, b’mod mhux intenzjonat, ħa l-marda f’Ħaiti.
reference: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.

source: Danielle Lantagne, esperta tan-NU dwar il-marda, qalet li t-tifqigħa kienet probabbilment ikkawżata mill-gwardjani tal-paċi.
reference: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.

source: Hamilton ikkonferma li meta ddaħħal fl-Isptar ta’ Howard University il-pazjent kien f’kundizzjoni stabbli.
reference: Hamilton confirmed Howard University Hospital admitted the patient in stable condition.

source: Il-pazjent kien mar in-Niġerja, fejn kienu seħħew xi każijiet tal-virus tal-Ebola.
reference: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.

source: L-isptar segwa protokoll biex jikkontrolla l-infezzjonijiet, inkluża s-separazzjoni tal-pazjent minn nies oħra biex tiġi evitata infezzjoni possibbli ta’ ħaddieħor.
reference: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.

source: Qabel “The Simpsons” Simon ħadem fuq diversi programmi f’pożizzjonijiet varji.
reference: Before The Simpsons Simon had worked on several shows in various positions.

source: Matul is-snin 80 huwa ħadem fuq shows bħal Taxi, Cheers, u The Tracy Ullman Show.
reference: During the 1980s he worked on shows such as Taxi, Cheers, and The Tracy Ullman Show.

source: Fl-1989, huwa assista biex jikkrea “The Simpsons” ma’ Brooks u Groening, u kien responsabbli għall-għażla tal-ewwel tim li kiteb il-programm.
reference: In 1989 he helped create The Simpsons with Brooks and Groening, and was responsible for hiring the show's first writing team.

source: Minkejja li telaq mill-programm fl-1993 huwa żamm it-titlu ta’ produttur eżekuttiv, u kompla jirċievi għexieren ta’ miljuni ta’ dollari għal kull staġun bħala royalties.
reference: Despite leaving the show in 1993 he kept the title of executive producer, and continued to receive tens of millions of dollars every season in royalties.

source: Aktar kmieni, l-aġenzija tal-aħbarijiet Ċiniża Xinhua rrappurtat li ġie maħtuf ajruplan.
reference: Earlier the Chinese news agency Xinhua reported a plane to be hijacked.

source: Rapporti aktar tard imbagħad iddikjaraw li l-ajruplan irċieva theddida ta’ bomba u ġie ddevjat lura lejn l-Afganistan, fejn niżel f’Kandahar.
reference: Later reports then stated the plane received a bomb threat and was diverted back to Afghanistan, landing in Kandahar.

source: Ir-rapporti bikrija jgħidu li l-ajruplan ġie ddevjat lura lejn l-Afganistan wara li ġie miċħud li jagħmel inżul ta’ emerġenza f’Urümqi.
reference: The early reports say the plane was diverted back to Afghanistan after being denied an emergency landing in Ürümqi.

source: L-inċidenti tal-ajru huma komuni fl-Iran, li għandu flotta li qed tiqdim u li hija miżmuma ħażin ħafna kemm għall-operazzjonijiet ċivili kif ukoll dawk militari.
reference: Air accidents are common in Iran, which has an aging fleet that is poorly maintained both for civil and military operations.

source: Minħabba sanzjonijiet internazzjonali ma setgħux jinxtraw ajruplani ġodda.
reference: International sanctions have meant that new aircraft cannot be purchased.

source: Aktar kmieni din il-ġimgħa, iġġarraf ħelikopter tal-pulizija li qatel tliet persuni u darab tlieta oħra.
reference: Earlier this week, a police helicopter crash killed three people and wounded three more.

source: Ix-xahar li għadda l-Iran kellhom l-agħar diżastru tal-ajru fl-aħħar snin meta ajruplan li kien sejjer lejn l-Armenja ġġarraf u qatel l-168 persuna abbord.
reference: Last month Iran saw its worst air disaster in years when an airliner heading to Armenia crashed, killing the 168 on board.

source: Fl-istess xahar, ajruplan ieħor qabeż ir-runway ġewwa Mashhad, daħal ġo ħajt, u qatel sbatax-il persuna.
reference: The same month saw another airliner overrun a runway at Mashhad and strike a wall, killing seventeen.

source: Aerosmith ikkanċellaw il-kunċerti tagħhom li kien fadal fit-tour tagħhom.
reference: Aerosmith have cancelled their remaining concerts on their tour.

source: Il-grupp tar-rock kien mistenni jdur l-Istati Uniti u l-Kanada sas-16 ta' Settembru.
reference: The rock band was due to tour the United States and Canada until September 16.

source: Huma kkanċellaw it-tour wara li l-kantant ewlieni Steven Tyler weġġa' wara li waqa' minn fuq il-palk meta kien qed idoqq fil-5 ta' Awwissu.
reference: They have cancelled the tour after lead singer Steven Tyler was injured after he fell off stage while performing on August 5.

source: Murray tilef l-ewwel sett f’tie break (mezz biex jiġi deċiż rebbieħ wara li ġew ras imb’ras) wara li ż-żewġ irġiel żammew kull serve fis-sett.
reference: Murray lost the first set in a tie break after both men held each and every serve in the set.

source: Del Potro kellu l-vantaġġ bikri fit-tieni set, iżda dan ukoll kien jeħtieġ “tie break” wara li laħaq 6-6.
reference: Del Potro had the early advantage in the second set, but this too required a tie break after reaching 6-6.

source: Potro rċieva trattament fi spallejh f’dan il-punt imma rnexxielu jirritorna fil-logħba.
reference: Potro received treatment to his shoulder at this point but managed to return to the game.

source: Il-programm beda fit-8:30 ta' filgħaxija ħin lokali (15:00 UTC).
reference: The program started at 8:30 p.m. local time (15.00 UTC).

source: Kantanti famużi minn madwar il-pajjiż kollu ppreżentaw “bhajans”, jew kanzunetti devozzjonali, ma’ saqajn Shri Shyam.
reference: Famous singers across the country presented bhajans, or devotional songs, to Shri Shyam's feet.

source: Il-kantant Sanju Sharma beda s-serata, segwit minn Jai Shankar Choudhary. Ippreżenta lil chhappan bhog bhajan ukoll. Il-kantant, Raju Khandelwal kien qed jakkumpanjah.
reference: Singer Sanju Sharma started the evening, followed by Jai Shankar Choudhary. esented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.

source: Imbagħad, Lakkha Singh ħa r-rwol ewlieni fil-kant tal-bhajans.
reference: Then, Lakkha Singh took the lead in singing the bhajans.

source: 108 dixxijiet ta' Chhappan Bhog (fil-Ħinduiżmu, 56 affarijiet li jittieklu differenti, bħal ħelu, frott, ġewż, ikel imsajjar, eċċ. li huma offruti lil alla) ġew servuti lil Baba Shyam.
reference: 108 plates of Chhappan Bhog (in Hinduism, 56 different edible items, like, sweets, fruits, nuts, dishes etc. which are offered to deity) were served to Baba Shyam.

source: Lakkha Singh ippreżenta lil chhappan bhog bhajan ukoll. Il-kantant, Raju Khandelwal kien qed jakkumpanjah.
reference: Lakkha Singh presented the chhappan bhog bhajan as well. Singer, Raju Khandelwal was accompanying him.

source: Fil-preżentazzjoni ewlenija tal-Ħamis tat-“Tokyo Game Show”, il-president tan-Nintendo Satoru Iwata żvela d-disinn tal-kontrollur għall-console Nintendo Revolution il-ġdid tal-kumpanija.
reference: At Thursday's keynote presentation of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata unveiled the controller design for the company's new Nintendo Revolution console.

source: Simili għal remowt tat-televiżjoni, il-kontrollur juża żewġ sensers imqiegħda ħdejn it-televiżjoni tal-utent biex jittrijangula l-pożizzjoni tiegħu fi spazju tridimensjonali.
reference: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.

source: Dan se jippermetti lill-plejers li jikkontrollaw l-azzjonijiet u l-movimenti fil-logħbiet vidjow billi jċaqalqu l-apparat fl-arja.
reference: This will allow players to control actions and movements in video games by moving the device through the air.

source: Giancarlo Fisichella tilef il-kontroll tal-karozza tiegħu u temm it-tellieqa ftit wara li bdiet.
reference: Giancarlo Fisichella lost control of his car and ended the race very soon after the start.

source: Is-sieħeb tiegħu fit-tim Fernando Alonso kien fuq quddiem fil-biċċa l-kbira tat-tellieqa, iżda spiċċaha eżatt wara l-pit-stop tiegħu, probabbilment minħabba li kellu r-rota ta’ quddiem tal-lemin imdaħħla ħażin.
reference: His teammate Fernando Alonso was in the lead for most of the race, but ended it right after his pit-stop, probably because a badly tucked right front wheel.

source: Michael Schumacher temm it-tellieqa tiegħu ftit wara Alonso, minħabba danni fis-sospensjoni minħabba l-bosta battalji tul it-tellieqa.
reference: Michael Schumacher ended his race not long after Alonso, because of the suspension damage in the numerous battles during the race.

source: Hi ħelwa ħafna u tkanta pjuttost tajjeb ukoll," qal skont traskrizzjoni tal-konferenza tal-aħbarijiet.
reference: "She’s very cute and sings quite well, too," he said according to a transcript of the news conference.

source: "Kull darba li għamilna l-provi ta’ din, ġejt emozzjonat, b’qalbi kollha."
reference: "I was moved every time we did a rehearsal on this, from the bottom of my heart."

source: Madwar 3 minuti wara t-tnedija, kamera abbord uriet ħafna biċċiet ta’ fowm iżolanti jinqalgħu minn mat-tank tal-fjuwil.
reference: Around 3 minutes into the launch, an on-board camera showed numerous pieces of insulation foam break away from the fuel tank.

source: Madankollu, mhumiex maħsuba li kkawżaw xi ħsara fix-shuttle.
reference: However, they are not thought to have caused any damage to the shuttle.

source: Il-kap tal-programm tax-shuttle tan-NASA N. Wayne Hale Jr qal li r-ragħwa waqgħet "wara l-ħin li ninsabu mħassbin dwaru."
reference: NASA's shuttle program chief N. Wayne Hale Jr. said the foam had fallen "after the time we are concerned about."

source: Ħames minuti wara l-bidu tal-wirja jibda jqum ir-riħ, madwar minuta wara, ir-riħ qed jilħaq 70km/siegħa... imbagħad tibda nieżla x-xita, imma tant qawwija u bi qtar kbar li tniggiżlek il-ġilda bħal labra, imbagħad beda nieżel is-silġ, in-nies bdew jippanikjaw u jwerżqu u jiġru fuq xulxin.
reference: Five minutes into the display a wind starts rolling in, about a minute later, the wind is reaching 70km/h... then the rain comes, but so hard and so large that it slaps your skin like a needle, then hail fell from the sky, people panicking and screaming and running over each other.

source: Tlift lil oħti u lill-ħabib tagħha, u fi triqti kien hemm żewġ persuni b’diżabilità f’siġġijiet tar-roti, in-nies jaqbżu minn fuqhom u jimbuttawhom," qal Armand Versace.
reference: I lost my sister and her friend, and on my way there were two disabled people in wheelchairs, people just jumping over and pushing them," Armand Versace said.

source: NHK irrapporta wkoll li l-impjant nukleari ta’ Kashiwazaki Kariwa fil-prefettura ta’ Niigata kien qed jaħdem normali.
reference: NHK also reported that the Kashiwazaki Kariwa nuclear power plant in Niigata prefecture was operating normally.

source: Hokuriku Electric Power Co. Irrapportat li ma kienx hemm effetti kkważati mit-terremot u li r-reatturi Numru 1 u 2 fl-impjant nukleari tagħha ta’ Shika ngħalqu.
reference: Hokuriku Electric Power Co. reported no effects from the earthquake and that the Number 1 and 2 reactors at its Shika nuclear power plant were shut down.

source: Huwa rrappurtat li madwar 9400 dar fir-reġjun m’għandhomx ilma u madwar 100 m’għandhomx elettriku.
reference: It is reported that some 9400 homes in the region are without water and approximately 100 without electricity.

source: Xi toroq saritilhom il-ħsara, is-servizz ferrovjarju ġie interrott fiż-żoni milquta, u l-Ajruport ta’ Noto fil-prefettura ta’ Ishikawa għadu magħluq.
reference: Some roads have been damaged, railway service interrupted in the affected areas, and the Noto Airport in Ishikawa prefecture remains closed.

source: Bomba waħda splodiet quddiem l-uffiċċju tal-gvernatur ġenerali.
reference: One bomb exploded outside the governor general's office.

source: Tliet bombi oħra splodew qrib bini tal-gvern f'perjodu ta' sagħtejn.
reference: Three more bombs exploded near government buildings in a period of two hours.

source: Xi rapporti prrovdew li n-numru uffiċjali tal-imwiet huma tmienja, u rapporti uffiċjali jikkonfermaw li kien hemm sa 30 midruba; iżda n-numri finali għadhom mhumiex magħrufin.
reference: Some reports put the official death toll at eight, and official reports confirm that up to 30 were injured; but final numbers are not yet known.

source: Kemm l-aċidu ċjanuriku kif ukoll il-melamina nstabu f’kampjuni tal-awrina ta’ annimali domestiċi li mietu wara li kkonsmaw ikel għall-annimali domestiċi li kien ikkontaminat.
reference: Both cyanuric acid and melamine were found in urine samples from pets that died after consuming contaminated pet food.

source: Iż-żewġ komposti jirreaġixxu ma' xulxin biex jiffurmaw kristalli li jistgħu jimblukkaw il-funzjoni tal-kliewi, qalu r-riċerkaturi fl-università.
reference: The two compounds react with one another to form crystals that may block kidney function, researchers at the university said.

source: Ir-riċerkaturi osservaw li ffurmaw kristalli fl-urina tal-qtates biż-żieda tal-melamina u l-aċidu ċjanuriku.
reference: The researchers observed crystals formed in cat urine by the addition of melamine and cyanuric acid.

source: Il-kompożizzjoni ta’ dawn il-kristalli taqbel ma’ dawk misjuba fl-awrina ta’ annimali domestiċi affettwati meta mqabbla permezz ta’ spettroskopija infraaħmar (FTIR).
reference: The composition of these crystals matches those found in the urine of affected pets when compared by infrared spectroscopy (FTIR).

source: Ma nafx jekk tirrealizzax jew le, imma ħafna mill-oġġetti mill-Amerika Ċentrali daħlu f’dan il-pajjiż mingħajr dazju.
reference: I don't know if you realize it or not, but most of the goods from Central America came into this country duty-free.

source: Madankollu, tmenin fil-mija tal-merkanzija tagħna kienu ntaxxati permezz ta' tariffi fil-pajjiżi tal-Amerika Ċentrali. Aħna ngħinukom.
reference: Yet eighty percent of our goods were taxed through tariffs in Central American countries. we treat you.

source: Dan ma dehrlix li kien jagħmel sens; ċertament ma kienx ġust.
reference: That didn't seem to make sense to me; it certainly wasn't fair.

source: Ngħid biss lin-nies li intom tittrattawna kif aħna nittrattaw lilkom.
reference: All I say to people is you treat us the way we treat you.

source: Il-Gvernatur ta’ California Arnold Schwarzenegger iffirma abbozz fil-liġi li jipprojbixxi l-bejgħ jew il-kiri ta’ logħob tal-kompjuter vjolenti lil minuri.
reference: California Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger signed into law a bill that bans the sale or rental of violent video games to minors.

source: L-abbozz jirrikjedi li vidjowgejms vjolenti mibjugħa fl-istat ta’ Kalifornja jiġu ttikkettati b’dekalkomanija li fuqha jkollha "18" u jagħmel il-bejgħ tagħhom lil minuri kkastigat b’multa ta’ $1000 għal kull reat.
reference: The bill requires violent video games sold in the state of California to be labeled with a decal reading "18" and makes their sale to a minor punishable by a fine of $1000 per offense.

source: Id-Direttur tal-Prosekuzzjonijiet Pubbliċi, Kier Starmer QC, għamel dikjarazzjoni dalgħodu fejn ħabbar il-prosekuzzjoni kemm ta’ Huhne kif ukoll ta’ Pryce.
reference: The Director of Public Prosecutions, Kier Starmer QC, gave a statement this morning announcing the prosecution of both Huhne and Pryce.

source: Huhne rriżenja u se jiġi sostitwit fil-Kabinett minn Ed Davey MP. Norman Lamb MP huwa mistenni li jieħu l-impjieg tal-Ministru għan-Negozju li se jitlaq minnu Davey.
reference: Huhne has resigned and he will be replaced in the Cabinet by Ed Davey MP. Norman Lamb MP is expected to take the Business Minister job Davey is vacating.

source: Huhne u Pryce huma skedati li jidhru fil-Qorti tal-Maġistrati ta’ Westminster fis-16 ta’ Frar.
reference: Huhne and Pryce are scheduled to appear at the Westminster Magistrates Court on February 16.

source: Dawk li mietu kienu Nicholas Alden ta’ 25 sena u Zachary Cuddeback ta’ 21 sena. Cuddeback kien is-sewwieq.
reference: The fatalities were Nicholas Alden, 25, and Zachary Cuddeback, 21. Cuddeback had been the driver.

source: Edgar Veguilla spiċċa b’feriti fuq driegħu u x-xedaq filwaqt li Kristoffer Schneider kien jeħtieġ operazzjoni rikostruttiva f’wiċċu.
reference: Edgar Veguilla received arm and jaw wounds while Kristoffer Schneider was left requiring reconstructive surgery for his face.

source: L-arma ta' Uka ma ħadmitx waqt li kienet ippuntata lejn ras il-ħames raġel. Schneider għandu uġigħ kontinwu, għama f'għajn waħda, nieqes minn parti tal-kranju u wiċċ mibni mill-ġdid mit-titanju.
reference: Uka's weapon failed whilst pointed at a fifth man's head. Schneider has ongoing pain, blindness in one eye, a missing section of skull and a face rebuilt from titanium.

source: Schneider xehed permezz ta’ link bil-vidjow minn bażi tal-USAF f’art twelidu.
reference: Schneider testified via videolink from a USAF base in his homeland.

source: Apparti mill-avveniment ta’ nhar l-Erbgħa, Carpanedo kkompeta f’żewġ tlielaq individwali fil-Kampjonati.
reference: Beyond Wednesday's event, Carpanedo competed in two individual races at the Championships.

source: L-ewwel waħda tagħha kienet is-Slalom, fejn kisbet “Did Not Finish” (Ma Spiċċatx) fl-ewwel ġirja tagħha. 36 mill-116-il kompetitur kellhom l-istess riżultat f’dik it-tellieqa.
reference: Her first was the Slalom, where she earned a Did Not Finish in her first run. 36 of the 116 competitors had the same result in that race.

source: Fit-tellieqa l-oħra tagħha, il-Giant Slalom, spiċċat fl-għaxar post fil-grupp bilqiegħda tan-nisa b’ħin ikkombinat ta’ 4:41.30, 2:11.60 minuti iktar bil-mod mill-Awstrijaka Claudia Loesch li ħadet l-ewwel post u 1:09.02 minuti iktar bil-mod minn Gyöngyi Dani tal-Ungerija li waslet fid-disa’ post.
reference: Her other race, the Giant Slalom, saw her finish in tenth in the women's sitting group with a combined run time of 4:41.30, 2:11.60 minutes slower than first place finisher Austrian Claudia Loesch and 1:09.02 minutes slower than the ninth place finisher Gyöngyi Dani of Hungary.

source: Erba’ skjiaturi fil-grupp ta’ bilqiegħda tan-nisa ma rnexxilhomx itemmu d-dawriet tagħhom, u 45 mill-117-il skijatur totali fil-Giant Slalom ma kklassifikawx fit-tellieqa.
reference: Four skiers in the women's sitting group failed to finish their runs, and 45 of the 117 total skiers in the Giant Slalom failed to rank in the race.

source: Il-Pulizija ta’ Madhya Pradesh irkupraw il-laptop u l-mowbajl li kienu nsterqu.
reference: The Madhya Pradesh Police recovered the stolen laptop and mobile phone.

source: Id-Deputat Spettur Ġenerali D K Arya qal, "Arrestajna ħames persuni li stupraw lill-mara Svizzera u rkuprajna l-mowbajl u l-laptop tagħha".
reference: Deputy Inspector General D K Arya said, "We have arrested five persons who raped the Swiss woman and recovered her mobile and laptop".

source: L-akkużati huma msemmijin bħala Baba Kanjar, Bhutha Kanjar, Rampro Kanjar, Gaza Kanjar u Vishnu Kanjar.
reference: The accused are named as Baba Kanjar, Bhutha Kanjar, Rampro Kanjar, Gaza Kanjar and Vishnu Kanjar.

source: Is-supretendent tal-pulizija Chandra Shekhar Solanki qal li l-akkużat deher il-qorti b’wiċċu mgħotti.
reference: Police superintendent Chandra Shekhar Solanki said the accused appeared in court with covered faces.

source: Għalkemm tliet persuni kienu ġewwa d-dar meta l-karozza ħabtet magħha, ħadd minnhom ma weġġa'.
reference: Although three people were inside the house when the car impacted it, none of them were hurt.

source: Madankollu, is-sewwieq ġarrab feriti serji f'rasu.
reference: However, the driver sustained serious injuries to the head.

source: It-triq fejn seħħet il-ħabta ngħalqet temporanjament waqt li s-servizzi ta' emerġenza ħelsu lis-sewwieq mill-Audi TT ħamra.
reference: The road where the crash happened was temporarily closed while emergency services freed the driver from the red Audi TT.

source: Inizjalment iddaħħal fl-Isptar James Paget ġewwa Great Yarmouth.
reference: He was initially hospitalised in the James Paget Hospital in Great Yarmouth.

source: Wara, ġie ttrasferit fl-Isptar ta’ Addenbrooke ġewwa Cambridge.
reference: He was subsequently relocated to Addenbrooke's Hospital in Cambridge.

source: Adekoya ilha minn dak iż-żmien fil-Qorti tax-Xeriff ta' Edinburgh akkużata li qatlet lil binha.
reference: Adekoya has since been in Edinburgh Sheriff Court charged with murdering her son.

source: Hija tinsab taħt kustodja sakemm tiġi akkużata u pproċessata, iżda kwalunkwe testimonjanza ta’ xhieda okulari tista’ tkun influwenzata minħabba li ritratt tagħha ġie ppubblikata b’mod wiesa'’.
reference: She is in custody pending indictment and trial, but any eyewitness evidence may be tainted because her image has been widely published.

source: Din hija prattika komuni fi bnadi oħra fir-Renju Unit imma l-ġustizzja Skoċċiża taħdem b'mod differenti u l-qrati jqisu l-pubblikazzjoni ta' ritratti bħala potenzjalment ta' preġudizzju.
reference: This is common practice elsewhere in the UK but Scottish justice works differently and courts have viewed publication of photos as potentially prejudicial.

source: Il-Professoressa Pamela Ferguson tal-Università ta’ Dundee tinnota li "l-ġurnalisti jidhru li qed jidħlu fil-periklu jekk jippubblikaw ritratti eċċ ta’ persuni suspettati."
reference: Professor Pamela Ferguson of the University of Dundee notes "journalists do seem to be walking a dangerous line if publishing photos etc of suspects."

source: L-Uffiċċju tal-Kuruna, li huwa inkarigat b’mod ġenerali mill-prosekuzzjonijiet, indika lill-ġurnalisti li mhux se jsiru iktar kummenti mill-inqas qabel l-akkuża.
reference: Crown Office, which is in overall charge of prosecutions, has indicated to journalists that no further comment will be made at least until indictment.

source: Id-dokument, skont l-iżvelar, se jirreferi għat-tilwima dwar il-fruntieri, li l-Palestina trid ibbażata fuq il-fruntieri qabel il-Gwerra tal-Lvant Nofsani tal-1967.
reference: The document, according to the leak, will refer to the borders dispute, which Palestine wants based on the borders before the 1967 Mideast War.

source: Suġġetti koperti oħrajn irrappurtat li jinkludu l-istat futur ta’ Ġerusalemm li huwa sagru għaż-żewġ nazzjonijiet u l-kwistjoni tal-Wied tal-Ġordan.
reference: Other topics covered reportedly include the future state of Jerusalem which is sacred to both nations and the Jordan Valley issue.

source: L-Iżrael jitlob preżenza militari kontinwa fil-wied għal għaxar snin ladarba jiġi ffirmat ftehim filwaqt li l-PA taqbel li tħalli din il-preżenza għal ħames snin biss.
reference: Israel demands an ongoing military presence in the valley for ten years once an agreement is signed while the PA agrees to leave such presence only for five years.

source: Tiraturi fil-prova supplimentari għall-kontroll tal-pesti kellhom jiġu ssorveljati mill-qrib mill-gwardjani tal-foresti, billi l-prova kienet immonitorjata u l-effettività tagħha evalwata.
reference: Shooters in the supplementary pest control trial were to be closely supervised by rangers, as the trial was monitored and its effectiveness evaluated.

source: Fi sħubija ta’ NPWS u Sporting Shooters Association of Australia (NSW) Inc., ġew reklutati voluntiera kkwalifikati, taħt il-programm tal-kaċċa tal-Assoċjazzjoni tad-Dilettanti tal-Isparar għall-Isports (“Sporting Shooters Association”).
reference: In a partnership of NPWS and the Sporting Shooters Association of Australia (NSW) Inc, qualified volunteers were recruited, under the Sporting Shooters Association's hunting program.

source: Skont Mick O'Flynn, l-Aġent Direttur tal-Konservazzjoni tal-Parks u l-Wirt mal-NPWS, l-erba' tiraturi magħżula għall-ewwel operazzjoni ta' sparar irċevew istruzzjoni komprensiva fis-sikurezza u t-taħriġ.
reference: According to Mick O'Flynn, the Acting Director Park Conservation and Heritage with the NPWS, the four shooters selected for the first shooting operation received comprehensive safety and training instruction.

source: Martelly ħalef Kunsill Elettorali Proviżorju (CEP) ġdid ta’ disa’ membri lbieraħ.
reference: Martelly swore in a new Provisional Electoral Council (CEP) of nine members yesterday.

source: Dan huwa l-ħames CEP (Kunsill Elettorali Provviżorju) ta’ Martelly f’erba’ snin.
reference: It is Martelly's fifth CEP in four years.

source: Ix-xahar li għadda kummissjoni presidenzjali rrakkomandat ir-riżenja tas-CEP preċedenti bħala parti minn pakkett ta’ miżuri biex il-pajjiż jimxi lejn elezzjonijiet ġodda.
reference: Last month a presidential commission recommended the prior CEP's resignation as part of a package of measures to move the country towards new elections.

source: Il-kummissjoni kienet ir-risposta ta’ Martelly għal protesti mifruxa kontra r-reġim li bdew f’Ottubru.
reference: The commission was Martelly's response to widespread anti-regime protests that started in October.

source: Il-protesti li kultant kienu vjolenti ġew skattati min-nuqqas li jsiru l-elezzjonijiet, li uħud minnhom kellhom isiru fl-2011.
reference: The sometimes-violent protests were triggered by failure to hold elections, some due since 2011.

source: Ġew irrappurtati madwar 60 każ ta’ iPods bil-ħsara minħabba tisħin żejjed, li kkawżaw total ta’ sitt nirien u ħallew erba’ persuni bi ħruq minuri.
reference: Around 60 cases of malfunctioning iPods overheating have been reported, causing a total of six fires and leaving four people with minor burns.

source: Il-Ministeru tal-Ekonomija, il-Kummerċ u l-Industrija (METI) tal-Ġappun qal li kien ġie mgħarraf dwar is-27 inċident relatati mal-apparati.
reference: Japan's Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry (METI) said that it had been aware of 27 accidents related to the devices.

source: Il-ġimgħa li għaddiet, METI ħabbret li Apple kienet infurmatha b’34 inċident addizzjonali ta’ tisħin żejjed, li l-kumpanija semmiethom bħala "mhux serji."
reference: Last week, METI announced that Apple had informed it of 34 additional overheating incidents, which the company called "non-serious."

source: Il-ministeru wieġeb billi sejjaħ il-posponiment tar-rapport minn Apple "verament ta’ dispjaċir."
reference: The ministry responded by calling Apple's postponement of the report "truly regrettable."

source: It-terremot laqat Mariana fis-7:19 a.m. fil-ħin lokali (9:19 p.m. GMT nhar il-Ġimgħa).
reference: The eathquake struck Mariana at 07:19 a.m. local time (09:19 p.m. GMT Friday).

source: L-uffiċċju tal-ġestjoni tal-emerġenzi tat-Tramuntana tal-Marianas qal li ma kien hemm l-ebda ħsarat irrappurtata fin-nazzjon.
reference: The Northern Marianas emergency management office said that there were no damages reported in the nation.

source: Barra minn hekk, iċ-Ċentru tal-Paċifiku tat-Twissija taz-Tsumani qal li ma kienx hemm indikazzjoni ta' Tsunami.
reference: Also the Pacific Tsunami Warning Center said that there was no Tsunami indication.

source: Persuna Filippina li qabel kienet pulizija żamm lit-turisti ta' Ħong Kong bħala ostaġġi billi ħataf ix-xarabank tagħhom f'Manila, il-kapitali tal-Filippini.
reference: A former Filipino policeman has kept Hong Kong tourists hostage by hijacking their bus in Manila, the capital of the Philippines.

source: Rolando Mendoza spara x-xkubetta M16 tiegħu fid-direzzjoni tat-turisti.
reference: Rolando Mendoza fired his M16 rifle at the tourists.

source: Diversi ostaġġi ġew salvati u mill-inqas sitta ġew ikkonfermati mejta s’issa.
reference: Several hostages have been rescued and least six have been confirmed dead so far.

source: Sitt ostaġġi, inklużi t-tfal u l-anzjani, ġew rilaxxati kmieni, kif ukoll il-fotografi Filippini.
reference: Six hostages, including the children and elderly, were released early, as were the Filipino photographers.

source: Il-fotografi aktar tard ħadu l-post ta' mara anzjana minħabba li kellha bżonn tuża t-tojlit. Mendoza nqatel bl-armi tan-nar.
reference: The photographers later took the place of an aged lady as she needed the lavatory. Mendoza was gunned down.

source: Liggins segwa l-passi ta’ missieru u daħal f’karriera fil-mediċina.
reference: Liggins followed in his father’s footsteps and entered a career in medicine.

source: Huwa ġie mħarreġ bħala ostetriku u beda jaħdem fl-Isptar Nazzjonali tan-Nisa ta’ Auckland fl-1959.
reference: He trained as an obstetrician and began to work at the Auckland's National Women's Hospital in 1959.

source: Meta kien jaħdem l-isptar, Liggins beda jinvestiga l-ħlas prematur waqt il-ħin liberu tiegħu.
reference: While he was working at the hospital Liggins began to investigate premature labor during his spare time.

source: Ir-riċerka tiegħu wriet li jekk jiġi amministrat ormon dan iħaffef il-maturazzjoni tal-pulmun tal-fetu tat-tarbija.
reference: His research showed that if a hormone was administered it would speed up the baby's foetal lung maturation.

source: Xinhua rrappurtat li nhar l-Erbgħa l-investigaturi tal-gvern sabu żewġ 'kaxxi suwed' li huma r-reġistraturi tat-titjira.
reference: Xinhua reported that government investigators recovered two 'black box' flight recorders on Wednesday.

source: Lottaturi sħabha wkoll taw ġieħ lil Luna.
reference: Fellow wrestlers also paid tribute to Luna.

source: Tommy Dreamer qal "Luna kienet l-ewwel Reġina tal-Estrem. L-ewwel maniġer tiegħi. Luna mietet fil-lejl taż-żewġ qmura. Tabilħaqq uniku bħalha. Mara b'saħħitha."
reference: Tommy Dreamer said "Luna was the first Queen of Extreme. My first manager. Luna passed away on the night of two moons. Pretty unique just like her. Strong woman."

source: Dustin "Goldust" Runnels ikkummenta li "Luna kienet mhux tas-soltu bħali...forsi saħansitra iktar minni...inħobbha u nimmissjaha...nisperaw li qiegħda f’post aħjar."
reference: Dustin "Goldust" Runnels commented that "Luna was as freaky as me...maybe even more...love her and will miss her...hopefully she's in a better place."

source: Mill-1,400 persuna mistħarrġa qabel l-elezzjoni federali tal-2010, dawk li opponew li l-Awstralja ssir repubblika żiedu bi 8 fil-mija mis-sena 2008.
reference: Out of 1,400 people polled prior to the 2010 federal election, those who oppose Australia becoming a republic grew by 8 per cent since 2008.

source: Waqt il-kampanja tal-elezzjoni federali tal-2010, il-Prim Ministru proviżorju Julia Gillard sostniet li hija temmen li l-Awstralja għandha ssir repubblika meta jintemm ir-renju tar-Reġina Eliżabetta II.
reference: Caretaker Prime Minister Julia Gillard claimed during the campaign of the 2010 federal election that she believed Australia should become a republic at the end of Queen Elizabeth II's reign.

source: 34 fil-mija ta' dawk li pparteċipaw fl-istħarriġ jaqblu ma' din il-fehma, u jixtiequ li r-Reġina Eliżabetta tkun l-aħħar monarka tal-Awstralja.
reference: 34 per cent of those in the poll share this view, wanting Queen Elizabeth II to be Australia's last monarch.

source: Fl-estremitajiet tal-votazzjoni, 29 fil-mija ta’ dawk mistħarrġa jemmnu li l-Awstralja għandha ssir repubblika kemm jista’ jkun malajr, filwaqt li 31 fil-mija jemmnu li l-Awstralja qatt m’għandha ssir repubblika.
reference: At the extremes of the poll, 29 per cent of those surveyed believe Australia should become a republic as soon as possible, while 31 per cent believe Australia should never become a republic.

source: Ir-rebbieħ tal-midalja tad-deheb Olimpika kien mistenni jgħum fil-100 m u l-200 m freestyle u fi tliet rilejs tal-Logħob tal-Commonwealth, imma minħabba l-ilmenti tiegħu kien hemm dubji dwar l-istat ta' saħħtu.
reference: The Olympic gold medalist was due to swim in the 100m and 200m freestyle and in three relays at the Commonwealth Games, but due to his complaints his fitness has been in doubt.

source: Huwa ma setax jieħu l-mediċini meħtieġa għall-uġigħ tiegħu peress li huma pprojbiti mil-Logħob.
reference: He has been unable to take the drugs needed to overcome his pain as they are banned from the Games.

source: Curtis Cooper, matematiku u professur tax-xjenza tal-kompjuter ġewwa l-Università ta’ Missouri Ċentrali, skopra l-ikbar numru prim magħruf sal-25 ta’ Jannar.
reference: Curtis Cooper, a mathematician and computer science professor at the University of Central Missouri, has discovered the largest known prime number to date on January 25.

source: Bosta nies ivverifikaw l-iskoperta billi użaw ħardwer u softwer differenti sal-bidu ta’ Frar u din ġiet imħabbra nhar it-Tlieta.
reference: Several people verified the discovery using different hardware and software by the beginning of February and it was announced on Tuesday.

source: Huwa possibbli li l-kometi kienu sors ta’ konsenja tal-ilma lid-dinja flimkien ma’ materja organika li tista’ tifforma proteini u ssostni l-ħajja.
reference: Comets may possibly have been a source of water delivery to the earth along with organic matter that can form proteins and support life.

source: Ix-xjentisti jittamaw li jifhmu kif jiffurmaw il-pjaneti, speċjalment kif iffurmat id-Dinja, peress li l-kometi ħabtu mad-Dinja ħafna snin ilu.
reference: Scientists hope to understand how planets form, especially how the Earth formed, since comets collided with the Earth long ago.

source: Cuomo, ta’ 53 sena, beda jiggverna aktar kmieni din is-sena u ffirma abbozz ta’ liġi x-xahar li għadda li jillegalizza ż-żwieġ bejn persuni tal-istess sess.
reference: Cuomo, 53, began his governorship earlier this year and signed a bill last month legalizing same-sex marriage.

source: Huwa rrefera għall-għajdut bħala "paroli u stupidità politika".
reference: He referred to the rumors as "political chatter and silliness".

source: Huwa spekulat li se jippreżenta kandidatura għal president fl-2016.
reference: He is speculated to make a run for president in 2016.

source: NextGen hija sistema li l-FAA ssostni li se tippermetti lill-inġenji tal-ajru jtiru rotot iqsar u jiffrankaw miljuni ta’ gallun ta’ karburant kull sena u jnaqqsu l-emissjonijiet tal-karbonju.
reference: NextGen is a system the FAA claims would allow aircraft to fly shorter routes and save millions of gallons of fuel each year and cut carbon emissions.

source: Dan juża teknoloġija bbażata fuq is-satellita għall-kuntrarju ta’ teknoloġija antika bbażata fuq ir-radar tal-art biex jippermetti lill-kontrolluri tat-traffiku tal-ajru jidentifikaw inġenji tal-ajru bi preċiżjoni akbar u jagħti lill-bdoti informazzjoni aktar preċiża.
reference: It uses satellite-based technology as opposed to older ground-radar-based technology to allow air traffic controllers to pinpoint aircraft with greater precision and give pilots more accurate information.

source: Ma qed jitpoġġa l-ebda trasport żejjed u l-ferroviji ta’ fuq l-art mhumiex se jieqfu f’Wembley, u l-parkeġġ tal-karozzi u l-faċilitajiet ta’ “park-and-ride” mhumiex disponibbli fuq l-art.
reference: No extra transport is being put on and overground trains will not stop at Wembley, and car parking and park-and-ride facilities are unavailable at the ground.

source: Biżgħat ta’ nuqqas ta’ trasport qajmu l-possibbiltà li l-logħba tkun sfurzata li tintlagħab bil-bibien magħluqin mingħajr il-partitarji tat-tim.
reference: Fears of lack of transportation raised the possibility that the game would be forced to play behind closed doors without the team's supporters.

source: Studju ppubblikat nhar il-Ħamis fil-ġurnal “Science” ipprovda rapport dwar il-ħolqien ta’ speċi ta’ għasfur ġdid fil-Gżejjer tal-Galapagos ġewwa l-Ekwador.
