source: Għalkemm tintuża b'mod estensiv, speċjalment fost dak li mhumiex Romani, il-kelma "Ġipsi" ta' spiss titqies bħala offensiva minħabba l-assoċjazzjonijiet tagħha mal-isterjotipi negattivi u perċezzjonijiet mhux eżatti dwar il-poplu Romani.
reference: Though it is widely used, especially among non-Romani, the word "Gypsy" is often considered offensive because of its associations with negative stereotypes and inaccurate perceptions of Romani people.

source: Jekk il-pajjiż li tkun ser iżżur isir suġġett għal avviż dwar l-ivvjaġġar, l-assigurazzjoni tas-saħħa tal-ivvjaġġar tiegħek jew l-assigurazzjoni tal-kanċellazzjoni tal-vjaġġ tiegħek jistgħu jiġu affettwati.
reference: If the country you will be visiting becomes subject to a travel advisory, your travel health insurance or your trip cancellation insurance may be affected.

source: Tista' tikkunsidra wkoll li tikkonsulta l-parir tal-gvernijiet l-oħra u mhux tiegħek, imma l-parir tagħhom huwa mfassal għaċ-ċittadini tagħhom.
reference: You may also wish to consult the advice of governments other than your own, but their advice is designed for their citizens.

source: Bħala eżempju wieħed, iċ-ċittadini Amerikani fil-Lvant Nofsani jistgħu jiffaċċjaw sitwazzjonijiet differenti mill-Ewropej jew l-Għarab.
reference: As one example, American citizens in the Middle East might face different situations from Europeans or Arabs.

source: Rapport konsultattiv huwa sommarju fil-qosor tas-sitwazzjoni politika f'pajjiż wieħed.
reference: Advisories are merely a brief summary of the political situation in one country.

source: Il-fehmiet ippreżentati huma ħafna drabi ta' malajr, ġenerali u ssimplifikati żżejjed meta mqabbla mal-informazzjoni aktar iddettaljata disponibbli f'postijiet oħra.
reference: The views presented are often cursory, general and oversimplified compared to the more detailed information available elsewhere.

source: Temp sever huwa t-terminu ġeneriku għal kwalunkwe fenomenu tat-temp perikoluż bil-potenzjal li jikkawża ħsara, tfixkil soċjali serju, jew telf ta’ ħajja umana.
reference: Severe weather is the generic term for any dangerous weather phenomenon with the potential to cause damage, serious social disruption, or loss of human life.

source: Temp sever jista’ jseħħ kullimkien fid-dinja, u hemm tipi differenti ta’ temp, li jistgħu jiddependu fuq il-ġeografija, it-topografija u l-kundizzjonijiet atmosferiċi.
reference: Severe weather can occur anywhere in the world, and there are different types of it, which can depend on geography, topography, and atmospheric conditions.

source: Irjieħ qawwija, silġ, xita eċċessiva, u nirien f’żoni mhux ikkultivati huma tipi u effetti ta’ temp sever, bħal ma huma l-maltempati bir-ragħad, it-trombi tal-arja, it-trombi tal-baħar, u ċ-ċikluni.
reference: High winds, hail, excessive precipitation, and wildfires are forms and effects of severe weather, as are thunderstorms, tornadoes, waterspouts, and cyclones.

source: Fenomeni tat-temp sever reġjonali u staġjonali jinkludu tempesti qawwijin tas-silġ, burraxki silġ, maltempati tas-silġ, u tempesti tat-trab.
reference: Regional and seasonal severe weather phenomena include blizzards, snowstorms, ice storms, and dust storms.

source: Il-vjaġġaturi huma avżati b'mod qawwi li għandhom ikunu jafu dwar kwalunkwe riskju ta' temp sever li jista' jaffettwa ż-żona tagħhom minħabba li jista' jaffettwa l-pjanijiet tal-ivvjaġġar tagħhom.
reference: Travellers are strongly advised to be aware of any risk of severe weather affecting their area as they may affect any travel plans.

source: Kull min jorganizza żjara ġewwa pajjiż li jista' jitqies bħala żona ta' gwerra jrid iwettaq taħriġ professjonali.
reference: Anyone planning a visit to a country that could be considered a war zone should get professional training.

source: Tiftixa fuq l-Internet għal “Kors dwar l-ambjent ostili” probabbilment ittella’ indirizz ta’ kumpanija lokali.
reference: A search of the Internet for 'Hostile environment course' will probably provide the address of a local company.

source: Kors normalment ikopri l-kwistjonijiet kollha diskussi hawnhekk f'ħafna aktar dettall, ġeneralment b'esperjenza prattika.
reference: A course will normally cover all the issues discussed here in far greater detail, usually with practical experience.

source: Kors normalment ikun minn 2-5 ijiem u jinvolvi role play, ħafna taħriġ fl-ewwel għajnuna u xi drabi taħriġ fl-użu tal-armi.
reference: A course will normally be from 2-5 days and will involve role play, a lot of first aid and sometimes weapons training.

source: Kotba u rivisti dwar is-sopravivenza fis-selvaġġ huma komuni, iżda m’hemmx wisq pubblikazzjonijiet dwar żoni tal-gwerra.
reference: Books and magazines dealing with wilderness survival are common, but publications dealing with war zones are few.

source: Il-vjaġġaturi li qed jippjanaw operazzjoni kirurġika għal assenjazzjoni sesswali mill-ġdid barra l-pajjiż iridu jiżguraw li qed iġorru d-dokumenti validi għall-vjaġġ tar-ritorn.
reference: Voyagers planning sex reassignment surgery abroad must ensure they're carrying valid documents for the return trip.

source: Ir-rieda tal-gvernijiet li joħorġu passaporti bil-ġeneru mhux iddikjarat (X) jew dokumenti aġġornati biex jaqblu mal-isem u l-ġeneru mixtieq tvarja.
reference: The willingness of governments to issue passports with gender not stated (X) or documents updated to match a desired name and gender varies.

source: Ir-rieda tal-gvernijiet barranin li jonoraw dawn id-dokumenti tvarja bl-istess mod wiesa'.
reference: Willingness of foreign governments to honour these documents is just as widely variable.

source: It-tfittxijiet fil-punti ta’ kontroll tas-sigurtà wkoll saru ferm aktar intrużivi fl-era ta’ wara l-11 ta’ Settembru 2001.
reference: Searches at security checkpoints have also become far more intrusive in the post-September 11, 2001 era.

source: Persuni transġeneru pre-operattivi m’għandhomx jistennew li jgħaddu mill-iskeners bil-privatezza u d-dinjità tagħhom intatti.
reference: Pre-operative transgender people should not expect to pass through the scanners with their privacy and dignity intact.

source: Il-kurrenti ta’ qsim (“rip currents”) huma l-fluss li jirritorna minn mewġ li jinqata’ mill-bajja, ħafna drabi f'sikka jew simili.
reference: Rip currents are the returning flow from waves breaking off the beach, often at a reef or similar.

source: Minħabba t-topoloġija ta’ taħt l-ilma, il-fluss tar-ritorn huwa kkonċentrat fi ftit taqsimiet iktar fondi, u jista’ jifforma kurrent mgħaġġel għall-ilma fond hemmhekk.
reference: Due to the underwater topology the return flow is concentrated at a few deeper sections, and a fast current to deep water may form there.

source: Ħafna mwiet jiġru minħabba għejja wara li wieħed jipprova jgħum lura kontra l-kurrent, li jista’ jkun impossibbli.
reference: Most deaths happen as result of fatigue trying to swim back against the current, which may be impossible.

source: Malli toħroġ mill-kurrent, ma jkunx iktar diffiċli mis-soltu li tgħum lura.
reference: As soon as you get out of the current, swimming back is no more difficult than normally.

source: Ipprova mmira x'imkien fejn ma tinqabadx mill-ġdid jew, skont il-ħiliet tiegħek u jekk ġejtx innutat, jista' jkun li tippreferi tistenna s-salvataġġ.
reference: Try aiming somewhere where you are not caught again or, depending on your skills and on whether you have been noticed, you might want to wait for rescue.

source: Ix-xokk tad-daħla mill-ġdid jiġi qabel ix-xokk tal-kultura (hemm fażi iqsar tal-qamar il-għasel), idum aktar, u jista’ jkun iktar qawwi.
reference: Re-entry shock comes on sooner than culture shock (there's less of a honeymoon phase), lasts longer, and can be more severe.

source: Vjaġġaturi li sabuha faċli jaġġustaw għall-kultura l-ġdida xi kultant isibuha partikularment diffiċli biex jaġġustaw mill-ġdid għall-kultura nattiva tagħhom.
reference: Travellers who had an easy time adjusting to the new culture sometimes have a particularly hard time readjusting to their native culture.

source: Meta tirritorna f'pajjiżek wara li tkun għext barra, inti adattajt għall-kultura l-ġdida u tlift ftit mid-drawwiet tiegħek tal-kultura ta' pajjiżek.
reference: When returning home after living abroad, you've adapted to the new culture and lost some of your habits from your home culture.

source: Meta sifirt, għall-ewwel in-nies probabbilment ħadu paċenzja u fehmuk, għax jafu li l-vjaġġaturi f'pajjiż ġdid ikollhom bżonn li jadattaw.
reference: When you went abroad at first, people were probably patient and understanding, knowing that travellers in a new country need to adapt.

source: In-nies jistgħu ma jantiċipawx li l-paċenzja u l-fehim huma meħtieġa wkoll għal vjaġġaturi li jirritornaw id-dar.
reference: People may not anticipate that patience and understanding are also necessary for travellers returning home.

source: Il-wirja tal-ħsejjes u tad-dawl tal-piramida hija waħda mill-iktar affarijiet interessanti fin-naħa tat-tfal.
reference: The pyramid sound and light show is one of the most interesting things in the area for kids.

source: Inti tista' tara l-piramidi fid-dlam u tista' tarahom fis-skiet qabel jibda l-ispettaklu.
reference: You can see the pyramids in the dark and you can see them in silence before the show begins.

source: Ġeneralment dejjem tisma' l-ħoss tat-turisti u l-bejjiegħa. L-istorja tal-ħoss u d-dawl qisha ktieb tal-istejjer.
reference: Usually you always here the sound of tourists and vendors. The story of the sound and light is just like a story book.

source: L-Isfinks jintuża bħala l-isfond u n-narratur ta' storja twila.
reference: The Sphinx is set as the backdrop and the narrator of a long story.

source: Ix-xeni jintwerew fuq il-piramidi u l-piramidi differenti jkunu mixgħula.
reference: The scenes are displayed on the pyramids and the different pyramids are lit up.

source: Il-Gżejjer Shetland tan-Nofsinhar, skoperti fl-1819, huma kklejmjati minn bosta nazzjonijiet u għandhom l-iktar bażijiet, b’sittax attivi fl-2020.
reference: South Shetland Islands, discovered in 1819, are claimed by several nations and have the most bases, with sixteen active in 2020.

source: L-arċipelagu jinsab 120 km fit-Tramuntana tal-Peniżola. L-ikbar waħda hija King George Island bil-kolonizzazzjoni ta’ Villa Las Estrellas.
reference: The archipelago lies 120 km north of the Peninsula. The largest is King George Island with the settlement of Villa Las Estrellas.

source: Oħrajn jinkludu Livingston Island, u Deception fejn il-kaldera mgħarrqa ta’ vulkan li għadu attiv tipprovdi port naturali spettakolari.
reference: Others include Livingston Island, and Deception where the flooded caldera of a still-active volcano provides a spectacular natural harbour.

source: Ellsworth Land huwa r-reġjun fin-nofsinhar tal-Peniżola, imdawwar bil-Baħar Bellingshausen.
reference: Ellsworth Land is the region south of the Peninsula, bounded by the Bellingshausen Sea.

source: Il-muntanji tal-Peniżola hawn jingħaqdu fil-pjanura, imbagħad jerġgħu joħorġu biex jiffurmaw il-katina ta’ 360 km tal-Muntanji Ellsworth, imferrqa fi tnejn mill-Glaċier ta’ Minnesota.
reference: The mountains of the Peninsula here merge into the plateau, then re-emerge to form the 360 km chain of the Ellsworth Mountains, bisected by the Minnesota Glacier.

source: Il-parti tat-Tramuntana jew il-Medda tas-Sentinella għandha l-ogħla muntanji tal-Antartika, il-Vinson Massif, b’quċċata li tilħaq 4892 m f’Mount Vinson.
reference: The northern part or Sentinel Range has Antarctica's highest mountains, the Vinson Massif, peaking at 4892 m Mount Vinson.

source: F’postijiet remoti, mingħajr kopertura tat-telefon ċellulari, it-telefon satellitari jista’ jkun l-unika għażla tiegħek.
reference: In remote locations, without cell phone coverage, a satellite phone may be your only option.

source: Telefown bis-satellita ġeneralment ma jissotitwixxix mowbajl, peress li trid tkun barra b’veduta ċara tas-satellita biex tagħmel telefonata.
reference: A satellite phone is not generally a replacement for a mobile phone, as you have to be outdoors with clear line of sight to the satellite to make a phone call.

source: Is-servizz ta' spiss jintuża mill-vapuri, inklużi dgħajjes tad-divertiment, kif ukoll spedizzjonijiet li għandhom bżonn jikkomunikaw mill-bogħod bil-vuċi u d-data.
reference: The service is frequently used by shipping, including pleasure craft, as well as expeditions who have remote data and voice needs.

source: Il-fornitur lokali tiegħek tas-servizz tat-telefon għandu jkun kapaċi jagħtik aktar informazzjoni dwar kif tikkonnettja ma' dan is-servizz.
reference: Your local telephone service provider should be able to give more information about connecting to this service.

source: Għażla li qed issir aktar popolari fost dawk li qed jippjanaw sena ta' waqfien mill-istudju hija li jivvjaġġaw u jitgħallmu.
reference: An increasingly more popular option for those planning a gap-year is to travel and learn.

source: Dan huwa partikularment popolari ma' dawk li jispiċċaw mill-iskola, u jippermetilhom li jieħdu sena qabel jidħlu l-università, mingħajr ma jikkompromettu l-edukazzjoni tagħhom.
reference: This is especially popular with school leavers, allowing them to take a year out before university, without compromising their education.

source: F’ħafna każijiet, l-iskrizzjoni f’kors matul sena ta’ intervall barra mill-pajjiż tista’ attwalment ittejjeb il-possibiltajiet tiegħek li tipprogressa lejn edukazzjoni għolja lura fil-pajjiż tiegħek.
reference: In many cases, enrolling on a gap-year course abroad can actually improve your chances of moving into higher education back in your home country.

source: Tipikament se jkun hemm ħlas għat-tagħlim biex tirreġistra f'dawn il-programmi edukattivi.
reference: Typically there will be a tuition fee to enroll in these educational programs.

source: Il-Finlandja hija destinazzjoni tajba ħafna għat-tbaħħir. Il-"“Land of a thousand lakes”" (l-Art b’elf lag) għandha eluf ta’ gżejjer ukoll, fil-lagi u fl-arċipelagi kostali.
reference: Finland is a great boating destination. The "Land of a thousand lakes" has thousands of islands too, in the lakes and in the coastal archipelagos.

source: Fl-arċipelagi u l-lagi m’għandekx bżonn jott bilfors.
reference: In the archipelagos and lakes you do not necessarily need a yacht.

source: Għalkemm l-arċipelagi kostali u l-akbar għadajjar huma tabilħaqq kbar biżżejjed għal kwalunkwe jott, dgħajjes iżgħar jew anki kajak joffru esperjenza differenti.
reference: Although the coastal archipelagos and the biggest lakes are indeed big enough for any yacht, smaller boats or even a kayak offer a different experience.

source: It-tbaħħir huwa passatemp nazzjonali fil-Finlandja, fejn hemm dgħajsa għal kull seba’ jew tmien persuni.
reference: Boating is a national pastime in Finland, with a boat to every seven or eight people.

source: Dan japplika wkoll għan-Norveġja, l-Iżvezja u New Zealand, iżda altrimenti huwa pjuttost uniku (eż. fin-Netherlands il-figura hija wieħed għal kull erbgħin).
reference: This is matched by Norway, Sweden and New Zealand, but otherwise quite unique (e.g. in the Netherlands the figure is one to forty).

source: Ħafna mill-Kruċieri distinti ġewwa l-Baltiku jinkludu żjara estiża ġewwa San Pietruburgu, fir-Russja.
reference: Most of the distinct Baltic Cruises feature an extended stay in St. Petersburg, Russia.

source: Dan ifisser li tista' żżur il-belt storika għal xi jumejn sħaħ waqt li billejl tirritorna u torqod fuq il-vapur.
reference: This means you can visit the historic city for a couple of full days while returning and sleeping on the ship at night.

source: Jekk titlaq fuq l-art biss billi tuża eskursjonijiet abbord mhux se jkollokx bżonn ta’ viża separata (mill-2009).
reference: If you only go ashore using shipboard excursions you will not need a separate visa (as of 2009).

source: Xi kruċieri juru lil Berlin, il-Ġermanja fil-fuljetti. Kif tistgħu taraw mill-mappa ta’ hawn fuq, Berlin mhix ħdejn il-baħar u żjara fil-belt mhix inkluża fil-prezz tal-kruċiera.
reference: Some cruises feature Berlin, Germany in the brochures. As you can see from the map above Berlin is no where near the sea and a visit to the city is not included in the price of the cruise.

source: L-ivvjaġġar bl-ajruplan jista' jkun esperjenza tal-biża' għal nies ta' kull età u sfond, partikularment jekk qatt ma taru qabel jew kellhom esperjenza ta' xi avveniment trawmatiku.
reference: Travelling by plane can be a scary experience for people of all ages and backgrounds, particularly if they've not flown before or have experienced a traumatic event.

source: Mhix xi ħaġa li trid tistħi biha: mhix differenti mill-biżgħat u l-avverżjonijiet personali li għandhom ħafna nies għal affarijiet oħra.
reference: It is not something to be ashamed of: it is no different from the personal fears and dislikes of other things that very many people have.

source: Għal xi wħud, jekk jifhmu ftit dwar kif jaħdmu l-ajruplani u x’jiġri waqt titjira, dan jista’ jgħinhom jegħlbu biża’ li hija bbażata fuq dak li ma jafux jew fuq affarijiet li ma jkollhomx kontroll fuqhom.
reference: For some, understanding something about how aircraft work and what happens during a flight may help to overcome a fear which is based on the unknown or on not being in control.

source: Il-kumpaniji tal-kurrier jitħallsu sew talli jikkonsenjaw l-affarijiet malajr. Spiss, il-ħin huwa importanti ħafna fil-każ ta’ dokumenti kummerċjali, merkanzija jew spare parts għal tiswijiet urġenti.
reference: Courier companies are well paid for delivering things quickly. Frequently, time is very important with business documents, merchandise or spare parts for an urgent repair.

source: Fuq xi rotot, il-kumpaniji l-kbar għandhom l-ajruplani tagħhom stess, iżda għal rotot oħra u kumpaniji iżgħar kien hemm problema.
reference: On some routes, the larger companies have their own planes, but for other routes and smaller firms there was a problem.

source: Jekk bagħtu l-affarijiet tal-merkanzija bl-ajru, f’xi rotot jista’ jkun li jkun damu ġranet biex jgħaddu mill-ħatt u mid-dwana.
reference: If they sent things by air freight, on some routes it may have taken days to get through unloading and customs.

source: L-uniku mod biex ngħaddiha aktar malajr kien li nibgħatha bħala bagalja ċċekkjata. Ir-regolamenti tal-linji tal-ajru ma jippermettulhomx li jibagħtu bagalji mingħajr passiġġier, u hawn fejn tidħol inti.
reference: The only way to get it through faster was to send it as checked luggage. Airline regulations will not allow them to send luggage without a passenger, which is where you come in.

source: Il-mod ovvju ta' kif ittir fl-ewwel klassi jew fil-klassi tan-negozju huwa li toħroġ mazz oħxon ta' flus għall-privileġġ (jew, tant aħjar, qabbad lill-kumpanija tiegħek biex tagħmel dan għalik).
reference: The obvious way of flying in first or business class is to fork out a thick wad of money for the privilege (or, better yet, get your company to do it for you).

source: Madankollu, dan ma jkunx irħis: bħala regoli approssimattivi, tista’ tistenna li tħallas sa erba’ darbiet aktar min-noll ekonomiku normali għall-business (il-klassi tan-negozju), u ħdax-il darba iktar għall-first class (l-ewwel klassi)!
reference: However, this does not come cheap: as rough rules of thumb, you can expect to pay up to four times the normal economy fare for business, and eleven times for first class!

source: Ġeneralment, ma tagħmilx sens li tfittex skontijiet għal sits fil-business class u dawk fil-first class fuq titjiriet diretti minn A sa B.
reference: Generally speaking, there is no point in even looking for discounts for business or first-class seats on direct flights from A to B.

source: Il-linji tal-ajru jafu sewwa li hemm ċertu grupp importanti ta' vjaġġaturi bl-ajru li huma lesti li jħallsu l-ogħla prezzijiet għall-privileġġ li jaslu xi mkien malajr u fil-kumdità, u jiċċarġjaw għal dawn l-affarijiet.
reference: Airlines know well that there is a certain core group of flyers who are willing to pay top dollar for the privilege of getting somewhere fast and in comfort, and charge accordingly.

source: Il-belt kapitali tal-Moldova hija Chişinău. Il-lingwa lokali hija r-Rumen, iżda r-Russu jintuża ħafna.
reference: The capital of Moldova is Chişinău. The local language is Romanian, but Russian is widely used.

source: Il-Moldova hija repubblika multi-etnika li sofriet minn kunflitt etniku.
reference: Moldova is a multi-ethnic republic that has suffered from ethnic conflict.

source: Fl-1994, dan il-kunflitt wassal għall-ħolqien tar-Repubblika tat-Transnistrija awtoproklamata fil-Lvant tal-Moldova, li għandha l-gvern u l-munita tagħha stess iżda ma hi rikonoxxuta minn ebda pajjiż membru tan-NU.
reference: In 1994, this conflict led to the creation of the self-proclaimed Transnistria Republic in eastern Moldova, which has its own government and currency but is not recognised by any UN member country.

source: Ir-rabtiet ekonomiċi ġew stabbiliti mill-ġdid bejn dawn iż-żewġ partijiet tal-Moldova minkejja li ln-negozjati politiċi ma rnexxewx.
reference: Economic links have been re-established between these two parts of Moldova despite the failure in political negotiations.

source: Ir-reliġjon ewlenija fil-Moldova hija Kristjana Ortodossa.
reference: The major religion in Moldova is Orthodox Christian.

source: Izmir hija t-tielet l-akbar belt fit-Turkija b’popolazzjoni ta’ madwar 3.7 miljuni, it-tieni l-akbar port wara Istanbul, u ċentru tat-trasport tajjeb ħafna.
reference: İzmir is the third largest city in Turkey with a population of around 3.7 million, the second biggest port after Istanbul, and a very good transport hub.

source: Dik li darba kienet il-belt antika ta’ Smyrna, issa hija ċentru tan-negozju modern, żviluppat u mimli attività, mibni madwar bajja enormi u mdawwar bil-muntanji.
reference: Once the ancient city of Smyrna, it is now a modern, developed, and busy commercial center, set around a huge bay and surrounded by mountains.

source: Il-boulevards wesgħin, bini bil-faċċati tal-ħġieġ u ċentri moderni tal-ħwienet huma ttikkjati bi bjut tradizzjonali bil-madum aħmar, is-suq tas-seklu 18, u l-moskej u l-knejjes qodma, għalkemm il-belt għandha atmosfera aktar ta’ Ewropa Mediterranja mit-Turkija tradizzjonali.
reference: The broad boulevards, glass-fronted buildings and modern shopping centers are dotted with traditional red-tiled roofs, the 18th century market, and old mosques and churches, although the city has an atmosphere more of Mediterranean Europe than traditional Turkey.

source: Ir-raħal ta' Haldarsvik joffri veduti tal-gżira Eysturoy li tinsab qrib u għandu knisja ottagonali mhux tas-soltu.
reference: The village of Haldarsvík offer views of the nearby island Eysturoy and has an unusual octagonal church.

source: Fiċ-ċimiterju, wieħed isib skulturi interessanti tal-irħam ta’ ħamiem fuq ċerti oqbra.
reference: In the churchyard, there are interesting marble sculptures of doves over some tombs.

source: Ma jiddispjaċikx jekk tqatta’ nofs siegħa tippassiġġa madwar il-villaġġ intriganti.
reference: It's worth half an hour to stroll about the intriguing village.

source: Lejn it-Tramuntana u tintlaħaq faċilment hemm il-belt romantika u affaxxinanti ta' Sintra u li saret magħrufa mal-barranin wara d-deskrizzjoni mimlija tifħir dwar il-ġmiel kbir tagħha li esprima Lord Byron.
reference: To the north and within easy reach is the romantic and fascinating town of Sintra and which was made famous to foreigners after a glowing account of its splendours recorded by Lord Byron.

source: Scotturb Bus 403 tivvjaġġa regolarment lejn Sintra, u tieqaf f’Cabo da Roca.
reference: Scotturb Bus 403 travels regularly to Sintra, stopping at Cabo da Roca.

source: Barra minn hekk, fit-Tramuntana żur is-Santwarju kbir tal-Madonna ta' Fatima (Kappella), post id-dehriet Marjani magħrufin mad-dinja kollha.
reference: Also to the north visit the great Sanctuary of Our Lady of Fatima (Shrine), a place of worldwide famous Marian apparitions.

source: Jekk jogħġbok ftakar li, essenzjalment, qed iżżur sit ta’ oqbra tal-massa, kif ukoll sit li għandu tifsira kważi inkalkolabbli għal porzjon sinifikanti tal-popolazzjoni tad-dinja.
reference: Please remember that you are essentially visiting a mass grave site, as well as a site that has an almost incalculable meaning to a significant portion of the world's population.

source: Għad hemm ħafna rġiel u nisa li għadhom ħajjin illum li rnexxilhom jibqgħu ħajjin tul iż-żmien li damu hawnhekk, u ħafna aktar li kellhom l-għeżież tagħhom maqtula jew imħaddmin sal-mewt hemmhekk, Lhud kif ukoll mhumiex Lhud.
reference: There are still many men and women alive who survived their time here, and many more who had loved ones who were murdered or worked to death there, Jews and non-Jews alike.

source: Jekk jogħġbok ittratta s-sit bid-dinjità, is-solennità u r-rispett li jistħoqqlu. Tagħmilx ċajt dwar l-Olokawst jew in-Nażisti.
reference: Please treat the site with all of the dignity, solemnity and respect it deserves. Do not make jokes about the Holocaust or Nazis.

source: Tagħmilx vandaliżmu fuq il-post billi timmarka jew tobrox graffiti fuq l-istrutturi.
reference: Do not deface the site by marking or scratching graffiti into structures.

source: Il-lingwi uffiċjali ta’ Barċellona huma l-Katalan u l-Ispanjol. Bejn wieħed u ieħor, nofs in-nies jippreferu jitkellmu bil-Katalan, il-maġġor parti tan-nies jifhmuh, u kważi kulħadd pratikament jaf jitkellem bl-Ispanjol.
reference: Barcelona's official languages are Catalan and Spanish. About a half prefer to speak Catalan, a vast majority understands it, and virtually everyone knows Spanish.

source: Madankollu, il-biċċa l-kbira tas-sinjali huma mmarkati biss bil-Katalan minħabba li din hija stabbilita bil-liġi bħala l-ewwel lingwa uffiċjali.
reference: However, most signs are indicated only in Catalan because it is established by law as the first official language.

source: Imma, l-Ispanjol jintuża wkoll b'mod estensiv fit-trasport pubbliku u faċilitajiet oħra.
reference: Yet, Spanish is also widely used in public transport and other facilities.

source: Avviżi regolari fil-Metro jsiru bil-Katalan biss, iżda tfixkil mhux ippjanat jitħabbar minn sistema awtomatizzata f’varjetà wiesgħa ta’ lingwi inkluż bl-Ispanjol, bl-Ingliż, bil-Franċiż, bl-Għarbi u bil-Ġappuniż.
reference: Regular announcements in the Metro are made only in Catalan, but unplanned disruptions are announced by an automated system in a wide variety of languages including Spanish, English, French, Arabic and Japanese.

source: Il-Pariġini għandhom reputazzjoni ta' nies egoċentriċi, kesħin u arroganti.
reference: Parisians have a reputation for being egocentric, rude and arrogant.

source: Waqt li ħafna drabi dan huwa biss stereotip mhux preċiż, l-aħjar mod biex tkampa f'Pariġi għadu li ġġib ruħek sewwa, u taġixxi bħal xi ħadd li huwa "bien élevé" (imrobbi sewwa). Dan jgħin konsiderevolment biex tkampa b'mod aktar faċli.
reference: While this is often only an inaccurate stereotype, the best way to get along in Paris still is to be on your best behavior, acting like someone who is "bien élevé" (well brought up). It will make getting about considerably easier.

source: L-atitudnijiet mhux amikevoli tal-Pariġini malajr jisfaw fix-xejn meta turihom korteżji bażiċi.
reference: Parisians' abrupt exteriors will rapidly evaporate if you display some basic courtesies.

source: Il-park naturali tal-Għadajjar ta' Plitvice huwa miksi b'ħafna siġar, prinċipalment siġar tal-fagu, spruce u żnuber, u fih taħlita ta' veġetazzjoni Alpina u Mediterranja.
reference: The Plitvice Lakes national park is heavily forested, mainly with beech, spruce, and fir trees, and features a mixture of Alpine and Mediterranean vegetation.

source: Għandha varjetà notevolment wiesgħa ta’ komunitajiet ta’ pjanti, minħabba l-firxa tagħha ta’ mikroklimi, ħamrija differenti u livelli differenti ta’ altitudni.
reference: It has a notably wide variety of plant communities, due to its range of microclimates, differing soils and varying levels of altitude.

source: Iż-żona tilqa’ fiha wkoll varjetà estremament wiesgħa ta’ speċi ta’ annimali u għasafar.
reference: The area is also home to an extremely wide variety of animal and bird species.

source: Fawna rari bħall-ors kannella Ewropew, il-lupu, l-ajkla, il-kokka, il-linċi, il-qattus selvaġġ u s-serduq selvaġġ jistgħu jinstabu hemm, flimkien ma’ ħafna aktar speċijiet komuni
reference: Rare fauna such as the European brown bear, wolf, eagle, owl, lynx, wild cat and capercaillie can be found there, along with many more common species

source: Waqt li jżuru l-monasteri, in-nisa jkollhom jilbsu dbielet li jgħattu l-irkopptejn u li jkollhom spallithom mgħottijin wkoll.
reference: While visiting the monasteries, women are required to wear skirts covering the knees and have their shoulders covered, too.

source: Ħafna mill-monasteri jipprovdu xall għan-nisa li ma jiġux ippreparati, imma jekk inti ġġib tiegħek, speċjalment wieħed b’kuluri jgħajtu, se tirċievi tbissima mill-patri jew mis-soru fid-daħla.
reference: Most of the monasteries do provide wraps for women who come unprepared, but if you bring your own, especially one with bright colors, you'll get a smile from the monk or nun at the entrance.

source: Bl-istess mod, l-irġiel huma meħtieġa jilbsu qliezet li jgħattu l-irkopptejn.
reference: Along the same line, men are required to wear trousers covering the knees.

source: Dan ukoll jista' jiġi misluf mill-istokk li jkun hemm fid-daħla imma dawk il-ħwejjeġ ma jinħaslux wara kull persuna li tilbishom u allura jista' jkun li ma tħossokx komda tilbes dawn id-dbielet. Għall-irġiel hemm daqs uniku għal kulħadd!
reference: This too can be borrowed from the stock at the entrance but that clothing isn't washed after every user so you may not feel comfortable wearing these skirts. One size fits all for men!

source: It-tisjir tal-Majorka, bħal dak ta’ żoni simili fil-Mediterran, huwa bbażat fuq ħobż, ħaxix u laħam (speċjalment majjal), u juża żejt taż-żebbuġa f’kull platt.
reference: Majorcan cuisine, like that of similar zones in the Mediterranean, is based on bread, vegetables and meat (specially pork), and uses olive oil throughout.

source: Dixx popolari u sempliċi, speċjalment fis-sajf, huwa l-Pa amb Oli: Ħobż biż-żejt taż-żebbuġa, tadam, u l-kondimenti li jkunu disponibbli bħal ġobon, tonn taż-żejt, eċċ.
reference: A simple popular dinner, especially during the summer, is the Pa amb Oli: Bread with olive oil, tomato, and any available condiments such as cheese, tunafish, etc.

source: In-nomi kollha, ħdejn il-kelma Sie għal inti, dejjem jibdew b'ittra kapitali, anki f'nofs is-sentenza.
reference: All nouns, alongside the word Sie for you, always begin with a capital letter, even in the middle of a sentence.

source: Dan hu metodu importanti kif tiddistingwi bejn xi verbi u oġġetti.
reference: This is an important way to distinguish between some verbs and objects.

source: Ċertament, dan jiffaċilita l-qari, għalkemm il-kitba hija ftit ikkumplikata minħabba l-bżonn li nsiru nafu jekk verb jew aġġettiv humiex użati f’forma sostantivizzata.
reference: It also arguably makes reading easier, though writing is somewhat complicated by the need to find out whether a verb or adjective is used in a substantivized form.

source: Il-pronunzja bit-Taljan hija relattivament faċli minħabba li ħafna kliem huma ppronunzjati eżatt kif huma miktubin
reference: Pronunciation is relatively easy in Italian since most words are pronounced exactly how they are written

source: L-ittri ewlenin li trid toqgħod attent għalihom huma “c” u “g”, minħabba li l-pronunzja tagħhom tvarja skont liema vokali tiġi warajhom.
reference: The main letters to watch out for are c and g, since their pronunciation varies based on the following vowel.

source: Apparti hekk, kun ċert li tippronunzja r u rr differenti: caro tfisser għali, waqt li carro tfisser karru.
reference: Also, make sure to pronounce r and rr differently: caro means dear, whereas carro means chariot.

source: Il-lingwa Persjana għandha grammatika relattivament faċli u, fil-maġġor parti, regolari.
reference: Persian has a relatively easy and mostly regular grammar.

source: Għaldaqstant, il-qari ta' dan il-ktieb introduttorju tal-grammatika jista' jgħinek titgħallem ħafna dwar il-grammatika Persjana u tifhem aħjar il-frażijiet.
reference: Therefore, reading this grammar primer would help you learn much about Persian grammar and understand phrases better.

source: Ovvjament, jekk taf lingwa Rumanza, se jkun iktar faċli għalik li titgħallem il-Portugiż.
reference: Needless to say, if you know a Romance language, it will be easier for you to learn Portuguese.

source: Madankollu, in-nies li jafu ftit Spanjol jistgħu jikkonkludu bil-għaġla li l-Portugiż huwa simili biżżejjed li ma jkunx hemm għalfejn li jiġi studjat separatament.
reference: However, people who know a little Spanish may hastily conclude that Portuguese is close enough that it need not be studied separately.

source: Osservatorji pre-moderni ġeneralment huma obsoleti llum il-ġurnata, u jibqgħu bħala mużewijiet, jew postijiet edukattivi.
reference: Pre-modern observatories are usually obsolete today, and remain as museums, or sites of education.

source: Billi t-tniġġis tad-dawl fl-aqwa tagħhom ma kienx it-tip ta’ problema li għandna bħalissa, ġeneralment dawn jinsabu fil-bliet jew fil-kampusis, u huwa aktar faċli tilħaq lilhom milli dawk mibnija fi żminijiet moderni.
reference: As light pollution in their heyday was not the kind of problem it is today, they are usually located in cities or at campuses, easier to reach than those built in modern times.

source: Ħafna teleskopji moderni ta’ riċerka huma faċilitajiet enormi f’żoni remoti b’kundizzjonijiet atmosferiċi favorevoli.
reference: Most modern research telescopes are enormous facilities in remote areas with favorable atmospheric conditions.

source: Il-wiri tal-fjur taċ-ċirasa, magħruf bħala “hanami”, ilu parti mill-kultura Ġappuniża sa mis-seklu 8.
reference: Cherry blossom viewing, known as hanami, has been a part of Japanese culture since the 8th century.

source: l-kunċett ġie miċ-Ċina fejn il-fjur tal-għanbaqar kienu l-fjura magħżula.
reference: The concept came from China where plum blossoms were the flower of choice.

source: Fil-Ġappun, l-ewwel festini tal-fjur taċ-ċirasa kienu ospitati mill-imperatur għalih u għall-membri oħra tal-aristokrazija biss madwar il-Qorti Imperjali.
reference: In Japan, the first cherry blossom parties were hosted by the emperor only for himself and other members of the aristocracy around the Imperial Court.

source: Il-pjanti jidhru fl-aħjar tagħhom meta jkunu f’ambjent naturali, għalhekk, irreżisti t-tentazzjoni li tneħħi anke kampjun "wieħed biss".
reference: Plants look their best when in a natural environment, so resist the temptation to remove even "just one" specimen.

source: Jekk iżżur ġnien organizzat formalment, il-ġbir ta’ "kampjuni" se jwassal ukoll biex inti titkeċċa, mingħajr diskussjonijiet.
reference: If visiting a formally arranged garden, collecting "specimens" is also going to get you ejected, without discussion.

source: Singapore ġeneralment huwa post estremament sigur biex tkun fih u faċli ħafna biex tinnavigah, u tista’ tixtri kważi kollox wara li tasal.
reference: Singapore is generally an extremely safe place to be and very easy to navigate, and you can buy almost anything after arriving.

source: Imma meta titqiegħed fit-"tropiċi għoljin" ftit gradi biss fit-tramuntana tal-ekwatur se jkollok bżonn tiffaċċja kemm is-sħana (dejjem) kif ukoll ix-xemx qawwija (meta s-sema jkun ċar, aktar rari).
reference: But being placed in the "high tropics" just a few degrees north of equator you will need to deal with both heat (always) and strong sun (when the sky is clear, more rarely).

source: Hemm ukoll ftit xarabankijiet li jmorru lejn it-Tramuntana għal Ħebron, il-post tradizzjonali tad-dfin tal-patrijarki Bibliċi Abraham, Isakk, Ġakobb, u n-nisa tagħhom.
reference: There are also a few buses going north to Hebron, the traditional burial place of the Biblical patriarchs Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, and their wives.

source: Iċċekkja li l-karozza tal-linja li qed tippjana li taqbad tmur Hebron u mhux biss lejn l-insedjament Lhudi viċin Kiryat Arba.
reference: Check that the bus you are thinking of taking goes into Hebron and not just to the nearby Jewish settlement of Kiryat Arba.

source: Il-passaġġi fuq l-ilma interni jistgħu jkunu tema tajba biex tibbaża vaganza madwarha.
reference: Inland waterways can be a good theme to base a holiday around.

source: Pereżempju żjarat f’kastelli fil-Wied ta’ Loire, il-wied tar-Rhine jew il-kruċieri lejn bliet interessanti fuq id-Danubju jew mawriet bid-dgħajjes tul il-Kanal Erie.
reference: For example visiting castles in the Loire Valley, the Rhine valley or taking a cruise to interesting cites on the Danube or boating along the Erie Canal.

source: Huma jiddefinixxu wkoll ir-rotot ta' mogħdijiet popolari għal mixjiet twal u sewqan tar-roti.
reference: They also define routes for popular hiking and cycling trails.

source: Il-Milied huwa wieħed mill-aktar festi importanti tal-Kristjaneżmu, u huwa ċċelebrat bħala għeluq snin Ġesù.
reference: Christmas is one of the most important holidays of Christianity, and is celebrated as the birthday of Jesus.

source: Ħafna mit-tradizzjonijiet assoċjati mal-festa ġew adottati wkoll minn dawk li ma jemmnux fil-pajjiżi Kristjani u dawk li mhumiex Kristjani madwar id-dinja.
reference: Many of the traditions surrounding the holiday have been adopted also by non-believers in Christian countries and non-Christians around the world.

source: Hemm it-tradizzjoni li tgħaddi lejlet l-Għid imqajjem f'xi post espost biex tara t-tlugħ tax-xemx.
reference: There's a tradition to pass the Easter night awake at some exposed point to see the sunrise.

source: Ovvjament hemm spjegazzjonijiet teoloġiċi Kristjani għal din it-tradizzjoni, iżda jista' jkun ukoll ritwal tar-rebbiegħa u l-fertilità ta' qabel l-Insara.
reference: There are of course Christian theological explanations for this tradition, but it may well be a pre-Christian Spring and Fertility ritual.

source: Knejjes iktar tradizzjonali spiss jorganizzaw Velja tal-Għid nhar is-Sibt filgħaxija tul tmiem il-ġimgħa tal-Għid, u l-kongregazzjonijiet ħafna drabi jibdew iċ-ċelebrazzjonijiet mad-daqqa ta’ nofsillejl biex jiċċelebraw il-qawmien mill-mewt ta’ Kristu.
reference: More traditional churches often hold an Easter Vigil on Saturday night during the Easter weekend, with the congregations often breaking into celebration at the stroke of midnight to celebrate Christ's resurrection.

source: L-annimali kollha li oriġinarjament waslu fil-gżejjer ġew hawn billi għamu, taru jew ifflowtjaw s'hawnhekk.
reference: All animals that originally arrived in the islands came here either by swimming, flying or floating.

source: Minħabba d-distanza twila mill-kontinent, il-mammiferi ma setgħux jagħmlu l-vjaġġ u għalhekk il-fekruna ġganta saret l-annimal ewlieni ta’ mergħa ġewwa l-Galapagos.
reference: Due to the long distance from the continent mammals were unable to make the journey making the giant tortoise the primary grazing animal in the Galapagos.

source: Sa mill-wasla tal-bniedem fil-Galapagos, ġew introdotti bosta mammiferi inklużi mogħoż, żwiemel, baqar, firien, qtates u klieb.
reference: Since the arrival of man to the Galapagos, many mammals have been introduced including goats, horses, cows, rats, cats and dogs.

source: Jekk tmur fiż-żoni tal-Artiku jew tal-Antartiku fix-xitwa tesperjenza l-lejl polari, li jfisser li x-xemx ma togħliex iktar ’il fuq mill-orizzont.
reference: If you visit the Arctic or Antarctic areas in the winter you will experience the polar night, which means that the sun doesn't rise above the horizon.

source: Dan joffri opportunità tajba biex tara l-Aurora borealis, peress li s-sema se jkun xi ftit jew wisq mudlama l-ħin kollu.
reference: This offers a good opportunity to see the Aurora borealis, as the sky will be dark more or less around the clock.

source: Billi ż-żoni għandhom popolazzjoni baxxa, u t-tniġġis tad-dawl għalhekk ħafna drabi ma jikkawżax problemi, int se tkun tista’ wkoll tgawdi l-istilel.
reference: As the areas are sparsely populated, and light pollution therefore often not a problem, you will also be able to enjoy the stars.

source: Il-kultura tax-xogħol Ġappuniża hija aktar ġerarkika u formali minn dik li huma mdorrijin biha n-nies tal-Punent.
reference: Japanese work culture is more hierarchical and formal that what Westerners may be used to.

source: Is-suits huma ilbies standard għax-xogħol, u l-kollegi jsejħu lil xulxin bil-kunjom jew bit-titli tax-xogħol.
reference: Suits are standard business attire, and coworkers call each other by their family names or by job titles.

source: L-armonija fuq il-post tax-xogħol hija kruċjali, bl-enfasi ssir fuq l-isforz tal-grupp u mhux fuq l-inkoraġġiment tal-kisbiet individwali.
reference: Workplace harmony is crucial, emphasizing group effort rather than praising individual accomplishments.

source: Il-ħaddiema ħafna drabi jridu jiksbu l-approvazzjoni tas-superjuri tagħhom għal kwalunkwe deċiżjoni li jieħdu, u huma mistennija li jobdu l-istruzzjonijiet tas-superjuri tagħhom mingħajr riservi.
reference: Workers must often get their superiors' approval for any decisions they make, and are expected to obey their superiors' instructions without question.
